DiscordCoreAPI
A Discord bot library written in C++, with custom asynchronous coroutines.
FoundationEntities.hpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1/*
2*
3 DiscordCoreAPI, A bot library for Discord, written in C++, and featuring explicit multithreading through the usage of custom, asynchronous C++ CoRoutines.

38

43
44/**
45 * \defgroup discord_events Discord Events

48

64namespace DiscordCoreInternal {
65
66 using Snowflake = uint64_t;
67
68 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll VoiceConnectInitData {
69 Snowflake channelId{};
70 Snowflake guildId{};
71 Snowflake userId{};
72 int32_t currentShard{};
73 bool selfDeaf{ false };
74 bool selfMute{ false };
75 };
76
77 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll VoiceConnectionData {
78 std::string voiceEncryptionMode{};
79 std::string externalIp{};
80 int32_t audioSSRC{ 0 };
81 std::string secretKey{};
82 std::string voicePort{};
83 std::string sessionId{};
84 std::string endPoint{};
85 std::string voiceIp{};
86 std::string token{};
87 };
88
89 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll WebSocketResumeData {
90 std::string botToken{};
91 std::string sessionId{};
92 int32_t lastNumberReceived{};
93
94 operator nlohmann::json() {
95 nlohmann::json theData{};
96 theData["d"]["seq"] = this->lastNumberReceived;
97 theData["d"]["session_id"] = this->sessionId;
98 theData["d"]["token"] = this->botToken;
99 theData["op"] = 6;
100 return theData;
101 }
102 };
103
104 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll WebSocketIdentifyData {
105 std::string botToken{};
106 int64_t intents{};
107 int32_t currentShard{};
108 int32_t numberOfShards{};
109
110 operator nlohmann::json() {
111 nlohmann::json data{};
112 data["d"]["properties"]["browser"] = "DiscordCoreAPI";
113 data["d"]["properties"]["device"] = "DiscordCoreAPI";
114 data["d"]["shard"] = { this->currentShard, this->numberOfShards };
115 data["d"]["large_threshold"] = 250;
116 data["d"]["intents"] = this->intents;
117 data["d"]["compress"] = false;
118 data["d"]["token"] = this->botToken;
119 data["op"] = 2;
120#ifdef _WIN32
121 data["d"]["properties"]["os"] = "Windows";
122#else
123 data["d"]["properties"]["os"] = "Linux";
124#endif
125 return data;
126 }
127 };
128
129 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll VoiceSocketProtocolPayloadData {
130 std::string voicePort{};
131 std::string externalIp{};
132 std::string voiceEncryptionMode{};
133
134 operator std::vector<uint8_t>() {
135 nlohmann::json data{};
136 data["d"]["data"]["port"] = stol(this->voicePort);
137 data["d"]["data"]["mode"] = this->voiceEncryptionMode;
138 data["d"]["data"]["address"] = this->externalIp;
139 data["d"]["protocol"] = "udp";
140 data["op"] = 1;
141 std::vector<uint8_t> newVector{};
142 std::string newString = data.dump();
143 newString.shrink_to_fit();
144 newVector.insert(newVector.begin(), newString.begin(), newString.end());
145 return newVector;
146 }
147 };
148
149 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll VoiceIdentifyData {
150 VoiceConnectInitData connectInitData{};
151 VoiceConnectionData connectionData{};
152
153 operator std::vector<uint8_t>() {
154 nlohmann::json data{};
155 data["d"]["session_id"] = this->connectionData.sessionId;
156 data["d"]["server_id"] = std::to_string(this->connectInitData.guildId);
157 data["d"]["user_id"] = std::to_string(this->connectInitData.userId);
158 data["d"]["token"] = this->connectionData.token;
159 data["op"] = 0;
160 std::vector<uint8_t> newVector{};
161 std::string newString = data.dump();
162 newString.shrink_to_fit();
163 newVector.insert(newVector.begin(), newString.begin(), newString.end());
164 return newVector;
165 }
166 };
167
168 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll SendSpeakingData {
169 int32_t ssrc{};
170 int32_t delay{};
171
172 operator std::vector<uint8_t>() {
173 nlohmann::json data{};
174 data["d"]["speaking"] = 1 << 0;
175 data["d"]["delay"] = delay;
176 data["d"]["ssrc"] = ssrc;
177 data["op"] = 5;
178 std::vector<uint8_t> newVector{};
179 std::string newString = data.dump();
180 newString.shrink_to_fit();
181 newVector.insert(newVector.begin(), newString.begin(), newString.end());
182 return newVector;
183 }
184 };
185}
186
187/// The main namespace for this library. \brief The main namespace for this
188/// library.
189namespace DiscordCoreAPI {
190
191 /**
192 * \addtogroup foundation_entities
193 * @{
194 */
195
196 template<typename ObjectType> class DataParser {
197 public:
198 virtual void parseObject(const nlohmann::json&, ObjectType*) = 0;
199
200 virtual ~DataParser() = default;
201 };
202
203 /// For ids of DiscordEntities. \brief For ids of DiscordEntities.
204 using Snowflake = uint64_t;
205
206 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ConnectionPackage {
207 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, DiscordCoreAPI::UnboundedMessageBlock<DiscordCoreInternal::VoiceConnectionData>*> voiceConnectionDataBufferMap{};
208 int32_t currentBaseSocketAgent{ 0 };
209 int32_t currentReconnectionTries{ 0 };
210 int32_t currentShard{ 0 };
211 };
212
213 /// Timeout durations for the timeout command. \brief Timeout durations for the timeout command.
214 enum class TimeoutDurations : int16_t {
215 None = 0,///< None - remove timeout.
216 Minute = 1,///< 1 Minute timeout.
217 Five_Minutes = 5,///< 5 Minute timeout.
218 Ten_Minutes = 10,///< 10 Minute timeout.
219 Hour = 60,///< 1 Hour timeout.
220 Day = 1440,///< 1 Day timeout.
221 Week = 10080///< 1 Week timeout.
222 };
223
224 /// Base class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll for all Discord entities. \brief Base class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll for all Discord entities.
225 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll DiscordEntity {
226 public:
227 Snowflake id{};///< The identifier "snowflake" of the given entity.
228 /// Converts the snowflake-id into a time and date stamp. \brief Converts the
229 /// snowflake-id into a time and date stamp. \returns std::string A
230 /// std::string containing the timestamp.
231 std::string getCreatedAtTimestamp(TimeFormat timeFormat);
232
233 virtual ~DiscordEntity() = default;
234 };
235
236 /// Role tags data. \brief Role tags data.
237 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll RoleTagsData : public DataParser<RoleTagsData> {
238 std::string premiumSubscriber{};///< Are they a premium subscriber?
239 std::string integrationId{};///< What is the integration id?
240 std::string botId{};///< What is the bot id?
241
242 RoleTagsData() = default;
243
244 RoleTagsData& operator=(const nlohmann ::json& jsonObjectData) {
245 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
246 return *this;
247 }
248
249 RoleTagsData(const nlohmann ::json& jsonObjectData) {
250 *this = jsonObjectData;
251 }
252
253 virtual ~RoleTagsData() = default;
254
255 protected:
256 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, RoleTagsData* pDataStructure) {
257 if (jsonObjectData.contains("bot_id") && !jsonObjectData["bot_id"].is_null()) {
258 pDataStructure->botId = jsonObjectData["bot_id"].get<std::string>();
259 }
260
261 if (jsonObjectData.contains("integration_id") && !jsonObjectData["integration_id"].is_null()) {
262 pDataStructure->integrationId = jsonObjectData["integration_id"].get<std::string>();
263 }
264 }
265 };
266
267 /// User flags. \brief User flags.
268 enum class UserFlags : int32_t {
269 Staff = 1 << 0,///< Discord Employee.
270 Partner = 1 << 1,///< Partnered Server Owner.
271 Hypesquad = 1 << 2,///< HypeSquad Events Member.
272 Bug_Hunter_Level_1 = 1 << 3,///< Bug Hunter Level 1.
273 Hypesquad_Online_House_1 = 1 << 6,///< House Bravery Member.
274 Hypesquad_Online_House_2 = 1 << 7,///< House Brilliance Member.
275 Hypesquad_Online_House_3 = 1 << 8,///< House Balance Member.
276 Premium_Early_Suppoerter = 1 << 9,///< Early Nitro Supporter.
277 Team_Pseudo_User = 1 << 10,///< User is a team.
278 Bug_Hunter_Level_2 = 1 << 14,///< Bug Hunter Level 2.
279 Verified_Bot = 1 << 16,///< Verified Bot.
280 Verified_Developer = 1 << 17,///< Early Verified Bot Developer.
281 Certified_Moderator = 1 << 18,///< Discord Certified Moderator.
282 Bot_Http_Interactions = 1 << 19,///< Bot uses only HTTP interactions and is shown in the online member list.
283 Bot = 1 << 20,///< Is it a bot?
284 MFAEnabled = 1 << 21,///< Is MFA enabled?
285 System = 1 << 22,///< Is it a system integration?
286 Verified = 1 << 23///< Is it verified?
287 };
288
289 /// Premium types denote the level of premium a user has. \brief Premium types denote the level of premium a user has.
290 enum class PremiumType : int8_t {
291 None = 0,///< None.
292 Nitro_Classic = 1,///< Nitro classic.
293 Nitro = 2///< Nitro.
294 };
295
296 /// Data structure representing a single User. \brief Data structure representing a single User.
297 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll UserData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<UserData> {
298 public:
299 StringWrapper discriminator{};///< The user's 4-digit discord-tag identify.
300 StringWrapper userName{};///< The user's userName, not unique across the platform identify.
301 StringWrapper avatar{};///< The user's avatar hash.
302 int32_t flags{};///< The public flags on a user' s account.
303
304 UserData() = default;
305
306 UserData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
307 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
308 return *this;
309 }
310
311 UserData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
312 *this = jsonObjectData;
313 }
314
315 virtual ~UserData() = default;
316
317 protected:
318 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, UserData* pDataStructure) {
319 if (jsonObjectData.contains("username") && !jsonObjectData["username"].is_null()) {
320 pDataStructure->userName = jsonObjectData["username"].get<std::string>();
321 }
322
323 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
324 if (jsonObjectData["id"].is_string()) {
325 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
326 } else {
327 pDataStructure->id = jsonObjectData["id"].get<int64_t>();
328 }
329 }
330
331 if (jsonObjectData.contains("discriminator") && !jsonObjectData["discriminator"].is_null()) {
332 pDataStructure->discriminator = jsonObjectData["discriminator"].get<std::string>();
333 }
334
335 if (jsonObjectData.contains("avatar") && !jsonObjectData["avatar"].is_null()) {
336 std::string avatarString = "https://cdn.discordapp.com/avatars/" + std::to_string(pDataStructure->id) + "/" + jsonObjectData["avatar"].get<std::string>();
337 pDataStructure->avatar = avatarString;
338 }
339
340 if (jsonObjectData.contains("bot") && !jsonObjectData["bot"].is_null()) {
341 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int32_t, UserFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, UserFlags::Bot, jsonObjectData["bot"].get<bool>());
342 }
343
344 if (jsonObjectData.contains("system") && !jsonObjectData["system"].is_null()) {
345 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int32_t, UserFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, UserFlags::System, jsonObjectData["system"].get<bool>());
346 }
347
348 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mfa_enabled") && !jsonObjectData["mfa_enabled"].is_null()) {
349 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int32_t, UserFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, UserFlags::MFAEnabled, jsonObjectData["mfa_enabled"].get<bool>());
350 }
351
352 if (jsonObjectData.contains("verified") && !jsonObjectData["verified"].is_null()) {
353 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int32_t, UserFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, UserFlags::Verified, jsonObjectData["verified"].get<bool>());
354 }
355
356 if (jsonObjectData.contains("public_flags") && !jsonObjectData["public_flags"].is_null()) {
357 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["public_flags"].get<int32_t>();
358 }
359 }
360 };
361
362 /// Attachment data. \brief Attachment data.
363 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AttachmentData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<AttachmentData> {
364 public:
365 std::string contentType{};///< Type of content for the attachment.
366 std::string description{};///< A description of the attachment.
367 bool ephemeral{ false };///< Whether it was an ephemeral response.
368 std::string filename{};///< The file name of the attachment.
369 std::string proxyUrl{};///< The proxy url for the attachment.
370 int32_t height{ 0 };///< The height of the attachment.
371 int32_t width{ 0 };///< The width of the attachment.
372 int32_t size{ 0 };///< The size of the attachment.
373 std::string url{};///< The url for the attachment.
374
375 AttachmentData() = default;
376
377 operator nlohmann::json() {
378 nlohmann::json newValue{};
379 newValue["content_type"] = this->contentType;
380 newValue["description"] = this->description;
381 newValue["ephemeral"] = this->ephemeral;
382 newValue["file_name"] = this->filename;
383 newValue["proxy_url"] = this->proxyUrl;
384 newValue["height"] = this->height;
385 newValue["width"] = this->width;
386 newValue["size"] = this->size;
387 newValue["url"] = this->url;
388 return newValue;
389 }
390
391 AttachmentData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
392 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
393 return *this;
394 }
395
396 AttachmentData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
397 *this = jsonObjectData;
398 }
399
400 virtual ~AttachmentData() = default;
401
402 protected:
403 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AttachmentData* pDataStructure) {
404 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
405 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
406 }
407
408 if (jsonObjectData.contains("filename") && !jsonObjectData["filename"].is_null()) {
409 pDataStructure->filename = jsonObjectData["filename"].get<std::string>();
410 }
411
412 if (jsonObjectData.contains("content_type") && !jsonObjectData["content_type"].is_null()) {
413 pDataStructure->contentType = jsonObjectData["content_type"].get<std::string>();
414 }
415
416 if (jsonObjectData.contains("ephemeral") && !jsonObjectData["ephemeral"].is_null()) {
417 pDataStructure->ephemeral = jsonObjectData["ephemeral"].get<bool>();
418 }
419
420 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
421 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
422 }
423
424 if (jsonObjectData.contains("size") && !jsonObjectData["size"].is_null()) {
425 pDataStructure->size = jsonObjectData["size"].get<int32_t>();
426 }
427
428 if (jsonObjectData.contains("url") && !jsonObjectData["url"].is_null()) {
429 pDataStructure->url = jsonObjectData["url"].get<std::string>();
430 }
431
432 if (jsonObjectData.contains("proxy_url") && !jsonObjectData["proxy_url"].is_null()) {
433 pDataStructure->proxyUrl = jsonObjectData["proxy_url"].get<std::string>();
434 }
435
436 if (jsonObjectData.contains("width") && !jsonObjectData["width"].is_null()) {
437 pDataStructure->width = jsonObjectData["width"].get<int32_t>();
438 }
439
440 if (jsonObjectData.contains("height") && !jsonObjectData["height"].is_null()) {
441 pDataStructure->height = jsonObjectData["height"].get<int32_t>();
442 }
443 }
444 };
445
446 /// Sticker format types. \brief Sticker format types.
447 enum class StickerFormatType : int8_t {
448 Png = 1,///< Png.
449 Apng = 2,///< Apng.
450 Lottie = 3///< Lottie
451 };

454 /// Embed footer data. \brief Embed footer data.
455 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EmbedFooterData : public DataParser<EmbedFooterData> {
456 std::string proxyIconUrl{};///< Proxy icon url.
457 std::string iconUrl{};///< Icon url.
458 std::string text{};///< Footer text.
459 EmbedFooterData() = default;
460
461 EmbedFooterData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
462 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
463 return *this;
464 }
465
466 EmbedFooterData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
467 *this = jsonObjectData;
468 }
469
470 virtual ~EmbedFooterData() = default;
471
472 protected:
473 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, EmbedFooterData* pDataStructure) {
474 if (jsonObjectData.contains("text") && !jsonObjectData["text"].is_null()) {
475 pDataStructure->text = jsonObjectData["text"].get<std::string>();
476 }
477
478 if (jsonObjectData.contains("icon_url") && !jsonObjectData["icon_url"].is_null()) {
479 pDataStructure->iconUrl = jsonObjectData["icon_url"].get<std::string>();
480 }
481
482 if (jsonObjectData.contains("proxy_icon_url") && !jsonObjectData["proxy_icon_url"].is_null()) {
483 pDataStructure->proxyIconUrl = jsonObjectData["proxy_icon_url"].get<std::string>();
484 }
485 }
486 };
487
488 /// Embed image data. \brief Embed image data.
489 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EmbedImageData : public DataParser<EmbedImageData> {
490 std::string proxyUrl{};///< Proxy url.
491 int32_t height{ 0 };///< Image height.
492 int32_t width{ 0 };///< Image width.

494

503 *this = jsonObjectData;

507
508 protected:
509 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, EmbedImageData* pDataStructure) {

511 pDataStructure->url = jsonObjectData["url"].get<std::string>();

513
514 if (jsonObjectData.contains("proxy_url") && !jsonObjectData["proxy_url"].is_null()) {

517
518 if (jsonObjectData.contains("width") && !jsonObjectData["width"].is_null()) {
519 pDataStructure->width = jsonObjectData["width"].get<int32_t>();

521
522 if (jsonObjectData.contains("height") && !jsonObjectData["height"].is_null()) {
523 pDataStructure->height = jsonObjectData["height"].get<int32_t>();
524 }
525 }
526 };

638 /// Embed author data. \brief Embed author data.
639 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EmbedAuthorData : public DataParser<EmbedAuthorData> {
640 std::string proxyIconUrl{};///< Proxy icon url.
641 std::string iconUrl{};///< Icon url.
642 std::string name{};///< Name.
643 std::string url{};///< Url.
644
645 EmbedAuthorData() = default;
646
647 EmbedAuthorData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
648 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
649 return *this;
650 }
651
652 EmbedAuthorData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
653 *this = jsonObjectData;
654 }
655
656 virtual ~EmbedAuthorData() = default;
657
658 protected:
659 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, EmbedAuthorData* pDataStructure) {
660 if (jsonObjectData.contains("url") && !jsonObjectData["url"].is_null()) {
661 pDataStructure->url = jsonObjectData["url"].get<std::string>();
662 }
663
664 if (jsonObjectData.contains("proxy_icon_url") && !jsonObjectData["proxy_icon_url"].is_null()) {
665 pDataStructure->proxyIconUrl = jsonObjectData["proxy_icon_url"].get<std::string>();
666 }
667
668 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
669 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
670 }
671
672 if (jsonObjectData.contains("icon_url") && !jsonObjectData["icon_url"].is_null()) {
673 pDataStructure->iconUrl = jsonObjectData["icon_url"].get<std::string>();
674 }
675 }
676 };
677
678 /// Embed field data. \brief Embed field data.
679 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EmbedFieldData : public DataParser<EmbedFieldData> {
680 bool Inline{ false };///< Is the field inline with the rest of them?
681 std::string value{};///< The text on the field.
682 std::string name{};///< The title of the field.
683
684 EmbedFieldData() = default;
685
686 operator nlohmann::json() {
687 nlohmann::json newValue{};
688 newValue["inline"] = this->Inline;
689 newValue["value"] = this->value;
690 newValue["name"] = this->name;
691 return newValue;
692 }
693
694 EmbedFieldData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
695 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
696 return *this;
697 }
698
699 EmbedFieldData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
700 *this = jsonObjectData;
701 }
702
703 virtual ~EmbedFieldData() = default;
704
705 protected:
706 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, EmbedFieldData* pDataStructure) {
707 if (jsonObjectData.contains("inline") && !jsonObjectData["inline"].is_null()) {
708 pDataStructure->Inline = jsonObjectData["inline"].get<bool>();
709 }
710
711 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
712 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
713 }
714
715 if (jsonObjectData.contains("value") && !jsonObjectData["value"].is_null()) {
716 pDataStructure->value = jsonObjectData["value"].get<std::string>();
717 }
718 }
719 };
720
721 /// Embed types. \brief Embed types.
722 enum class EmbedType : int8_t {
723 Rich = 0,///< Rich.
724 Image = 1,///< Image.
725 Video = 2,///< Video.
726 Gifv = 3,///< Gifv.
727 Article = 4,///< Article.
728 link = 5///< Link.
729 };
730
731 /// Embed data. \brief Embed data.
732 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EmbedData : public DataParser<EmbedData> {
733 public:
734 std::string hexColorValue{ "000000" };///< Hex color value of the embed.
735 std::vector<EmbedFieldData> fields{};///< Array of embed fields.
736 EmbedThumbnailData thumbnail{};///< Embed thumbnail data.
737 EmbedProviderData provider{};///< Embed provider data.
738 std::string description{};///< Description of the embed.
739 EmbedFooterData footer{};///< Embed footer data.
740 EmbedAuthorData author{};///< Embed author data.
741 std::string timestamp{};///< Timestamp to be placed on the embed.
742 EmbedImageData image{};///< Embed image data.
743 EmbedVideoData video{};///< Embed video data.
744 std::string title{};///< Title of the embed.
745 std::string type{};///< Type of the embed.
746 std::string url{};///< Url for the embed.
747
748 EmbedData() = default;
749
750 operator nlohmann::json() {
751 nlohmann::json fields{};
752 for (auto& value2: this->fields) {
753 fields.push_back(value2);
754 }
755 int32_t colorValInt = stol(this->hexColorValue, 0, 16);
756 std::stringstream stream;
757 stream << std::setbase(10) << colorValInt;
758 std::string realColorVal = stream.str();
759 nlohmann::json embed{};
760 embed["footer"]["proxy_icon_url"] = this->footer.proxyIconUrl;
761 embed["author"]["proxy_icon_url"] = this->author.proxyIconUrl;
762 embed["thumbnail"]["proxy_url"] = this->thumbnail.proxyUrl;
763 embed["thumbnail"]["height"] = this->thumbnail.height;
764 embed["thumbnail"]["width"] = this->thumbnail.width;
765 embed["image"]["proxy_url"] = this->image.proxyUrl;
766 embed["author"]["icon_url"] = this->author.iconUrl;
767 embed["footer"]["icon_url"] = this->footer.iconUrl;
768 embed["video"]["proxy_url"] = this->video.proxyUrl;
769 embed["provider"]["name"] = this->provider.name;
770 embed["thumbnail"]["url"] = this->thumbnail.url;
771 embed["provider"]["url"] = this->provider.url;
772 embed["video"]["height"] = this->video.height;
773 embed["image"]["height"] = this->image.height;
774 embed["author"]["name"] = this->author.name;
775 embed["image"]["width"] = this->image.width;
776 embed["footer"]["text"] = this->footer.text;
777 embed["video"]["width"] = this->video.width;
778 embed["author"]["url"] = this->author.url;
779 embed["description"] = this->description;
780 embed["image"]["url"] = this->image.url;
781 embed["video"]["url"] = this->video.url;
782 embed["timestamp"] = this->timestamp;
783 embed["title"] = this->title;
784 embed["color"] = realColorVal;
785 embed["type"] = this->type;
786 embed["url"] = this->url;
787 embed["fields"] = fields;
788 return embed;
789 }
790
791 EmbedData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
792 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
793 return *this;
794 }
795
796 EmbedData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
797 *this = jsonObjectData;
798 }
799
800 /// Sets the author's name and avatar for the embed. \brief Sets the author's name and avatar for the embed.
801 /// \param authorName The author's name.
802 /// \param authorAvatarUrl The url to their avatar.
803 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
804 EmbedData& setAuthor(const std::string& authorName, const std::string& authorAvatarUrl = "") {
805 this->author.name = authorName;
806 this->author.iconUrl = authorAvatarUrl;
807 return *this;
808 }
809
810 /// Sets the footer's values for the embed. \brief Sets the footer's values for the embed.
811 /// \param footerText The footer's text.
812 /// \param footerIconUrlText Url to the footer's icon.
813 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
814 EmbedData& setFooter(const std::string& footerText, const std::string& footerIconUrlText = "") {
815 this->footer.text = footerText;
816 this->footer.iconUrl = footerIconUrlText;
817 return *this;
818 }
819
820 /// Sets the timestamp on the embed. \brief Sets the timestamp on the embed.
821 /// \param timeStamp The timestamp to be set.
822 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
823 EmbedData& setTimeStamp(const std::string& timeStamp) {
824 this->timestamp = timeStamp;
825 return *this;
826 }
827
828 /// Adds a field to the embed. \brief Adds a field to the embed.
829 /// \param name The title of the embed field.
830 /// \param value The contents of the embed field.
831 /// \param Inline Is it inline with the rest of the fields on the embed?
832 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
833 EmbedData& addField(const std::string& name, const std::string& value, bool Inline = true) {
834 EmbedFieldData field{};
835 field.Inline = Inline;
836 field.value = value;
837 field.name = name;
838 this->fields.push_back(field);
839 return *this;
840 }
841
842 /// Sets the description (the main contents) of the embed. \brief Sets the description (the main contents) of the embed.
843 /// \param descriptionNew The contents of the description to set.
844 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
845 EmbedData& setDescription(const std::string& descriptionNew) {
846 this->description = descriptionNew;
847 return *this;
848 }
849
850 /// Sets the color of the embed, by applying a hex-color value. \brief Sets the color of the embed, by applying a hex-color value.
851 /// \param hexColorValueNew A std::string containing a hex-number value (Between 0x00 0xFFFFFF).
852 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
853 EmbedData& setColor(const std::string& hexColorValueNew) {
854 this->hexColorValue = hexColorValueNew;
855 return *this;
856 }
857
858 /// Sets the thumbnail of the embed. \brief Sets the thumbnail of the embed.
859 /// \param thumbnailUrl The url to the thumbnail to be used.
860 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
861 EmbedData& setThumbnail(const std::string& thumbnailUrl) {
862 this->thumbnail.url = thumbnailUrl;
863 return *this;
864 }
865
866 /// Sets the title of the embed. \brief Sets the title of the embed.
867 /// \param titleNew A std::string containing the desired title.
868 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
869 EmbedData& setTitle(const std::string& titleNew) {
870 this->title = titleNew;
871 return *this;
872 }
873
874 /// Sets the image of the embed. \brief Sets the image of the embed.
875 /// \param imageUrl The url of the image to be set on the embed.
876 /// \returns EmbedData& A reference to this embed.
877 EmbedData& setImage(const std::string& imageUrl) {
878 this->image.url = imageUrl;
879 return *this;
880 }
881
882 virtual ~EmbedData() = default;
883
884 protected:
885 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, EmbedData* pDataStructure) {
886 if (jsonObjectData.contains("title") && !jsonObjectData["title"].is_null()) {
887 pDataStructure->title = jsonObjectData["title"].get<std::string>();
888 }
889
890 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
891 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<std::string>();
892 }
893
894 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
895 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
896 }
897
898 if (jsonObjectData.contains("url") && !jsonObjectData["url"].is_null()) {
899 pDataStructure->url = jsonObjectData["url"].get<std::string>();
900 }
901
902 if (jsonObjectData.contains("timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["timestamp"].is_null()) {
903 pDataStructure->timestamp = jsonObjectData["timestamp"].get<std::string>();
904 }
905
906 if (jsonObjectData.contains("color") && !jsonObjectData["color"].is_null()) {
907 int32_t colorValInt = jsonObjectData["color"].get<int32_t>();
908 std::stringstream stream{};
909 stream << std::setbase(16) << colorValInt;
910 pDataStructure->hexColorValue = stream.str();
911 }
912
913 if (jsonObjectData.contains("footer") && !jsonObjectData["footer"].is_null()) {
914 pDataStructure->footer = jsonObjectData["footer"];
915 }
916
917 if (jsonObjectData.contains("image") && !jsonObjectData["image"].is_null()) {
918 pDataStructure->image = jsonObjectData["image"];
919 }
920
921 if (jsonObjectData.contains("provider") && !jsonObjectData["provider"].is_null()) {
922 pDataStructure->provider = jsonObjectData["provider"];
923 }
924
925 if (jsonObjectData.contains("thumbnail") && !jsonObjectData["thumbnail"].is_null()) {
926 pDataStructure->thumbnail = jsonObjectData["thumbnail"];
927 }
928
929 if (jsonObjectData.contains("video") && !jsonObjectData["video"].is_null()) {
930 pDataStructure->video = jsonObjectData["video"];
931 }
932
933 if (jsonObjectData.contains("author") && !jsonObjectData["author"].is_null()) {
934 pDataStructure->author = jsonObjectData["author"];
935 }
936
937 if (jsonObjectData.contains("fields") && !jsonObjectData["fields"].is_null()) {
938 pDataStructure->fields.clear();
939 pDataStructure->fields.reserve(jsonObjectData["fields"].size());
940 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["fields"]) {
941 EmbedFieldData newData{ value };
942 pDataStructure->fields.push_back(newData);
943 }
944 pDataStructure->fields.shrink_to_fit();
945 }
946 }
947 };
948
949 /// Message reference data.\brief Message reference data.
950 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MessageReferenceData : public DataParser<MessageReferenceData> {
951 bool failIfNotExists{ false };///< Fail if the Message doesn't exist?
952 Snowflake messageId{};///< Id of the Message to reference.
953 Snowflake channelId{};///< Id of the Channel that the referenced Message was sent in.
954 Snowflake guildId{};///< Id of the Guild that the referenced Message was sent in.
955
956 MessageReferenceData() = default;
957
958 operator nlohmann::json() {
959 nlohmann::json newValue{};
960 newValue["fail_if_not_exists"] = this->failIfNotExists;
961 newValue["message_id"] = this->messageId;
962 newValue["channel_id"] = this->channelId;
963 newValue["guild_id"] = this->guildId;
964 return newValue;
965 }
966
967 MessageReferenceData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
968 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
969 return *this;
970 }
971
972 MessageReferenceData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
973 *this = jsonObjectData;
974 }
975
976 virtual ~MessageReferenceData() = default;
977
978 protected:
979 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, MessageReferenceData* pDataStructure) {
980 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message_id") && !jsonObjectData["message_id"].is_null()) {
981 pDataStructure->messageId = stoull(jsonObjectData["message_id"].get<std::string>());
982 }
983
984 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
985 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
986 }
987
988 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
989 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
990 }
991
992 if (jsonObjectData.contains("fail_if_not_exists") && !jsonObjectData["fail_if_not_exists"].is_null()) {
993 pDataStructure->failIfNotExists = jsonObjectData["fail_if_not_exists"].get<bool>();
994 }
995 }
996 };
997
998 enum class MediaType : int8_t { png = 0, gif = 1, jpeg = 2, mpeg = 3, mp3 = 4 };
999
1000 /// Data representing a file to be sent via multipart-form data. \brief Data representing a file to be sent via multipart-form data.
1001 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll File {
1002 std::string fileName{};///< The name of the file.
1003 std::string data{};///< The data of the file.
1004 };
1005
1006 /// Channel types. \brief Channel types.
1007 enum class ChannelType : int8_t {
1008 Guild_Text = 0,///< Guild text.
1009 Dm = 1,///< Direct-Message.
1010 Guild_Voice = 2,/// Guild voice.
1011 Group_Dm = 3,///< Group direct-Message.
1012 Guild_Category = 4,///< Guild category.
1013 Guild_News = 5,///< Guild news.
1014 Guild_Store = 6,///< Guild store.
1015 Guild_News_Thread = 10,///< Guild news Thread.
1016 Guild_Public_Thread = 11,///< Guild public Thread.
1017 Guild_Private_Thread = 12,///< Guild private Thread.
1018 Guild_Stage_Voice = 13,///< Guild stage-voice.
1019 Guild_Directory = 14,///< The channel in a hub containing the listed servers.
1020 Guild_Forum = 15///< A channel that can only contain threads.
1021 };
1022
1023 /// Meta data for a Thread type of Channel. \brief Meta data for a Thread type of Channel.
1024 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ThreadMetadataData : public DataParser<ThreadMetadataData> {
1025 int32_t autoArchiveDuration{ 0 };///< How int64_t before archiving this Thread.
1026 TimeStamp archiveTimestamp{ "" };///< (Where applicable) the time at which this Thread was archived.
1027 bool invitable{ false };///< The id of the individual who archived this Thread.
1028 bool archived{ false };///< Whether or not this Thread is currently archived.
1029 bool locked{ false };///< Whether or not this Thread is currently locked.
1030
1031 ThreadMetadataData() = default;
1032
1033 ThreadMetadataData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1034 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1035 return *this;
1036 }
1037
1038 ThreadMetadataData(const nlohmann::json& other) {
1039 *this = other;
1040 }
1041
1042 virtual ~ThreadMetadataData() = default;
1043
1044 protected:
1045 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ThreadMetadataData* pDataStructure) {
1046 if (jsonObjectData.contains("archived") && !jsonObjectData["archived"].is_null()) {
1047 pDataStructure->archived = jsonObjectData["archived"].get<bool>();
1048 }
1049
1050 if (jsonObjectData.contains("invitable") && !jsonObjectData["invitable"].is_null()) {
1051 pDataStructure->invitable = jsonObjectData["invitable"].get<bool>();
1052 }
1053
1054 if (jsonObjectData.contains("auto_archive_duration") && !jsonObjectData["auto_archive_duration"].is_null()) {
1055 pDataStructure->autoArchiveDuration = jsonObjectData["auto_archive_duration"].get<int32_t>();
1056 }
1057
1058 if (jsonObjectData.contains("archive_timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["archive_timestamp"].is_null()) {
1059 pDataStructure->archiveTimestamp = jsonObjectData["archive_timestamp"].get<std::string>();
1060 }
1061
1062 if (jsonObjectData.contains("locked") && !jsonObjectData["locked"].is_null()) {
1063 pDataStructure->locked = jsonObjectData["locked"].get<bool>();
1064 }
1065 }
1066 };
1067
1068 /// Data for a single member of a Thread. \brief Data for a single member of a Thread.
1069 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ThreadMemberData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ThreadMemberData> {
1070 public:
1071 TimeStamp joinTimestamp{ "" };///< The time at which the member joined this Thread.
1072 int32_t flags{ 0 };///< Flags.
1073 Snowflake userId{};///< The User's id.
1074
1075 ThreadMemberData() = default;
1076
1077 ThreadMemberData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1078 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1079 return *this;
1080 }
1081
1082 ThreadMemberData(const nlohmann::json& other) {
1083 *this = other;
1084 }
1085
1086 virtual ~ThreadMemberData() = default;
1087
1088 protected:
1089 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ThreadMemberData* pDataStructure) {
1090 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1091 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1092 }
1093
1094 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user_id") && !jsonObjectData["user_id"].is_null()) {
1095 pDataStructure->userId = stoull(jsonObjectData["user_id"].get<std::string>());
1096 }
1097
1098 if (jsonObjectData.contains("join_timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["join_timestamp"].is_null()) {
1099 pDataStructure->joinTimestamp = jsonObjectData["join_timestamp"].get<std::string>();
1100 }
1101
1102 if (jsonObjectData.contains("flags") && !jsonObjectData["flags"].is_null()) {
1103 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["flags"].get<int32_t>();
1104 }
1105 }
1106 };
1107
1108 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ThreadMemberDataVector : public DataParser<ThreadMemberDataVector> {
1109 public:
1110 ThreadMemberDataVector() = default;
1111
1112 operator std::vector<ThreadMemberData>() {
1113 return this->theThreadMemberDatas;
1114 }
1115
1116 ThreadMemberDataVector& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1117 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1118 return *this;
1119 }
1120
1121 ThreadMemberDataVector(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1122 *this = jsonObjectData;
1123 }
1124
1125 virtual ~ThreadMemberDataVector() = default;
1126
1127 protected:
1128 std::vector<ThreadMemberData> theThreadMemberDatas{};
1129
1130 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ThreadMemberDataVector* pDataStructure) {
1131 pDataStructure->theThreadMemberDatas.reserve(jsonObjectData.size());
1132 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData) {
1133 DiscordCoreAPI::ThreadMemberData newData{ value };
1134 pDataStructure->theThreadMemberDatas.push_back(newData);
1135 }
1136 pDataStructure->theThreadMemberDatas.shrink_to_fit();
1137 }
1138 };
1139
1140 /// Thread types. \brief Thread types.
1141 enum class ThreadType : int8_t {
1142 Guild_News_Thread = 10,///< Guild news Thread.
1143 Guild_Public_Thread = 11,///< Guild public Thread.
1144 Guild_Private_Thread = 12///< Guild private Thread.
1145 };
1146
1147 /// Automatic Thread archiving durations. \brief Automatic Thread archiving durations.
1148 enum class ThreadAutoArchiveDuration : int16_t {
1149 Shortest = 60,///< Shortest.
1150 Short = 1440,///< Short.
1151 Long = 4320,///< Long.
1152 Longest = 10080///< Longest.
1153 };
1154
1155 enum class GuildMemberFlags : int8_t { Pending = 1 << 0, Deaf = 1 << 1, Mute = 1 << 2 };
1156
1157 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildMemberId {
1158 GuildMemberId() = default;
1159 Snowflake guildMemberId{};
1160 Snowflake guildId{};
1161 };
1162
1163 inline bool operator==(const GuildMemberId lhs, const GuildMemberId rhs) {
1164 if (lhs.guildMemberId == rhs.guildMemberId && lhs.guildId == rhs.guildId) {
1165 return true;
1166 } else {
1167 return false;
1168 }
1169 }
1170
1171 inline bool operator<(const GuildMemberId& lhs, const GuildMemberId& rhs) {
1172 if ((lhs.guildId + lhs.guildMemberId) < (rhs.guildId + rhs.guildMemberId)) {
1173 return true;
1174 } else {
1175 return false;
1176 }
1177 }
1178
1179 /// Data structure representing a single GuildMember. \brief Data structure representing a single GuildMember.
1180 /// Data structure representing a single Guild. \brief Data structure representing a single Guild.
1181 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildMemberData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<GuildMemberData> {
1182 public:
1183 std::vector<Snowflake> roles{};///< The Guild roles that they have.
1184 Permissions permissions{};///< Their base-level Permissions in the Guild.
1185 TimeStamp joinedAt{ "" };///< When they joined the Guild.
1186 StringWrapper userAvatar{};///< This GuildMember's User Avatar.
1187 StringWrapper userName{};///< This GuildMember's UserName.
1188 Snowflake guildId{};///< The current Guild's id.
1189 StringWrapper nick{};///< Their nick/display name.
1190 int8_t flags{ 0 };///< GuildMember flags.
1191
1192 GuildMemberData() = default;
1193
1194 GuildMemberData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1195 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1196 return *this;
1197 }
1198
1199 GuildMemberData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1200 *this = jsonObjectData;
1201 }
1202
1203 void insertUser(UserData theUser);
1204
1205 virtual ~GuildMemberData() = default;
1206
1207 protected:
1208 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildMemberData* pDataStructure) {
1209 if (jsonObjectData.contains("roles") && !jsonObjectData["roles"].is_null()) {
1210 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["roles"].get<std::vector<std::string>>()) {
1211 pDataStructure->roles.push_back(stoull(value));
1212 }
1213 }
1214
1215 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permissions") && !jsonObjectData["permissions"].is_null()) {
1216 pDataStructure->permissions = jsonObjectData["permissions"].get<std::string>();
1217 }
1218
1219 if (jsonObjectData.contains("joined_at") && !jsonObjectData["joined_at"].is_null()) {
1220 pDataStructure->joinedAt = jsonObjectData["joined_at"].get<std::string>();
1221 }
1222
1223 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
1224 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
1225 }
1226
1227 if (jsonObjectData.contains("nick") && !jsonObjectData["nick"].is_null()) {
1228 pDataStructure->nick = jsonObjectData["nick"].get<std::string>();
1229 }
1230
1231 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
1232 UserData theUser{ jsonObjectData["user"] };
1233 this->insertUser(theUser);
1234 pDataStructure->id = theUser.id;
1235 pDataStructure->userAvatar = theUser.avatar;
1236 pDataStructure->userName = theUser.userName;
1237 }
1238
1239 if (jsonObjectData.contains("flags") && !jsonObjectData["flags"].is_null()) {
1240 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["flags"].get<int8_t>();
1241 }
1242
1243 if (jsonObjectData.contains("pending") && !jsonObjectData["pending"].is_null()) {
1244 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildMemberFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildMemberFlags::Pending, jsonObjectData["pending"].get<bool>());
1245 }
1246
1247 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mute") && !jsonObjectData["mute"].is_null()) {
1248 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildMemberFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildMemberFlags::Mute, jsonObjectData["mute"].get<bool>());
1249 }
1250
1251 if (jsonObjectData.contains("deaf") && !jsonObjectData["deaf"].is_null()) {
1252 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildMemberFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildMemberFlags::Deaf, jsonObjectData["deaf"].get<bool>());
1253 }
1254 }
1255 };
1256
1257 /// Voice state data. \brief Voice state data.
1258 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll VoiceStateData : public DataParser<VoiceStateData> {
1259 TimeStamp requestToSpeakTimestamp{ "" };///< The time at which the User requested to speak.
1260 GuildMemberData member{};///< The Guild member id this voice state is for.
1261 StringWrapper sessionId{};///< The session id for this voice state.
1262 bool selfStream{ false };///< Whether this User is streaming using "Go Live".
1263 bool selfVideo{ false };///< Whether this User's camera is enabled.
1264 bool selfDeaf{ false };///< Whether this User is locally deafened.
1265 bool selfMute{ false };///< Whether this User is locally muted.
1266 bool suppress{ false };///< Whether this User is muted by the current User.
1267 Snowflake channelId{};///< The Channel id this User is connected to.
1268 bool deaf{ false };///< Whether this User is deafened by the server.
1269 bool mute{ false };///< Whether this User is muted by the server.
1270 Snowflake guildId{};///< The Guild id this voice state is for.
1271 Snowflake userId{};///< The User id this voice state is for.
1272
1273 VoiceStateData() = default;
1274
1275 VoiceStateData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1276 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1277 return *this;
1278 }
1279
1280 VoiceStateData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1281 *this = jsonObjectData;
1282 }
1283
1284 virtual ~VoiceStateData() = default;
1285
1286 protected:
1287 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, VoiceStateData* pDataStructure) {
1288 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
1289 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
1290 }
1291
1292 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
1293 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
1294 }
1295
1296 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user_id") && !jsonObjectData["user_id"].is_null()) {
1297 pDataStructure->userId = stoull(jsonObjectData["user_id"].get<std::string>());
1298 }
1299
1300 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
1301 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
1302 }
1303
1304 if (jsonObjectData.contains("session_id") && !jsonObjectData["session_id"].is_null()) {
1305 pDataStructure->sessionId = jsonObjectData["session_id"].get<std::string>();
1306 }
1307
1308 if (jsonObjectData.contains("deaf") && !jsonObjectData["deaf"].is_null()) {
1309 pDataStructure->deaf = jsonObjectData["deaf"].get<bool>();
1310 }
1311
1312 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mute") && !jsonObjectData["mute"].is_null()) {
1313 pDataStructure->mute = jsonObjectData["mute"].get<bool>();
1314 }
1315
1316 if (jsonObjectData.contains("self_deaf") && !jsonObjectData["self_deaf"].is_null()) {
1317 pDataStructure->selfDeaf = jsonObjectData["self_deaf"].get<bool>();
1318 }
1319
1320 if (jsonObjectData.contains("self_mute") && !jsonObjectData["self_mute"].is_null()) {
1321 pDataStructure->selfMute = jsonObjectData["self_mute"].get<bool>();
1322 }
1323
1324 if (jsonObjectData.contains("self_stream") && !jsonObjectData["self_stream"].is_null()) {
1325 pDataStructure->selfStream = jsonObjectData["self_stream"].get<bool>();
1326 }
1327
1328 if (jsonObjectData.contains("self_video") && !jsonObjectData["self_video"].is_null()) {
1329 pDataStructure->selfVideo = jsonObjectData["self_video"].get<bool>();
1330 }
1331
1332 if (jsonObjectData.contains("suppress") && !jsonObjectData["suppress"].is_null()) {
1333 pDataStructure->suppress = jsonObjectData["suppress"].get<bool>();
1334 }
1335
1336 if (jsonObjectData.contains("request_to_speak_timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["request_to_speak_timestamp"].is_null()) {
1337 pDataStructure->requestToSpeakTimestamp = jsonObjectData["request_to_speak_timestamp"].get<std::string>();
1338 }
1339 }
1340 };
1341
1342 /// Permission overwrites types. \brief Permission overwrites types.
1343 enum class PermissionOverwritesType : int8_t {
1344 Role = 0,///< Role.
1345 User = 1///< User.
1346 };
1347
1348 /// A Permission overwrite, for a given Channel. \brief A Permission overwrite, for a given Channel.
1349 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll OverWriteData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<OverWriteData> {
1350 public:
1351 PermissionOverwritesType type{};///< Role or User type.
1352 Snowflake channelId{};///< Channel id for which Channel this overwrite belongs to.
1353 Permissions allow{};///< Collection of Permissions to allow.
1354 Permissions deny{};///< Collection of Permissions to deny.
1355
1356 OverWriteData() = default;
1357
1358 OverWriteData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1359 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1360 return *this;
1361 }
1362
1363 OverWriteData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1364 *this = jsonObjectData;
1365 }
1366
1367 virtual ~OverWriteData() = default;
1368
1369 protected:
1370 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, OverWriteData* pDataStructure) {
1371 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
1372 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<PermissionOverwritesType>();
1373 }
1374
1375 if (jsonObjectData.contains("allow") && !jsonObjectData["allow"].is_null()) {
1376 pDataStructure->allow = jsonObjectData["allow"].get<std::string>();
1377 }
1378
1379 if (jsonObjectData.contains("deny") && !jsonObjectData["deny"].is_null()) {
1380 pDataStructure->deny = jsonObjectData["deny"].get<std::string>();
1381 }
1382
1383 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1384 if (jsonObjectData["id"].is_string()) {
1385 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1386 } else {
1387 pDataStructure->id = jsonObjectData["id"].get<int64_t>();
1388 }
1389 }
1390 }
1391 };
1392
1393 enum class ChannelFlags : int8_t { NSFW = 1 << 0 };
1394
1395 /// Data structure representing a single Channel. \brief Data structure representing a single Channel.
1396 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ChannelData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ChannelData> {
1397 public:
1398 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, OverWriteData> permissionOverwrites{};///< Permission overwrites for the given Channel.
1399 ChannelType type{ ChannelType::Dm };///< The type of the Channel.
1400 int32_t memberCount{ 0 };///< Count of members active in the Channel.
1401 int32_t position{ 0 };///< The position of the Channel, in the Guild's Channel list.
1402 StringWrapper name{};///< Name of the Channel.
1403 Snowflake parentId{};///< Id of the Channel's parent Channel/category.
1404 Snowflake ownerId{};///< Id of the Channel's owner.
1405 Snowflake guildId{};///< Id of the Channel's Guild, if applicable.
1406 int8_t flags{ 0 };///< Channel flags combined as a bitfield.
1407
1408 ChannelData() = default;
1409
1410 ChannelData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1411 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1412 return *this;
1413 }
1414
1415 ChannelData(const nlohmann::json& other) {
1416 *this = other;
1417 }
1418
1419 virtual ~ChannelData() = default;
1420
1421 protected:
1422 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ChannelData* pDataStructure) {
1423 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1424 if (jsonObjectData["id"].is_string()) {
1425 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1426 } else {
1427 pDataStructure->id = jsonObjectData["id"].get<int64_t>();
1428 }
1429 }
1430
1431 if (jsonObjectData.contains("flags") && !jsonObjectData["flags"].is_null()) {
1432 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["flags"].get<int8_t>();
1433 }
1434
1435 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
1436 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ChannelType>();
1437 }
1438
1439 if (jsonObjectData.contains("parent_id") && !jsonObjectData["parent_id"].is_null()) {
1440 pDataStructure->parentId = stoull(jsonObjectData["parent_id"].get<std::string>());
1441 }
1442
1443 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
1444 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
1445 }
1446
1447 if (jsonObjectData.contains("position") && !jsonObjectData["position"].is_null()) {
1448 pDataStructure->position = jsonObjectData["position"].get<int32_t>();
1449 }
1450
1451 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permission_overwrites") && !jsonObjectData["permission_overwrites"].is_null()) {
1452 pDataStructure->permissionOverwrites.clear();
1453 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["permission_overwrites"]) {
1454 OverWriteData newData{ value };
1455 Snowflake overWriteId = newData.id;
1456 pDataStructure->permissionOverwrites[overWriteId] = newData;
1457 }
1458 }
1459
1460 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
1461 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
1462 }
1463
1464 if (jsonObjectData.contains("nsfw") && !jsonObjectData["nsfw"].is_null()) {
1465 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, ChannelFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, ChannelFlags::NSFW, jsonObjectData["nsfw"].get<bool>());
1466 }
1467
1468 if (jsonObjectData.contains("owner_id") && !jsonObjectData["owner_id"].is_null()) {
1469 pDataStructure->ownerId = stoull(jsonObjectData["owner_id"].get<std::string>());
1470 }
1471
1472 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member_count") && !jsonObjectData["member_count"].is_null()) {
1473 pDataStructure->memberCount = jsonObjectData["member_count"].get<int32_t>();
1474 }
1475 }
1476 };
1477
1478
1479 /// Data representing an active Thread. \brief Data representing an active Thread.
1480 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ActiveThreadsData : public DataParser<ActiveThreadsData> {
1481 std::vector<ThreadMemberData> members{};
1482 std::vector<ChannelData> threads{};
1483 bool hasMore{ false };
1484
1485 ActiveThreadsData() = default;
1486
1487 ActiveThreadsData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1488 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1489 return *this;
1490 }
1491
1492 ActiveThreadsData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1493 *this = jsonObjectData;
1494 }
1495
1496 virtual ~ActiveThreadsData() = default;
1497
1498 protected:
1499 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ActiveThreadsData* pDataStructure) {
1500 if (jsonObjectData.contains("threads") && !jsonObjectData["threads"].is_null()) {
1501 pDataStructure->threads.clear();
1502 pDataStructure->threads.reserve(jsonObjectData["threads"].size());
1503 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["threads"]) {
1504 ChannelData newData{ value };
1505 pDataStructure->threads.push_back(newData);
1506 }
1507 pDataStructure->threads.shrink_to_fit();
1508 }
1509
1510 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members") && !jsonObjectData["members"].is_null()) {
1511 pDataStructure->members.clear();
1512 pDataStructure->members.reserve(jsonObjectData["members"].size());
1513 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["members"]) {
1514 ThreadMemberData newData{};
1515 pDataStructure->members.push_back(newData);
1516 }
1517 pDataStructure->members.shrink_to_fit();
1518 }
1519
1520 if (jsonObjectData.contains("has_more") && !jsonObjectData["has_more"].is_null()) {
1521 pDataStructure->hasMore = jsonObjectData["has_more"].get<bool>();
1522 }
1523 }
1524 };
1525
1526 /// Data representing an archived Thread. \brief Data representing an archived Thread.
1527 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ArchivedThreadsData : public DataParser<ArchivedThreadsData> {
1528 std::vector<ThreadMemberData> members{};
1529 std::vector<ChannelData> threads{};
1530 bool hasMore{ false };
1531
1532 ArchivedThreadsData() = default;
1533
1534 ArchivedThreadsData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1535 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1536 return *this;
1537 }
1538
1539 ArchivedThreadsData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1540 *this = jsonObjectData;
1541 }
1542
1543 virtual ~ArchivedThreadsData() = default;
1544
1545 protected:
1546 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ArchivedThreadsData* pDataStructure) {
1547 if (jsonObjectData.contains("threads") && !jsonObjectData["threads"].is_null()) {
1548 pDataStructure->threads.clear();
1549 pDataStructure->threads.reserve(jsonObjectData["threads"].size());
1550 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["threads"]) {
1551 ChannelData newData{ value };
1552 pDataStructure->threads.push_back(newData);
1553 }
1554 pDataStructure->threads.shrink_to_fit();
1555 }
1556
1557 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members") && !jsonObjectData["members"].is_null()) {
1558 pDataStructure->members.clear();
1559 pDataStructure->members.reserve(jsonObjectData["members"].size());
1560 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["members"]) {
1561 ThreadMemberData newData{ value };
1562 pDataStructure->members.push_back(newData);
1563 }
1564 pDataStructure->members.shrink_to_fit();
1565 }
1566
1567 if (jsonObjectData.contains("has_more") && !jsonObjectData["has_more"].is_null()) {
1568 pDataStructure->hasMore = jsonObjectData["has_more"].get<bool>();
1569 }
1570 }
1571 };
1572
1573 enum class RoleFlags : int8_t { Mentionable = 1 << 0, Managed = 1 << 1, Hoist = 1 << 2 };
1574
1575 /// Data structure representing a single Role. \brief Data structure representing a single Role.
1576 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll RoleData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<RoleData> {
1577 public:
1578 StringWrapper unicodeEmoji{};///< Emoji representing the Role.
1579 Permissions permissions{};///< The Role's base Guild Permissions.
1580 int32_t position{ 0 };///< Its position amongst the rest of the Guild's roles.
1581 StringWrapper name{};///< The Role's name.
1582 int32_t color{ 0 };///< The Role's color.
1583 int8_t flags{ 0 };///< Role flags.
1584
1585 RoleData() = default;
1586
1587 RoleData& operator=(const nlohmann ::json& jsonObjectData) {
1588 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1589 return *this;
1590 }
1591
1592 RoleData(const nlohmann ::json& jsonObjectData) {
1593 *this = jsonObjectData;
1594 }
1595
1596 virtual ~RoleData() = default;
1597
1598 protected:
1599 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, RoleData* pDataStructure) {
1600 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1601 if (jsonObjectData["id"].is_string()) {
1602 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1603 } else {
1604 pDataStructure->id = jsonObjectData["id"].get<int64_t>();
1605 }
1606 }
1607
1608 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
1609 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
1610 }
1611
1612 if (jsonObjectData.contains("unicode_emoji") && !jsonObjectData["unicode_emoji"].is_null()) {
1613 std::stringstream theStream{};
1614 theStream << jsonObjectData["unicode_emoji"] << std::endl;
1615 for (auto& value: theStream.str()) {
1616 pDataStructure->unicodeEmoji.push_back(value);
1617 }
1618 pDataStructure->unicodeEmoji = static_cast<std::string>(pDataStructure->unicodeEmoji).substr(1, pDataStructure->unicodeEmoji.size() - 3);
1619 }
1620
1621 if (jsonObjectData.contains("color") && !jsonObjectData["color"].is_null()) {
1622 pDataStructure->color = jsonObjectData["color"].get<int32_t>();
1623 }
1624
1625 if (jsonObjectData.contains("hoist") && !jsonObjectData["hoist"].is_null()) {
1626 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, RoleFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, RoleFlags::Hoist, jsonObjectData["hoist"].get<bool>());
1627 }
1628
1629 if (jsonObjectData.contains("managed") && !jsonObjectData["managed"].is_null()) {
1630 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, RoleFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, RoleFlags::Managed, jsonObjectData["managed"].get<bool>());
1631 }
1632
1633 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mentionable") && !jsonObjectData["mentionable"].is_null()) {
1634 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, RoleFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, RoleFlags::Mentionable, jsonObjectData["mentionable"].get<bool>());
1635 }
1636
1637 if (jsonObjectData.contains("position") && !jsonObjectData["position"].is_null()) {
1638 pDataStructure->position = jsonObjectData["position"].get<int32_t>();
1639 }
1640
1641 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permissions") && !jsonObjectData["permissions"].is_null()) {
1642 pDataStructure->permissions = jsonObjectData["permissions"].get<std::string>();
1643 }
1644 }
1645 };
1646
1647 /// Application command-option types. \brief Application command-option types.
1648 enum class ApplicationCommandOptionType : int8_t {
1649 Sub_Command = 1,///< Sub-command.
1650 Sub_Command_Group = 2,///< Sub-command group.
1651 String = 3,///< String.
1652 Integer = 4,///< Integer.
1653 Boolean = 5,///< Boolean.
1654 User = 6,///< User.
1655 Channel = 7,///< Channel.
1656 Role = 8,///< Role.
1657 Mentionable = 9,///< Mentionable.
1658 Number = 10,///< Number.
1659 Attachment = 11///< Attachment.
1660 };
1661
1662 /// Application command permission-types. \brief Application command permission-types.
1663 enum class ApplicationCommandPermissionType : int8_t {
1664 Role = 1,///< Role.
1665 User = 2,///< User.
1666 Channel = 3///< Channel.
1667 };
1668
1669 /// Event types for auto-moderation. \brief Event types for auto-moderation.
1670 enum class EventType : int8_t {
1671 Message_Send = 1,///< When a member sends or edits a message in the guild.
1672 };
1673
1674 /// Trigger types for auto-moderation. \brief Trigger types for auto-moderation.
1675 enum class TriggerType : int8_t {
1676 Keyword = 1,///< Check if content contains words from a user defined list of keywords.
1677 Harmful_Link = 2,///< Check if content contains any harmful links.
1678 Spam = 3,///< Check if content represents generic spam.
1679 Keyword_Preset = 4///< Check if content contains words from internal pre-defined wordsets.
1680 };
1681
1682 /// Keyword preset types for auto-moderation. \brief Keyword preset types for auto-moderation.
1683 enum class KeywordPresetType : int8_t {
1684 Profanity = 1,///< Words that may be considered forms of swearing or cursing.
1685 Sexual_Content = 2,///< Words that refer to sexually explicit behavior or activity
1686 Slurs = 3///< Personal insults or words that may be considered hate speech.
1687 };
1688
1689 /// Action types for auto-moderation. \brief Action types for auto-moderation.
1690 enum class ActionType : int8_t {
1691 Block_Message = 1,///< Blocks the content of a message according to the rule.
1692 Send_Alert_Message = 2,///< Logs user content to a specified channel.
1693 Timeout = 3///< Timeout user for a specified duration.
1694 };
1695
1696 /// Action metadata for auto-moderation-rules. \brief Action metadata for auto-moderation-rules.
1697 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ActionMetaData : public DataParser<ActionMetaData> {
1698 Snowflake channelId{};///< Channel to which user content should be logged.
1699 int64_t durationSeconds{};///< Timeout duration in seconds.
1700
1701 ActionMetaData() = default;
1702
1703 ActionMetaData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1704 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1705 return *this;
1706 }
1707
1708 ActionMetaData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1709 *this = jsonObjectData;
1710 }
1711
1712 virtual ~ActionMetaData() = default;
1713
1714 protected:
1715 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ActionMetaData* pDataStructure) {
1716 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
1717 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
1718 }
1719
1720 if (jsonObjectData.contains("duration_seconds") && !jsonObjectData["duration_seconds"].is_null()) {
1721 pDataStructure->durationSeconds = jsonObjectData["duration_seconds"].get<int64_t>();
1722 }
1723 }
1724 };
1725
1726 /// Trigger metadata for auto-moderation-rules. \brief Trigger metadata for auto-moderation-rules.
1727 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll TriggerMetaData : public DataParser<TriggerMetaData> {
1728 std::vector<std::string> keywordFilter{};///< Substrings which will be searched for in content.
1729 std::vector<KeywordPresetType> presets{};///< The internally pre-defined wordsets which will be searched for in content.
1730
1731 TriggerMetaData() = default;
1732
1733 TriggerMetaData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1734 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1735 return *this;
1736 }
1737
1738 TriggerMetaData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1739 *this = jsonObjectData;
1740 }
1741
1742 virtual ~TriggerMetaData() = default;
1743
1744 protected:
1745 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, TriggerMetaData* pDataStructure) {
1746 if (jsonObjectData.contains("keyword_filter") && !jsonObjectData["keyword_filter"].is_null()) {
1747 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["keyword_filter"]) {
1748 pDataStructure->keywordFilter.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
1749 }
1750 }
1751
1752 if (jsonObjectData.contains("presets") && !jsonObjectData["presets"].is_null()) {
1753 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["presets"]) {
1754 pDataStructure->presets.push_back(static_cast<KeywordPresetType>(value.get<uint64_t>()));
1755 }
1756 }
1757 }
1758 };
1759
1760 /// For representing a single auto-moderation-rule-action. \brief For representing a single auto-moderation-rule-action.
1761 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ActionData : public DataParser<ActionData> {
1762 ActionType type{};///< The type of action.
1763 ActionMetaData metadata{};///< Additional metadata needed during execution for this specific action type.
1764
1765 ActionData() = default;
1766
1767 ActionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1768 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1769 return *this;
1770 }
1771
1772 ActionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1773 *this = jsonObjectData;
1774 }
1775
1776 virtual ~ActionData() = default;
1777
1778 protected:
1779 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ActionData* pDataStructure) {
1780 if (jsonObjectData.contains("metadata") && !jsonObjectData["metadata"].is_null()) {
1781 pDataStructure->metadata = jsonObjectData["metadata"];
1782 }
1783
1784 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
1785 pDataStructure->type = static_cast<ActionType>(jsonObjectData["type"].get<int64_t>());
1786 }
1787 }
1788 };
1789
1790 /// Represents an auto-moderation-rule. \brief Represents an auto-moderation-rule.
1791 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AutoModerationRuleData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<AutoModerationRuleData> {
1792 public:
1793 std::vector<Snowflake> exemptChannels{};///< The channel ids that should not be affected by the rule(Maximum of 50).
1794 std::vector<Snowflake> exemptRoles{};///< The role ids that should not be affected by the rule(Maximum of 20).
1795 std::vector<ActionData> actions{};///< Actions which will execute when the rule is triggered.
1796 TriggerMetaData triggerMetaData{};///< The rule trigger metadata actions array of action objects the.
1797 TriggerType triggerType{};///< The rule trigger type.
1798 EventType eventType{};///< The rule event type.
1799 Snowflake creatorId{};///< The user which first created this rule.
1800 Snowflake guildId{};///< The guild which this rule belongs to.
1801 std::string name{};///< The rule name.
1802 bool enabled{};///< Whether the rule is enabled.
1803
1804 AutoModerationRuleData() = default;
1805
1806 AutoModerationRuleData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1807 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1808 return *this;
1809 }
1810
1811 AutoModerationRuleData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1812 *this = jsonObjectData;
1813 }
1814
1815 virtual ~AutoModerationRuleData() = default;
1816
1817 protected:
1818 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AutoModerationRuleData* pDataStructure) {
1819 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
1820 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
1821 }
1822
1823 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1824 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1825 }
1826
1827 if (jsonObjectData.contains("enabled") && !jsonObjectData["enabled"].is_null()) {
1828 pDataStructure->enabled = jsonObjectData["enabled"].get<bool>();
1829 }
1830
1831 if (jsonObjectData.contains("trigger_type") && !jsonObjectData["trigger_type"].is_null()) {
1832 pDataStructure->triggerType = static_cast<TriggerType>(jsonObjectData["trigger_type"].get<uint64_t>());
1833 }
1834
1835 if (jsonObjectData.contains("event_type") && !jsonObjectData["event_type"].is_null()) {
1836 pDataStructure->eventType = static_cast<EventType>(jsonObjectData["event_type"].get<uint64_t>());
1837 }
1838
1839 if (jsonObjectData.contains("creator_id") && !jsonObjectData["creator_id"].is_null()) {
1840 pDataStructure->creatorId = jsonObjectData["creator_id"].get<Snowflake>();
1841 }
1842
1843 if (jsonObjectData.contains("actions") && !jsonObjectData["actions"].is_null()) {
1844 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["actions"]) {
1845 ActionData newData{ value };
1846 pDataStructure->actions.push_back(newData);
1847 }
1848 }
1849
1850 if (jsonObjectData.contains("exempt_roles") && !jsonObjectData["exempt_roles"].is_null()) {
1851 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["exempt_roles"]) {
1852 pDataStructure->exemptRoles.push_back(value.get<Snowflake>());
1853 }
1854 }
1855
1856 if (jsonObjectData.contains("trigger_metadata") && !jsonObjectData["trigger_metadata"].is_null()) {
1857 pDataStructure->triggerMetaData = jsonObjectData["trigger_metadata"];
1858 }
1859
1860 if (jsonObjectData.contains("exempt_channels") && !jsonObjectData["exempt_channels"].is_null()) {
1861 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["exempt_channels"]) {
1862 pDataStructure->exemptChannels.push_back(value.get<Snowflake>());
1863 }
1864 }
1865
1866 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
1867 pDataStructure->guildId = jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<Snowflake>();
1868 }
1869 }
1870 };
1871
1872 /// Permissions data for an ApplicationCommand. \brief Permissions data for an ApplicationCommand.
1873 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationCommandPermissionData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ApplicationCommandPermissionData> {
1874 public:

1876 bool permission{ false };///< Whether the Permission is active or not.

1878 ApplicationCommandPermissionData() = default;
1879
1880 ApplicationCommandPermissionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1881 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1882 return *this;
1883 }
1884
1885 ApplicationCommandPermissionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1886 *this = jsonObjectData;
1887 }
1888 virtual ~ApplicationCommandPermissionData() = default;
1889
1890 protected:
1891 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationCommandPermissionData* pDataStructure) {
1892 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1893 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1894 }
1895
1896 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permission") && !jsonObjectData["permission"].is_null()) {
1897 pDataStructure->permission = jsonObjectData["permission"].get<bool>();
1898 }
1899
1900 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
1901 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ApplicationCommandPermissionType>();
1902 }
1903 }
1904 };

1906 /// Represents the Permissions for accessing an ApplicationCommand from within a Guild. \brief Represents the Permissions for accessing an ApplicationCommand from within a Guild.
1907 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData> {
1908 public:
1909 std::vector<ApplicationCommandPermissionData> permissions{};///< The Permissions.
1910 Snowflake applicationId{};///< The application's id.
1911 Snowflake guildId{};///< The Guild's id.
1912
1913 GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData() = default;
1914
1915 GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1916 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1917 return *this;
1918 }
1919
1920 GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1921 *this = jsonObjectData;
1922 }
1923
1924 virtual ~GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData() = default;
1925
1926 protected:
1927 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildApplicationCommandPermissionsData* pDataStructure) {
1928 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
1929 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
1930 }
1931
1932 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application_id") && !jsonObjectData["application_id"].is_null()) {
1933 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["application_id"].get<std::string>());
1934 }
1935
1936 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
1937 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
1938 }
1939
1940 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permissions") && !jsonObjectData["permissions"].is_null()) {
1941 pDataStructure->permissions.clear();
1942 pDataStructure->permissions.reserve(jsonObjectData["permissions"].size());
1943 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["permissions"]) {
1944 ApplicationCommandPermissionData newData{ value };
1945 pDataStructure->permissions.push_back(newData);
1946 }
1947 pDataStructure->permissions.shrink_to_fit();
1948 }
1949 }
1950 };
1951

1980 /// Data structure representing a single emoji. \brief Data structure representing a single emoji.
1981 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EmojiData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<EmojiData> {
1982 public:
1983 std::wstring unicodeName{ L"" };///< What is its unicode name?
1984 std::vector<RoleData> roles{};///< Roles that are allowed to use this emoji.
1985 bool requireColons{ false };///< Require colons to render it?
1986 bool available{ true };///< Is it available to be used?
1987 bool animated{ false };///< Is it animated?
1988 bool managed{ false };///< Is it managed?
1989 StringWrapper name{};///< What is its name?
1990 UserData user{};///< User that created this emoji.
1991
1992 EmojiData() = default;
1993
1994 EmojiData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
1995 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
1996 return *this;
1997 }
1998
1999 EmojiData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2000 *this = jsonObjectData;
2001 }
2002
2003 virtual ~EmojiData() = default;
2004
2005 protected:
2006 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, EmojiData* pDataStructure) {
2007 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
2008 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
2009 }
2010
2011 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
2012 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
2013 }
2014
2015 if (jsonObjectData.contains("roles") && !jsonObjectData["roles"].is_null()) {
2016 pDataStructure->roles.clear();
2017 pDataStructure->roles.reserve(jsonObjectData["roles"].size());
2018 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["roles"]) {
2019 RoleData newData{ value };
2020 pDataStructure->roles.push_back(newData);
2021 }
2022 pDataStructure->roles.shrink_to_fit();
2023 }
2024
2025 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
2026 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
2027 }
2028
2029 if (jsonObjectData.contains("require_colons") && !jsonObjectData["require_colons"].is_null()) {
2030 pDataStructure->requireColons = jsonObjectData["require_colons"].get<bool>();
2031 }
2032
2033 if (jsonObjectData.contains("managed") && !jsonObjectData["managed"].is_null()) {
2034 pDataStructure->managed = jsonObjectData["managed"].get<bool>();
2035 }
2036
2037 if (jsonObjectData.contains("animated") && !jsonObjectData["animated"].is_null()) {
2038 pDataStructure->animated = jsonObjectData["animated"].get<bool>();
2039 }
2040
2041 if (jsonObjectData.contains("available") && !jsonObjectData["available"].is_null()) {
2042 pDataStructure->available = jsonObjectData["available"].get<bool>();
2043 }
2044 }
2045 };

2081 int32_t bitrate{ 48000 };

2092 /// Data structure representing a single reaction. \brief/// Data structure representing a single reaction.
2093 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ReactionData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ReactionData> {
2094 public:
2095 GuildMemberData member{};///< The GuildMember who placed the reaction.
2096 Snowflake channelId{};///< The id of the Channel where it was placed.
2097 Snowflake messageId{};///< The id of the Message upon which it was placed.
2098 Snowflake guildId{};///< The id of the Guild where it was placed.
2099 int32_t count{ 0 };///< The number of times this particular emoji was placed as a reaction to the given Message.
2100 EmojiData emoji{};///< The emoji that was placed as a reaction.
2101 Snowflake userId{};///< The id of the User who placed the reaction.
2102 bool me{ false };///< Whether or not I (The bot) placed it.
2103
2104 ReactionData() = default;
2105
2106 ReactionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2107 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2108 return *this;
2109 }
2110
2111 ReactionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2112 *this = jsonObjectData;
2113 }
2114
2115 virtual ~ReactionData() = default;
2116
2117 protected:
2118 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ReactionData* pDataStructure) {
2119 if (jsonObjectData.contains("count") && !jsonObjectData["count"].is_null()) {
2120 pDataStructure->count = jsonObjectData["count"].get<int32_t>();
2121 }
2122
2123 if (jsonObjectData.contains("me") && !jsonObjectData["me"].is_null()) {
2124 pDataStructure->count = jsonObjectData["me"].get<bool>();
2125 }
2126
2127 if (jsonObjectData.contains("emoji") && !jsonObjectData["emoji"].is_null()) {
2128 pDataStructure->emoji = jsonObjectData["emoji"];
2129 }
2130
2131 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
2132 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
2133 }
2134
2135 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
2136 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
2137 }
2138
2139 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user_id") && !jsonObjectData["user_id"].is_null()) {
2140 pDataStructure->userId = stoull(jsonObjectData["user_id"].get<std::string>());
2141 }
2142
2143 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message_id") && !jsonObjectData["message_id"].is_null()) {
2144 pDataStructure->messageId = stoull(jsonObjectData["message_id"].get<std::string>());
2145 }
2146
2147 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
2148 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
2149 }
2150 }
2151 };

2182 }
2183

2186 }

2190 }
2191

2354 }
2355
2356 if (jsonObjectData.contains("team_id") && !jsonObjectData["team_id"].is_null()) {
2357 pDataStructure->teamId = jsonObjectData["team_id"].get<std::string>();
2358 }
2359
2360 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permissions") && !jsonObjectData["permissions"].is_null()) {

2363 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["permissions"]) {

2365 }

2371 }
