2375 /// For updating the current voice state. \brief For updating the current voice state.
2376 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll UpdateVoiceStateData {
2377 bool selfMute{ false };///< Whether or not we self-mute ourselves.
2378 bool selfDeaf{ false };///< Whether or not we self-deafen ourselves.
2379 Snowflake channelId{};///< Id of the desired voice Channel. Leave blank to disconnect.
2380 Snowflake guildId{};///< The id of the Guild fo which we would like to establish a voice connection.
2381
2382 operator nlohmann::json() {
2383 nlohmann::json data{};
2384 if (this->channelId == 0) {
2385 data["d"]["channel_id"] = nullptr;
2386 } else {
2387 data["d"]["channel_id"] = std::to_string(this->channelId);
2388 }
2389 data["d"]["self_deaf"] = this->selfDeaf;
2390 data["d"]["self_mute"] = this->selfMute;
2391 data["d"]["guild_id"] = std::to_string(this->guildId);
2392 data["op"] = 4;
2393 return data;
2394 }
2395 };
2396
2397 /// Team object data. \brief Team object data.
2398 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll TeamObjectData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<TeamObjectData> {
2399 public:
2400 std::vector<TeamMembersObjectData> members{};///< Array of team members object data.
2401 std::string ownerUserId{};///< User id of the team owner.
2402 std::string icon{};///< Icon for the team.
2403
2404 TeamObjectData() = default;
2405
2406 TeamObjectData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2407 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2408 return *this;
2409 }
2410
2411 TeamObjectData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2412 *this = jsonObjectData;
2413 }
2414
2415 virtual ~TeamObjectData() = default;
2416
2417 protected:
2418 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, TeamObjectData* pDataStructure) {
2419 if (jsonObjectData.contains("icon") && !jsonObjectData["icon"].is_null()) {
2420 pDataStructure->icon = jsonObjectData["icon"].get<std::string>();
2421 }
2422
2423 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
2424 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
2425 }
2426
2427 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members") && !jsonObjectData["members"].is_null()) {
2428 pDataStructure->members.clear();
2429 pDataStructure->members.reserve(jsonObjectData["members"].size());
2430 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["members"]) {
2431 TeamMembersObjectData newData{ value };
2432 pDataStructure->members.push_back(newData);
2433 }
2434 pDataStructure->members.shrink_to_fit();
2435 }
2436
2437 if (jsonObjectData.contains("owner_user_id") && !jsonObjectData["owner_user_id"].is_null()) {
2438 pDataStructure->ownerUserId = jsonObjectData["owner_user_id"].get<std::string>();
2439 }
2440 }
2441 };
2442
2443 /// Application flags, for the ApplicationData structure.
2444 enum class ApplicationFlags : int32_t {
2445 Gateway_Presence = 1 << 12,///< Intent required for bots in 100 or more servers to receive presence_update events.
2446 Gateway_Presence_Limited = 1 << 13,///< Intent required for bots in under 100 servers to receive presence_update events, found in Bot Settings.
2447 Gateway_Guild_Members = 1 << 14,///< Intent required for bots in 100 or more servers to receive member-related events like guild_member_add.
2448 Gateway_Guild_Members_Limited = 1 << 15,///< Intent required for bots in under 100 servers to receive member-related events like guild_member_add, found in Bot Settings.
2449 Verificatino_Pending_Guild_Limit = 1 << 16,///< Indicates unusual growth of an app that prevents verification
2450 Embedded = 1 << 17,///< Indicates if an app is embedded within the Discord client (currently unavailable publicly)
2451 Gateway_Message_Content = 1 << 18,///< Intent required for bots in 100 or more servers to receive message content
2452 Gateway_Message_Content_Limited = 1 << 19///< Intent required for bots in under 100 servers to receive message content, found in Bot Settings};
2453 };
2454
2455 /// Install params data, for application data. \brief Install params data, for application data.
2456 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InstallParamsData : public DataParser<InstallParamsData> {
2457 std::vector<std::string> scopes{};///< The scopes to add the application to the server with.
2458 std::string permissions{};///< The permissions to request for the bot role.
2459
2460 InstallParamsData() = default;
2461
2462 InstallParamsData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2463 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2464 return *this;
2465 }
2466
2467 InstallParamsData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2468 *this = jsonObjectData;
2469 }
2470
2471 virtual ~InstallParamsData() = default;
2472
2473 protected:
2474 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, InstallParamsData* pDataStructure) {
2475 if (jsonObjectData.contains("scopes") && !jsonObjectData["scopes"].is_null()) {
2476 pDataStructure->scopes = jsonObjectData["scopes"].get<std::vector<std::string>>();
2477 }
2478
2479 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permissions") && !jsonObjectData["permissions"].is_null()) {
2480 pDataStructure->permissions = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
2481 }
2482 }
2483 };
2484
2485 /// Application data. \brief Application data.
2486 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ApplicationData> {
2487 public:
2488 std::vector<std::string> rpcOrigins{};///< Array of RPC origin strings.
2489 bool botRequireCodeGrant{ false };///< Does the bot require a code grant?
2490 std::vector<std::string> tags{};///< Up to 5 tags describing the content and functionality of the application install_params.
2491 std::string termsOfServiceUrl{};///< Terms of service Url.
2492 std::string privacyPolicyUrl{};///< Privacy policy Url.
2493 ApplicationFlags flags{ 0 };///< Application flags.
2494 InstallParamsData params{};///< Settings for the application's default in-app authorization link, if enabled std::string customInstallUrl{};
2495 std::string primarySkuId{};///< Primary SKU Id.
2496 std::string description{};///< Description of the application.
2497 std::string coverImage{};///< The cover image.
2498 bool botPublic{ false };///< Is the bot public?
2499 std::string verifyKey{};///< The verification key.
2500 std::string summary{};///< Summary of the application.
2501 TeamObjectData team{};///< Team object data.
2502 Snowflake guildId{};///< Guild id.
2503 std::string slug{};///< Sluhg.
2504 std::string name{};///< Application's name.
2505 std::string icon{};///< Application's icon.
2506 UserData owner{};///< Application's owner.
2507
2508 ApplicationData() = default;
2509
2510 ApplicationData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2511 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2512 return *this;
2513 }
2514
2515 ApplicationData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2516 *this = jsonObjectData;
2517 }
2518
2519 virtual ~ApplicationData() = default;
2520
2521 protected:
2522 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationData* pDataStructure) {
2523 if (jsonObjectData.contains("params") && !jsonObjectData["params"].is_null()) {
2524 pDataStructure->params = jsonObjectData["params"];
2525 }
2526
2527 if (jsonObjectData.contains("tags") && !jsonObjectData["tags"].is_null()) {
2528 pDataStructure->tags = jsonObjectData["tags"].get<std::vector<std::string>>();
2529 }
2530
2531 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
2532 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
2533 }
2534
2535 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
2536 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
2537 }
2538
2539 if (jsonObjectData.contains("icon") && !jsonObjectData["icon"].is_null()) {
2540 pDataStructure->icon = jsonObjectData["icon"].get<std::string>();
2541 }
2542
2543 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
2544 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
2545 }
2546
2547 if (jsonObjectData.contains("rpc_origins") && !jsonObjectData["rpc_origins"].is_null()) {
2548 pDataStructure->rpcOrigins.clear();
2549 pDataStructure->rpcOrigins.reserve(jsonObjectData["rpc_origins"].size());
2550 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["rpc_origins"]) {
2551 pDataStructure->rpcOrigins.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
2552 }
2553 pDataStructure->rpcOrigins.shrink_to_fit();
2554 }
2555
2556 if (jsonObjectData.contains("bot_public") && !jsonObjectData["bot_public"].is_null()) {
2557 pDataStructure->botPublic = jsonObjectData["bot_public"].get<bool>();
2558 }
2559
2560 if (jsonObjectData.contains("bot_require_code_grant") && !jsonObjectData["bot_require_code_grant"].is_null()) {
2561 pDataStructure->botRequireCodeGrant = jsonObjectData["bot_require_code_grant"].get<bool>();
2562 }
2563
2564 if (jsonObjectData.contains("terms_of_service_url") && !jsonObjectData["terms_of_service_url"].is_null()) {
2565 pDataStructure->termsOfServiceUrl = jsonObjectData["terms_of_service_url"].get<std::string>();
2566 }
2567
2568 if (jsonObjectData.contains("privacy_policy_url") && !jsonObjectData["privacy_policy_url"].is_null()) {
2569 pDataStructure->privacyPolicyUrl = jsonObjectData["privacy_policy_url"].get<std::string>();
2570 }
2571
2572 if (jsonObjectData.contains("owner") && !jsonObjectData["owner"].is_null()) {
2573 pDataStructure->owner = jsonObjectData["owner"];
2574 }
2575
2576 if (jsonObjectData.contains("summary") && !jsonObjectData["summary"].is_null()) {
2577 pDataStructure->summary = jsonObjectData["summary"].get<std::string>();
2578 }
2579
2580 if (jsonObjectData.contains("verify_key") && !jsonObjectData["verify_key"].is_null()) {
2581 pDataStructure->verifyKey = jsonObjectData["verify_key"].get<std::string>();
2582 }
2583
2584 if (jsonObjectData.contains("team") && !jsonObjectData["team"].is_null()) {
2585 pDataStructure->team = jsonObjectData["team"];
2586 }
2587
2588 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
2589 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
2590 }
2591
2592 if (jsonObjectData.contains("primary_sku_id") && !jsonObjectData["primary_sku_id"].is_null()) {
2593 pDataStructure->primarySkuId = jsonObjectData["primary_sku_id"].get<std::string>();
2594 }
2595
2596 if (jsonObjectData.contains("slug") && !jsonObjectData["slug"].is_null()) {
2597 pDataStructure->slug = jsonObjectData["slug"].get<std::string>();
2598 }
2599
2600 if (jsonObjectData.contains("cover_image") && !jsonObjectData["cover_image"].is_null()) {
2601 pDataStructure->coverImage = jsonObjectData["cover_image"].get<std::string>();
2602 }
2603
2604 if (jsonObjectData.contains("flags") && !jsonObjectData["flags"].is_null()) {
2605 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["flags"].get<ApplicationFlags>();
2606 }
2607 }
2608 };
2609
2610 /// Authorization info structure. \brief Authorization info structure.
2611 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AuthorizationInfoData : public DataParser<AuthorizationInfoData> {
2612 std::vector<std::string> scopes{};///< Array of strings - the scopes the User has authorized the application for.
2613 ApplicationData application{};///< Partial application object the current application.
2614 std::string expires{};///< When the access token expires.
2615 UserData user{};/// The User who has authorized, if the User has authorized with the identify scope.
2616
2617 AuthorizationInfoData() = default;
2618
2619 AuthorizationInfoData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2620 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2621 return *this;
2622 }
2623
2624 AuthorizationInfoData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2625 *this = jsonObjectData;
2626 }
2627
2628 virtual ~AuthorizationInfoData() = default;
2629
2630 protected:
2631 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AuthorizationInfoData* pDataStructure) {
2632 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application") && !jsonObjectData["application"].is_null()) {
2633 pDataStructure->application = jsonObjectData["application"];
2634 }
2635
2636 if (jsonObjectData.contains("scopes") && !jsonObjectData["scopes"].is_null()) {
2637 pDataStructure->scopes = jsonObjectData["scopes"].get<std::vector<std::string>>();
2638 }
2639
2640 if (jsonObjectData.contains("expires") && !jsonObjectData["expires"].is_null()) {
2641 pDataStructure->expires = jsonObjectData["expires"];
2642 }
2643
2644 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
2645 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
2646 }
2647 };
2648 };
2649

2717 };

2753 /// Integration data. \brief Integration data.
2754 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll IntegrationData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<IntegrationData> {
2755 public:
2756 int32_t expireGracePeriod{ 0 };///< How int64_t before the integration expires.
2757 ApplicationData application{};///< Application data.
2758 int32_t subscriberCount{ 0 };///< Number of current subscribers.
2759 bool enableEmoticons{ true };///< Emoticons enabled?
2760 int32_t expireBehavior{ 0 };///< What to do upon expiry.
2761 TimeStamp syncedAt{ "" };///< Time it was last synced at.
2762 bool enabled{ false };///< Enabled?
2763 bool syncing{ false };///< Is it syncing?
2764 AccountData account{};///< Account data.
2765 bool revoked{ false };///< Has it been revoked?
2766 std::string name{};///< Name of the integration.
2767 std::string type{};///< Type of integration.
2768 Snowflake roleId{};///< Role Id.
2769 UserData user{};///< User data for the integration.
2770
2771 IntegrationData() = default;
2772
2773 IntegrationData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2774 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2775 return *this;
2776 }
2777
2778 IntegrationData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2779 *this = jsonObjectData;
2780 }
2781
2782 virtual ~IntegrationData() = default;
2783
2784 protected:
2785 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, IntegrationData* pDataStructure) {
2786 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
2787 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
2788 }
2789
2790 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
2791 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
2792 }
2793
2794 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
2795 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<std::string>();
2796 }
2797
2798 if (jsonObjectData.contains("enabled") && !jsonObjectData["enabled"].is_null()) {
2799 pDataStructure->enabled = jsonObjectData["enabled"].get<bool>();
2800 }
2801
2802 if (jsonObjectData.contains("syncing") && !jsonObjectData["syncing"].is_null()) {
2803 pDataStructure->syncing = jsonObjectData["syncing"].get<bool>();
2804 }
2805
2806 if (jsonObjectData.contains("role_id") && !jsonObjectData["role_id"].is_null()) {
2807 pDataStructure->roleId = stoull(jsonObjectData["role_id"].get<std::string>());
2808 }
2809
2810 if (jsonObjectData.contains("enable_emoticons") && !jsonObjectData["enable_emoticons"].is_null()) {
2811 pDataStructure->enableEmoticons = jsonObjectData["enable_emoticons"].get<bool>();
2812 }
2813
2814 if (jsonObjectData.contains("expire_behavior") && !jsonObjectData["expire_behavior"].is_null()) {
2815 pDataStructure->expireBehavior = jsonObjectData["expire_behavior"].get<int32_t>();
2816 }
2817
2818 if (jsonObjectData.contains("expire_grace_period") && !jsonObjectData["expire_grace_period"].is_null()) {
2819 pDataStructure->expireGracePeriod = jsonObjectData["expire_grace_period"].get<int32_t>();
2820 }
2821
2822 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
2823 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
2824 }
2825
2826 if (jsonObjectData.contains("account") && !jsonObjectData["account"].is_null()) {
2827 pDataStructure->account = jsonObjectData["account"];
2828 }
2829
2830 if (jsonObjectData.contains("synced_at") && !jsonObjectData["synced_at"].is_null()) {
2831 pDataStructure->syncedAt = jsonObjectData["synced_at"].get<std::string>();
2832 }
2833
2834 if (jsonObjectData.contains("subscriber_count") && !jsonObjectData["subscriber_count"].is_null()) {
2835 pDataStructure->subscriberCount = jsonObjectData["subscriber_count"].get<int32_t>();
2836 }
2837
2838 if (jsonObjectData.contains("revoked") && !jsonObjectData["revoked"].is_null()) {
2839 pDataStructure->revoked = jsonObjectData["revoked"].get<bool>();
2840 }
2841
2842 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application") && !jsonObjectData["application"].is_null()) {
2843 pDataStructure->application = jsonObjectData["application"];
2844 }
2845 }
2846 };
2847
2848 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll IntegrationDataVector : public DataParser<IntegrationDataVector> {
2849 public:
2850 IntegrationDataVector() = default;
2851
2852 operator std::vector<IntegrationData>() {
2853 return this->theIntegrationDatas;
2854 }
2855
2856 IntegrationDataVector& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2857 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2858 return *this;
2859 }
2860
2861 IntegrationDataVector(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2862 *this = jsonObjectData;
2863 }
2864
2865 virtual ~IntegrationDataVector() = default;
2866
2867 protected:
2868 std::vector<IntegrationData> theIntegrationDatas{};
2869
2870 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, IntegrationDataVector* pDataStructure) {
2871 pDataStructure->theIntegrationDatas.reserve(jsonObjectData.size());
2872 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData) {
2873 DiscordCoreAPI::IntegrationData newData{ value };
2874 pDataStructure->theIntegrationDatas.push_back(newData);
2875 }
2876 pDataStructure->theIntegrationDatas.shrink_to_fit();
2877 }
2878 };
2879
2880 /// Audit log events. \brief Audit log events.
2881 enum class AuditLogEvent : uint8_t {
2882 Guild_Update = 1,///< Guild update.
2883 Channel_Create = 10,///< Channel create.
2884 Channel_Update = 11,///< Channel update.
2885 Channel_Delete = 12,///< Channel delete.
2886 Channel_Overwrite_Create = 13,///< Channel overwrite create.
2887 Channel_Overwrite_Update = 14,///< Channel overwrite update.
2888 Channel_Overwrite_Delete = 15,///< Channel overwrite delete.
2889 Member_Kick = 20,///< Member kick.
2890 Member_Prune = 21,///< Member prune.
2891 Member_Ban_Add = 22,///< Member ban add.
2892 Member_Ban_Remove = 23,///< Member ban remove.
2893 Member_Update = 24,///< Member update.
2894 Member_Role_Update = 25,///< Member role update.
2895 Member_Move = 26,///< Member move.
2896 Member_Disconnect = 27,///< Member disconnect.
2897 Bot_Add = 28,///< Bot add.
2898 Role_Create = 30,///< Role create.
2899 Role_Update = 31,///< Role update.
2900 Role_Delete = 32,///< Role delete.
2901 Invite_Create = 40,///< Invite create.
2902 Invite_Update = 41,///< Invite update.
2903 Invite_Delete = 42,///< Invite delete.
2904 Webhook_Create = 50,///< Webhook create.
2905 Webhook_Update = 51,///< Webhook update.
2906 Webhook_Delete = 52,///< Webhook delete.
2907 Emoji_Create = 60,///< Emoji create.
2908 Emoji_Update = 61,///< Emoji update.
2909 Emoji_Delete = 62,///< Emoji delete.
2910 Message_Delete = 72,///< Message delete.
2911 Message_Bulk_Delete = 73,///< Message bulk delete.
2912 Message_Pin = 74,///< Message pin.
2913 Message_Unpin = 75,///< Message unpin.
2914 Integration_Create = 80,///< Integration create.
2915 Integration_Update = 81,///< Integration update.
2916 Integration_Delete = 82,///< Integration delete.
2917 Stage_Instance_Create = 83,///< Stage-Instance create.
2918 Stage_Instance_Update = 84,///< Stage-Instance update.
2919 Stage_Instance_Delete = 85,///< Stage-Instance delete.
2920 Sticker_Create = 90,///< Sticker create.
2921 Sticker_Update = 91,///< Sticker update.
2922 Sticker_Delete = 92,///< Sticker delete.
2923 Guild_Scheduled_Event_Create = 100,///< Guild-scheduled-event create.
2924 Guild_Scheduled_Event_Update = 101,///< Guild-scheduled-event update.
2925 Guild_Scheduled_Event_Delete = 102,///< Guild-scheduled-event delete.
2926 Thread_Create = 110,///< Thread create.
2927 Thread_Update = 111,///< Thread update.
2928 Thread_Delete = 112,///< Thread delete.
2929 Application_Command_Permission_Update = 121,///< Permissions were updated for a command.
2930 Auto_Moderation_Rule_Create = 140,///< Auto Moderation rule was created.
2931 Auto_Moderation_Rule_Update = 141,///< Auto Moderation rule was updated.
2932 Auto_Moderation_Rule_Delete = 142,///< Auto Moderation rule was deleted.
2933 Auto_Moderation_Block_Message = 143///< Message was blocked by AutoMod (according to a rule).
2934 };
2935
2936 /// Audit log entry info data \brief Audit log entry info data.
2937 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll OptionalAuditEntryInfoData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<OptionalAuditEntryInfoData> {
2938 public:
2939 std::string deleteMemberDays{};///< Number of days for which the member's Messages were deleted.
2940 std::string membersRemoved{};///< Number of members that were removed upon a prune.
2941 Snowflake applicationId{};///< ID of the app whose permissions were targeted APPLICATION_COMMAND_PERMISSION_UPDATE.
2942 std::string roleName{};///< Role name.
2943 Snowflake channelId{};///< Channel Id.
2944 Snowflake messageId{};///< Message Id.
2945 std::string count{};///< Count.
2946 std::string type{};///< Type.
2947
2948 OptionalAuditEntryInfoData() = default;
2949
2950 OptionalAuditEntryInfoData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2951 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
2952 return *this;
2953 }
2954
2955 OptionalAuditEntryInfoData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
2956 *this = jsonObjectData;
2957 }
2958
2959 virtual ~OptionalAuditEntryInfoData() = default;
2960
2961 protected:
2962 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, OptionalAuditEntryInfoData* pDataStructure) {
2963 if (jsonObjectData.contains("delete_member_days") && !jsonObjectData["delete_member_days"].is_null()) {
2964 pDataStructure->deleteMemberDays = jsonObjectData["delete_member_days"].get<std::string>();
2965 }
2966
2967 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members_removed") && !jsonObjectData["members_removed"].is_null()) {
2968 pDataStructure->membersRemoved = jsonObjectData["members_removed"].get<std::string>();
2969 }
2970
2971 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
2972 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
2973 }
2974
2975 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message_id") && !jsonObjectData["message_id"].is_null()) {
2976 pDataStructure->messageId = stoull(jsonObjectData["message_id"].get<std::string>());
2977 }
2978
2979 if (jsonObjectData.contains("count") && !jsonObjectData["count"].is_null()) {
2980 pDataStructure->count = jsonObjectData["count"].get<std::string>();
2981 }
2982
2983 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
2984 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
2985 }
2986
2987 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
2988 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<std::string>();
2989 }
2990
2991 if (jsonObjectData.contains("role_name") && !jsonObjectData["role_name"].is_null()) {
2992 pDataStructure->roleName = jsonObjectData["role_name"].get<std::string>();
2993 }
2994 }
2995 };
2996
2997 /// Audit log change data. \brief Audit log change data.
2998 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AuditLogChangeData : public DataParser<AuditLogChangeData> {
2999 nlohmann::json newValue{};///< New value.
3000 nlohmann::json oldValue{};///< Old value.
3001 std::string key{};///< The key of the audit log change.
3002
3003 AuditLogChangeData() = default;
3004
3005 AuditLogChangeData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3006 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3007 return *this;
3008 }
3009
3010 AuditLogChangeData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3011 *this = jsonObjectData;
3012 }
3013
3014 virtual ~AuditLogChangeData() = default;
3015
3016 protected:
3017 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AuditLogChangeData* pDataStructure) {
3018 if (jsonObjectData.contains("new_value") && !jsonObjectData["new_value"].is_null()) {
3019 pDataStructure->newValue = jsonObjectData["new_value"];
3020 }
3021
3022 if (jsonObjectData.contains("old_value") && !jsonObjectData["old_value"].is_null()) {
3023 pDataStructure->oldValue = jsonObjectData["old_value"];
3024 }
3025
3026 if (jsonObjectData.contains("key") && !jsonObjectData["key"].is_null()) {
3027 pDataStructure->key = jsonObjectData["key"].get<std::string>();
3028 }
3029 }
3030 };
3031
3032 /// Guild prune count data. \brief Guild prune count data.
3033 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildPruneCountData : public DataParser<GuildPruneCountData> {
3034 int32_t count{ 0 };
3035
3036 GuildPruneCountData() = default;
3037
3038 GuildPruneCountData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3039 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3040 return *this;
3041 }
3042
3043 GuildPruneCountData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3044 *this = jsonObjectData;
3045 }
3046
3047 virtual ~GuildPruneCountData() = default;
3048
3049 protected:
3050 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildPruneCountData* pDataStructure) {
3051 if (jsonObjectData.contains("pruned") && !jsonObjectData["pruned"].is_null()) {
3052 pDataStructure->count = jsonObjectData["pruned"].get<int32_t>();
3053 }
3054 }
3055 };
3056
3057 /// Audit log entry data. \brief Audit log entry data.
3058 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AuditLogEntryData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<AuditLogEntryData> {
3059 public:
3060 std::vector<AuditLogChangeData> changes{};///< Array of audit log change data.
3061 OptionalAuditEntryInfoData options{};///< Audit log entry info data.
3062 TimeStamp createdTimeStamp{ "" };///< Time at which this entry was created.
3063 AuditLogEvent actionType{};///< Audit log action type.
3064 std::string reason{};///< The reason that was entered for the given change.
3065 Snowflake targetId{};///< Id of the target User.
3066 Snowflake userId{};///< Id of the executing User.
3067
3068 AuditLogEntryData() = default;
3069
3070 AuditLogEntryData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3071 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3072 return *this;
3073 }
3074
3075 AuditLogEntryData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3076 *this = jsonObjectData;
3077 }
3078
3079 virtual ~AuditLogEntryData() = default;
3080
3081 protected:
3082 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AuditLogEntryData* pDataStructure) {
3083 if (jsonObjectData.contains("target_id") && !jsonObjectData["target_id"].is_null()) {
3084 pDataStructure->targetId = stoull(jsonObjectData["target_id"].get<std::string>());
3085 }
3086
3087 if (jsonObjectData.contains("changes") && !jsonObjectData["changes"].is_null()) {
3088 pDataStructure->changes.clear();
3089 pDataStructure->changes.reserve(jsonObjectData["changes"].size());
3090 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["changes"]) {
3091 AuditLogChangeData newData{ value };
3092 pDataStructure->changes.push_back(newData);
3093 }
3094 pDataStructure->changes.shrink_to_fit();
3095 }
3096
3097 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user_id") && !jsonObjectData["user_id"].is_null()) {
3098 pDataStructure->userId = stoull(jsonObjectData["user_id"].get<std::string>());
3099 }
3100
3101 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
3102 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
3103 pDataStructure->createdTimeStamp = pDataStructure->getCreatedAtTimestamp(TimeFormat::LongDateTime);
3104 }
3105
3106 if (jsonObjectData.contains("action_type") && !jsonObjectData["action_type"].is_null()) {
3107 pDataStructure->actionType = jsonObjectData["action_type"].get<AuditLogEvent>();
3108 }
3109
3110 if (jsonObjectData.contains("options") && !jsonObjectData["options"].is_null()) {
3111 pDataStructure->options = jsonObjectData["options"];
3112 }
3113
3114 if (jsonObjectData.contains("reason") && !jsonObjectData["reason"].is_null()) {
3115 pDataStructure->reason = jsonObjectData["reason"].get<std::string>();
3116 }
3117 }
3118 };
3119
3120 /// Party data. \brief Party data.
3121 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll PartyData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<PartyData> {
3122 public:
3123 std::vector<int32_t> size{ 0, 0 };///< The size of the party.
3124
3125 PartyData() = default;
3126
3127 PartyData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3128 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3129 return *this;
3130 }
3131
3132 PartyData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3133 *this = jsonObjectData;
3134 }
3135
3136 virtual ~PartyData() = default;
3137
3138 protected:
3139 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, PartyData* pDataStructure) {
3140 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
3141 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
3142 }
3143
3144 if (jsonObjectData.contains("Size") && !jsonObjectData["Size"].is_null()) {
3145 pDataStructure->size[0] = jsonObjectData["Size"]["CurrentSize"].get<int32_t>();
3146 pDataStructure->size[1] = jsonObjectData["Size"]["MaxSize"].get<int32_t>();
3147 }
3148 }
3149 };

3262 /// Activity types. \brief Activity types.
3263 enum class ActivityType : int8_t {
3264 Game = 0,///< Game.
3265 Streaming = 1,///< Streaming.
3266 Listening = 2,///< Listening.
3267 Watching = 3,///< Watching.
3268 Custom = 4,///< Custom.
3269 Competing = 5///< Competing.
3270 };
3271
3272 /// Activity data. \brief Activity data.
3273 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ActivityData : public DataParser<ActivityData> {
3274 Snowflake applicationId{};///< Application id for the current application.
3275 TimestampData timestamps{};///< Timestamp data.
3276 int32_t createdAt{ 0 };///< Timestamp of when the activity began.
3277 bool instance{ false };///< Whether this activity is an instanced context, like a match.
3278 SecretsData secrets{};///< Secrets data.
3279 StringWrapper details{};///< Details about the activity.
3280 ButtonData buttons{};///< Button Data.
3281 ActivityType type{};///< Activity data.
3282 AssetsData assets{};///< Assets data.
3283 StringWrapper state{};///< The player's current party status.
3284 StringWrapper name{};///< Name of the activity.
3285 int32_t flags{ 0 };///< Flags.
3286 StringWrapper url{};///< Url associated with the activity.
3287 EmojiData emoji{};///< Emoji associated with the activity.
3288 PartyData party{};///< Party data.
3289
3290 ActivityData() = default;
3291
3292 ActivityData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3293 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3294 return *this;
3295 }
3296
3297 ActivityData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3298 *this = jsonObjectData;
3299 }
3300
3301 virtual ~ActivityData() = default;
3302
3303 protected:
3304 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ActivityData* pDataStructure) {
3305 if (jsonObjectData.contains("Name") && !jsonObjectData["Name"].is_null()) {
3306 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["Name"].get<std::string>();
3307 }
3308
3309 if (jsonObjectData.contains("Timestamps") && !jsonObjectData["Timestamps"].is_null()) {
3310 pDataStructure->timestamps = jsonObjectData["Timestamps"];
3311 }
3312
3313 if (jsonObjectData.contains("ApplicationId") && !jsonObjectData["ApplicationId"].is_null()) {
3314 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["ApplicationId"].get<std::string>());
3315 }
3316
3317 if (jsonObjectData.contains("Details") && !jsonObjectData["Details"].is_null()) {
3318 pDataStructure->details = jsonObjectData["Details"].get<std::string>();
3319 }
3320
3321 if (jsonObjectData.contains("State") && !jsonObjectData["State"].is_null()) {
3322 pDataStructure->state = jsonObjectData["State"].get<std::string>();
3323 }
3324
3325 if (jsonObjectData.contains("ActivityParty") && !jsonObjectData["ActivityParty"].is_null()) {
3326 pDataStructure->party = jsonObjectData["ActivityParty"];
3327 }
3328
3329 if (jsonObjectData.contains("ActivityAssets") && !jsonObjectData["ActivityAssets"].is_null()) {
3330 pDataStructure->assets = jsonObjectData["ActivityAssets"];
3331 }
3332
3333 if (jsonObjectData.contains("ActivitySecrets") && !jsonObjectData["ActivitySecrets"].is_null()) {
3334 pDataStructure->secrets = jsonObjectData["ActivitySecrets"];
3335 }
3336
3337 if (jsonObjectData.contains("Instance") && !jsonObjectData["Instance"].is_null()) {
3338 pDataStructure->instance = jsonObjectData["Instance"].get<bool>();
3339 }
3340 }
3341 };
3342

3417 std::string description{};///< Description of the welcome Channel.

3421
3422 WelcomeScreenChannelData() = default;
3423

3440

3461

3476 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
3477 }
3478
3479 if (jsonObjectData.contains("welcome_channels") && !jsonObjectData["welcome_channels"].is_null()) {
3480 pDataStructure->welcomeChannels.clear();
3481 pDataStructure->welcomeChannels.reserve(jsonObjectData["welcome_channels"].size());
3482 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["welcome_channels"]) {

3491 /// Presence update data. \brief Presence update data.

3493 std::vector<ActivityData> activities{};///< Array of activities.

3515 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
3516 }
3517
3518 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
3519 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
3520 }
3521
3522 if (jsonObjectData.contains("status") && !jsonObjectData["status"].is_null()) {
3523 pDataStructure->status = jsonObjectData["status"].get<std::string>();
3524 }
3525
3526 if (jsonObjectData.contains("activities") && !jsonObjectData["activities"].is_null()) {
3527 pDataStructure->activities.clear();
3528 pDataStructure->activities.reserve(jsonObjectData["activities"].size());
3529 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["activities"]) {
3530 ActivityData newData{ value };
3531 pDataStructure->activities.push_back(newData);
3532 }
3533 pDataStructure->activities.shrink_to_fit();
3534 }
3535
3536 if (jsonObjectData.contains("client_status") && !jsonObjectData["client_status"].is_null()) {
3537 pDataStructure->clientStatus = jsonObjectData["client_status"];
3538 }
3539 }
3540 };

3550 public:
3551 StageInstancePrivacyLevel privacyLevel{ 0 };///< Privacy level of the Channel.
3552 bool discoverableDisabled{ false };///< Is it discoverable?

3573 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
3574 }
3575
3576 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
3577 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
3578 }
3579
3580 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
3581 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
3582 }
3583
3584 if (jsonObjectData.contains("topic") && !jsonObjectData["topic"].is_null()) {
3585 pDataStructure->topic = jsonObjectData["topic"].get<std::string>();
3586 }
3587
3588 if (jsonObjectData.contains("privacy_level") && !jsonObjectData["privacy_level"].is_null()) {
3589 pDataStructure->privacyLevel = jsonObjectData["privacy_level"].get<StageInstancePrivacyLevel>();
3590 }
3591
3592 if (jsonObjectData.contains("discoverable_disabled") && !jsonObjectData["discoverable_disabled"].is_null()) {
3593 pDataStructure->discoverableDisabled = jsonObjectData["discoverable_disabled"].get<bool>();
3594 }
3595 }
3596 };
3597
3598 /// Sticker types. \brief Sticker types.
3599 enum class StickerType : int8_t {
3600 Standard = 1,///< Standard.
3601 Guild = 2///< Guild.
3602 };
3603
3604 enum class StickerFlags : int8_t { Available = 1 << 0 };
3605
3606 /// Data representing a single Sticker. \brief Data representing a single Sticker.
3607 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll StickerData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<StickerData> {
3608 public:
3609 StickerFormatType formatType{};///< Format type.
3610 std::string description{};///< Description of the Sticker.
3611 int8_t stickerFlags{ 0 };///< Sticker flags.
3612 int32_t nsfwLevel{ 0 };///< NSFW warning level.
3613 int32_t sortValue{ 0 };///< Where in the stack of stickers it resides.
3614 std::string packId{};///< Pack id of the Sticker.
3615 std::string asset{};///< Asset value for the Sticker.
3616 std::string name{};///< The Sticker's name.
3617 std::string tags{};///< Tags for the Sticker to use.
3618 StickerType type{};///< The type of Sticker.
3619 Snowflake guildId{};///< The Guild id for which the Sticker exists in.
3620 UserData user{};///< The User that uploaded the Guild Sticker.
3621
3622 StickerData() = default;
3623
3624 StickerData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3625 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3626 return *this;
3627 }
3628
3629 StickerData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3630 *this = jsonObjectData;
3631 }
3632
3633 virtual ~StickerData() = default;
3634
3635 protected:
3636 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, StickerData* pDataStructure) {
3637 if (jsonObjectData.contains("asset") && !jsonObjectData["asset"].is_null()) {
3638 pDataStructure->asset = jsonObjectData["asset"].get<std::string>();
3639 }
3640
3641 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
3642 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
3643 }
3644
3645 if (jsonObjectData.contains("format_type") && !jsonObjectData["format_type"].is_null()) {
3646 pDataStructure->formatType = jsonObjectData["format_type"].get<StickerFormatType>();
3647 }
3648
3649 if (jsonObjectData.contains("available") && !jsonObjectData["available"].is_null()) {
3650 pDataStructure->stickerFlags = setBool<int8_t, StickerFlags>(pDataStructure->stickerFlags, StickerFlags::Available, jsonObjectData["available"].get<bool>());
3651 }
3652
3653 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
3654 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
3655 }
3656
3657 if (jsonObjectData.contains("pack_id") && !jsonObjectData["pack_id"].is_null()) {
3658 pDataStructure->packId = jsonObjectData["pack_id"].get<std::string>();
3659 }
3660
3661 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
3662 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<StickerType>();
3663 }
3664
3665 if (jsonObjectData.contains("sort_value") && !jsonObjectData["sort_value"].is_null()) {
3666 pDataStructure->sortValue = jsonObjectData["sort_value"].get<int32_t>();
3667 }
3668
3669 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
3670 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
3671 }
3672
3673 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
3674 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
3675 }
3676
3677 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
3678 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
3679 }
3680 }
3681 };
3682
3683 /// Data representing a single Guild preview. \brief Data representing a single Guild preview.
3684 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildPreviewData : public DataParser<GuildPreviewData> {
3685 int32_t approximatePresenceCount{ 0 };
3686 std::vector<std::string> features{};
3687 std::vector<StickerData> stickers{};
3688 int32_t approximateMemberCount{ 0 };
3689 std::vector<EmojiData> emojis{};
3690 std::string discoverySplash{};
3691 std::string description{};
3692 std::string splash{};
3693 std::string name{};
3694 std::string icon{};
3695 Snowflake id{};
3696
3697 GuildPreviewData() = default;
3698
3699 GuildPreviewData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3700 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3701 return *this;
3702 }
3703
3704 GuildPreviewData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3705 *this = jsonObjectData;
3706 }
3707
3708 virtual ~GuildPreviewData() = default;
3709
3710 protected:
3711 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildPreviewData* pDataStructure) {
3712 if (jsonObjectData.contains("approximate_presence_count") && !jsonObjectData["approximate_presence_count"].is_null()) {
3713 pDataStructure->approximatePresenceCount = jsonObjectData["approximate_presence_count"].get<int32_t>();
3714 }
3715
3716 if (jsonObjectData.contains("approximate_member_count") && !jsonObjectData["approximate_member_count"].is_null()) {
3717 pDataStructure->approximateMemberCount = jsonObjectData["approximate_member_count"].get<int32_t>();
3718 }
3719
3720 if (jsonObjectData.contains("discovery_splash") && !jsonObjectData["discovery_splash"].is_null()) {
3721 pDataStructure->discoverySplash = jsonObjectData["discovery_splash"].get<std::string>();
3722 }
3723
3724 if (jsonObjectData.contains("emojis") && !jsonObjectData["emojis"].is_null()) {
3725 pDataStructure->emojis.clear();
3726 pDataStructure->emojis.reserve(jsonObjectData["emojis"].size());
3727 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["emojis"]) {
3728 EmojiData newData{ value };
3729 pDataStructure->emojis.push_back(newData);
3730 }
3731 pDataStructure->emojis.shrink_to_fit();
3732 }
3733
3734 if (jsonObjectData.contains("stickers") && !jsonObjectData["stickers"].is_null()) {
3735 pDataStructure->emojis.clear();
3736 pDataStructure->emojis.reserve(jsonObjectData["stickers"].size());
3737 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["stickers"]) {
3738 StickerData newData{ value };
3739 pDataStructure->stickers.push_back(newData);
3740 }
3741 pDataStructure->stickers.shrink_to_fit();
3742 }
3743
3744 if (jsonObjectData.contains("features") && !jsonObjectData["features"].is_null()) {
3745 pDataStructure->features = jsonObjectData["features"].get<std::vector<std::string>>();
3746 }
3747
3748 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
3749 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
3750 }
3751
3752 if (jsonObjectData.contains("splash") && !jsonObjectData["splash"].is_null()) {
3753 pDataStructure->splash = jsonObjectData["splash"].get<std::string>();
3754 }
3755
3756 if (jsonObjectData.contains("icon") && !jsonObjectData["icon"].is_null()) {
3757 pDataStructure->icon = jsonObjectData["icon"].get<std::string>();
3758 }
3759
3760 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
3761 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
3762 }
3763
3764 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
3765 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
3766 }
3767 }
3768 };
3769
3770 /// Afk timeout durations. \brief Afk timeout durations.
3771 enum class AfkTimeOutDurations : int16_t {
3772 Shortest = 60,///< Shortest.
3773 Short = 300,///< Short.
3774 Medium = 900,///< Medium.
3775 Long = 1800,///< Long.
3776 Longest = 3600///< Longest.
3777 };
3778
3779 /// Guild NSFW level. \brief Guild NSFW level.
3780 enum class GuildNSFWLevel : int8_t {
3781 Default = 0,///< Default.
3782 Explicit = 1,///< Explicit.
3783 Safe = 2,///< Safe.
3784 Age_Restricted = 3///< Age restricted.
3785 };
3786
3787 /// System channel flags. \brief System channel flags.
3788 enum class SystemChannelFlags : int8_t {
3789 Suppress_Join_Notifications = 1 << 0,///< Suppress member join notifications.
3790 Suppress_Premium_Subscriptions = 1 << 1,///< Suppress server boost notifications.
3791 Suppress_Guild_Reminder_Notifications = 1 << 2,///< Suppress server setup tips.
3792 Suppress_Join_Notification_Replies = 1 << 3///< Hide member join sticker reply buttons.
3793 };
3794
3795 /// Guild flags. \brief Guild flags.
3796 enum class GuildFlags : int8_t {
3797 WidgetEnabled = 1 << 0,///< Widget enabled.
3798 Unavailable = 1 << 1,///< Unavailable.
3799 Owner = 1 << 2,///< Owner.
3800 Large = 1 << 3,///< Large.
3801 Premium_Progress_Bar_Enabled = 1 << 4///< Premium progress bar enabled
3802 };
3803
3804 /// Data structure representing a single Guild. \brief Data structure representing a single Guild.
3805 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<GuildData> {
3806 public:
3807 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, PresenceUpdateData> presences{};///< Map of presences for each GuildMember.
3808 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, VoiceStateData> voiceStates{};///< Map of Guild-member voice-states.
3809 DiscordCoreClient* discordCoreClient{ nullptr };///< A pointer to the DiscordCoreClient.
3810 VoiceConnection* voiceConnectionPtr{ nullptr };///< A pointer to the VoiceConnection, if present.
3811 std::vector<StringWrapper> features{};///< List of Guild features.
3812 std::vector<Snowflake> channels{};///< Array of Guild channels.
3813 std::vector<Snowflake> members{};///< Array of GuildMembers.
3814 std::vector<Snowflake> roles{};///< Array of Guild roles.
3815 TimeStamp joinedAt{ "" };///< When the bot joined this Guild.
3816 int32_t memberCount{ 0 };///< Member count.
3817 StringWrapper icon{};///< Url to the Guild's icon.
3818 StringWrapper name{};///< The Guild's name.
3819 Snowflake ownerId{};///< User id of the Guild's owner.
3820 int8_t flags{ 0 };///< Guild flags.
3821
3822 GuildData() = default;
3823
3824 GuildData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3825 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3826 return *this;
3827 }
3828
3829 GuildData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3830 *this = jsonObjectData;
3831 }
3832
3833 VoiceConnection* connectToVoice(const Snowflake guildMemberId, const Snowflake channelId = 0, bool selfDeaf = false, bool selfMute = false);
3834
3835 void insertGuildMember(GuildMemberData theData);
3836
3837 void insertChannel(ChannelData theData);
3838
3839 void insertRole(RoleData theData);
3840
3841 bool areWeConnected();
3842
3843 void initialize();
3844
3845 void disconnect();
3846
3847 virtual ~GuildData() = default;
3848
3849 protected:
3850 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildData* pDataStructure) {
3851 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
3852 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
3853 }
3854
3855 if (jsonObjectData.contains("icon") && !jsonObjectData["icon"].is_null()) {
3856 std::string iconUrlString = "https://cdn.discordapp.com/";
3857 iconUrlString += "icons/" + std::to_string(pDataStructure->id) + "/" + jsonObjectData["icon"].get<std::string>() + ".png";
3858 pDataStructure->icon = iconUrlString;
3859 }
3860
3861 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
3862 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
3863 }
3864
3865 if (jsonObjectData.contains("joined_at") && !jsonObjectData["joined_at"].is_null()) {
3866 pDataStructure->joinedAt = jsonObjectData["joined_at"].get<std::string>();
3867 }
3868
3869 if (jsonObjectData.contains("owner") && !jsonObjectData["owner"].is_null()) {
3870 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildFlags::Owner, jsonObjectData["owner"].get<bool>());
3871 }
3872
3873 if (jsonObjectData.contains("owner_id") && !jsonObjectData["owner_id"].is_null()) {
3874 pDataStructure->ownerId = stoull(jsonObjectData["owner_id"].get<std::string>());
3875 }
3876
3877 if (jsonObjectData.contains("features") && !jsonObjectData["features"].is_null()) {
3878 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["features"].get<std::vector<std::string>>()) {
3879 pDataStructure->features.push_back(value);
3880 }
3881 }
3882
3883 if (jsonObjectData.contains("roles") && !jsonObjectData["roles"].is_null()) {
3884 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["roles"]) {
3885 RoleData newData{ value };
3886 pDataStructure->roles.push_back(newData.id);
3887 this->insertRole(newData);
3888 }
3889 }
3890
3891 if (jsonObjectData.contains("widget_enabled") && !jsonObjectData["widget_enabled"].is_null()) {
3892 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildFlags::WidgetEnabled, jsonObjectData["widget_enabled"].get<bool>());
3893 }
3894
3895 if (jsonObjectData.contains("large") && !jsonObjectData["large"].is_null()) {
3896 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildFlags::Large, jsonObjectData["large"].get<bool>());
3897 }
3898
3899 if (jsonObjectData.contains("unavailable") && !jsonObjectData["unavailable"].is_null()) {
3900 pDataStructure->flags = setBool<int8_t, GuildFlags>(pDataStructure->flags, GuildFlags::Unavailable, jsonObjectData["unavailable"].get<bool>());
3901 }
3902
3903 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member_count") && !jsonObjectData["member_count"].is_null()) {
3904 pDataStructure->memberCount = jsonObjectData["member_count"].get<int32_t>();
3905 }
3906
3907 if (jsonObjectData.contains("voice_states") && !jsonObjectData["voice_states"].is_null()) {
3908 pDataStructure->voiceStates.clear();
3909 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["voice_states"]) {
3910 VoiceStateData newData{ value };
3911 Snowflake userId = newData.userId;
3912 pDataStructure->voiceStates[userId] = newData;
3913 }
3914 }
3915
3916 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members") && !jsonObjectData["members"].is_null()) {
3917 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["members"]) {
3918 GuildMemberData newData{ value };
3919 newData.guildId = pDataStructure->id;
3920 pDataStructure->members.push_back(newData.id);
3921 this->insertGuildMember(newData);
3922 }
3923 }
3924
3925 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channels") && !jsonObjectData["channels"].is_null()) {
3926 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["channels"]) {
3927 ChannelData newData{ value };
3928 newData.guildId = pDataStructure->id;
3929 pDataStructure->channels.push_back(newData.id);
3930 this->insertChannel(newData);
3931 }
3932 }
3933
3934 if (jsonObjectData.contains("presences") && !jsonObjectData["presences"].is_null()) {
3935 pDataStructure->presences.clear();
3936 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["presences"]) {
3937 PresenceUpdateData newData{ value };
3938 Snowflake presenceId = newData.user.id;
3939 pDataStructure->presences[presenceId] = newData;
3940 }
3941 }
3942 }
3943 };
3944
3945 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildDataVector : public DataParser<GuildDataVector> {
3946 public:
3947 friend class Guilds;
3948
3949 GuildDataVector() = default;
3950
3951 operator std::vector<GuildData>() {
3952 return this->theGuildDatas;
3953 }
3954
3955 GuildDataVector& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3956 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
3957 return *this;
3958 }
3959
3960 GuildDataVector(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
3961 *this = jsonObjectData;
3962 }
3963
3964 virtual ~GuildDataVector() = default;
3965
3966 protected:
3967 std::vector<GuildData> theGuildDatas{};
3968
3969 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildDataVector* pDataStructure) {
3970 pDataStructure->theGuildDatas.reserve(jsonObjectData.size());
3971 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData) {
3972 DiscordCoreAPI::GuildData newData{ value };
3973 pDataStructure->theGuildDatas.push_back(newData);
3974 }
3975 pDataStructure->theGuildDatas.shrink_to_fit();
3976 }
3977 };
3978
3979 /// Guild scheduled event privacy levels. \brief Guild scheduled event privacy levels.
3980 enum class GuildScheduledEventPrivacyLevel : int8_t {
3981 Public = 1,///< Public.
3982 Guild_Only = 2///< Guild only.
3983 };
3984
3985 /// GuildScheduledEventStatus. \brief GuildScheduledEventStatus.
3986 enum class GuildScheduledEventStatus : int8_t {
3987 Scheduled = 1,///< Scheduled.
3988 Active = 2,///< Active.
3989 Completed = 3,///< Completed.
3990 Canceled = 4///< Cancelled.
3991 };
3992
3993 /// Guild scheduled event entity types. \brief Guild scheduled event entity types.
3994 enum class GuildScheduledEventEntityType : int8_t {
3995 None = 0,///< None.
3996 State_Instance = 1,///< Stage instance.
3997 Voice = 2,///< Voice.
3998 External = 3///< External.
3999 };
4000
4001 /// Guild scheduled event entity metadata. \brief Guild scheduled event entity metadata.
4002 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildScheduledEventMetadata : public DataParser<GuildScheduledEventMetadata> {
4003 std::string location{};
4004
4005 GuildScheduledEventMetadata() = default;
4006
4007 GuildScheduledEventMetadata& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4008 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4009 return *this;
4010 }

4012 GuildScheduledEventMetadata(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {

4022 }
4023 }
4024 };
4025
4026 /// Data representing a Guild Scheduled Event. \brief Data representing a Guild Scheduled Event.
4027 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildScheduledEventData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<GuildScheduledEventData> {
4028 public:
4029 GuildScheduledEventPrivacyLevel privacyLevel{};///< The privacy level of the scheduled event.
4030 GuildScheduledEventMetadata entityMetadata{};///< Additional metadata for the Guild scheduled event.
4031 GuildScheduledEventEntityType entityType{};///< The type of the scheduled event.
4032 GuildScheduledEventStatus status{};///< The status of the scheduled event.
4033 std::string scheduledStartTime{};///< The time the scheduled event will start.
4034 std::string scheduledEndTime{};///< The time the scheduled event will end, required if entity_type is External.
4035 std::string description{};///< The description of the scheduled event(1 - 1000 characters.
4036 uint32_t userCount{ 0 };///< The number of users subscribed to the scheduled event.
4037 std::string creatorId{};///< The id of the User that created the scheduled event *.
4038 std::string entityId{};///< The id of an entity associated with a Guild scheduled event.
4039 Snowflake channelId{};///< The Channel id in which the scheduled event will be hosted, or null if scheduled entity type is External.
4040 Snowflake guildId{};///< The Guild id which the scheduled event belongs to.
4041 std::string name{};///< The name of the scheduled event(1 - 100 characters).
4042 UserData creator{};///< The User that created the scheduled event.
4043
4044 GuildScheduledEventData() = default;
4045
4046 GuildScheduledEventData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4047 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4048 return *this;
4049 }
4050
4051 GuildScheduledEventData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4052 *this = jsonObjectData;
4053 }
4054
4055 virtual ~GuildScheduledEventData() = default;
4056
4057 protected:
4058 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildScheduledEventData* pDataStructure) {
4059 if (jsonObjectData.contains("privacy_level") && !jsonObjectData["privacy_level"].is_null()) {
4060 pDataStructure->privacyLevel = jsonObjectData["privacy_level"].get<GuildScheduledEventPrivacyLevel>();
4061 }
4062
4063 if (jsonObjectData.contains("entity_type") && !jsonObjectData["entity_type"].is_null()) {
4064 pDataStructure->entityType = jsonObjectData["entity_type"].get<GuildScheduledEventEntityType>();
4065 }
4066
4067 if (jsonObjectData.contains("status") && !jsonObjectData["status"].is_null()) {
4068 pDataStructure->status = jsonObjectData["status"].get<GuildScheduledEventStatus>();
4069 }
4070
4071 if (jsonObjectData.contains("entity_metadata") && !jsonObjectData["entity_metadata"].is_null()) {
4072 pDataStructure->entityMetadata = jsonObjectData["entity_metadata"];
4073 }
4074
4075 if (jsonObjectData.contains("scheduled_start_time") && !jsonObjectData["scheduled_start_time"].is_null()) {
4076 pDataStructure->scheduledStartTime = jsonObjectData["scheduled_start_time"].get<std::string>();
4077 }
4078
4079 if (jsonObjectData.contains("scheduled_end_time") && !jsonObjectData["scheduled_end_time"].is_null()) {
4080 pDataStructure->scheduledEndTime = jsonObjectData["scheduled_end_time"].get<std::string>();
4081 }
4082
4083 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user_count") && !jsonObjectData["user_count"].is_null()) {
4084 pDataStructure->userCount = jsonObjectData["user_count"].get<uint32_t>();
4085 }
4086
4087 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
4088 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
4089 }
4090
4091 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
4092 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
4093 }
4094
4095 if (jsonObjectData.contains("creator_id") && !jsonObjectData["creator_id"].is_null()) {
4096 pDataStructure->creatorId = jsonObjectData["creator_id"].get<std::string>();
4097 }
4098
4099 if (jsonObjectData.contains("entity_id") && !jsonObjectData["entity_id"].is_null()) {
4100 pDataStructure->entityId = jsonObjectData["entity_id"].get<std::string>();
4101 }
4102
4103 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
4104 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
4105 }
4106
4107 if (jsonObjectData.contains("creator") && !jsonObjectData["creator"].is_null()) {
4108 pDataStructure->creator = jsonObjectData["creator"];
4109 }
4110
4111 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
4112 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
4113 }
4114
4115 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
4116 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
4117 }
4118 }
4119 };

4121 /// Data representing a single GuildScheduledEventUser. \brief Data representing a single GuildScheduledEventUser.
4122 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildScheduledEventUserData : public DataParser<GuildScheduledEventUserData> {
4123 std::string guildScheduledEventId{};///< The scheduled event id which the User subscribed to/
4124 GuildMemberData member{};///< Guild member data for this User for the Guild which this event belongs to, if any.
4125 UserData user{};///< User which subscribed to an event.
4126
4127 GuildScheduledEventUserData() = default;
4128
4129 GuildScheduledEventUserData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4130 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4131 return *this;
4132 }
4133
4134 GuildScheduledEventUserData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4135 *this = jsonObjectData;
4136 }
4137
4138 virtual ~GuildScheduledEventUserData() = default;
4139
4140 protected:
4141 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildScheduledEventUserData* pDataStructure) {
4142 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_scheduled_event_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_event_id"].is_null()) {
4143 pDataStructure->guildScheduledEventId = jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_event_id"].get<std::string>();
4144 }
4145
4146 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
4147 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
4148 }
4149
4150 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
4151 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
4152 }
4153 }
4154 };
4155

4188 /// Invite data. \brief Invite data.
4189 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InviteData : public DataParser<InviteData> {
4190 GuildScheduledEventData guildScheduledEvent{};///< Scheduled Guild event.
4191 int32_t approximatePresenceCount{ 0 };///< Approximate presence count.
4192 ApplicationData targetApplication{};///< Application data.
4193 int32_t approximateMemberCount{ 0 };///< Approximate member count.
4194 StageInstanceData stageInstance{};///< Stage instance data.
4195 TimeStamp createdAt{ "" };///< Time it was created at.
4196 TimeStamp expiresAt{ "" };///< When the invite expires.
4197 int32_t targetType{ 0 };///< Target type.
4198 bool temporary{ false };///< Is it temporary?
4199 UserData targetUser{};///< Target User of the invite.
4200 ChannelData channel{};///< Channel data of the Channel that the invite is for.
4201 int32_t maxUses{ 0 };///< Max number of uses.
4202 int32_t maxAge{ 0 };///< Maximum age of the invite.
4203 Snowflake guildId{};///< The Guild this invite is for.
4204 std::string code{};///< Unique invite code.
4205 UserData inviter{};///< The User who created the invite.
4206 GuildData guild{};///< Guild data of the Channel that the invite is for.
4207 int32_t uses{ 0 };///< The current number of uses.
4208
4209 InviteData() = default;
4210
4211 InviteData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4212 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4213 return *this;
4214 }
4215
4216 InviteData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4217 *this = jsonObjectData;
4218 }
4219
4220 virtual ~InviteData() = default;
4221
4222 protected:
4223 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, InviteData* pDataStructure) {
4224 if (jsonObjectData.contains("code") && !jsonObjectData["code"].is_null() && jsonObjectData["code"].is_string()) {
4225 pDataStructure->code = jsonObjectData["code"].get<std::string>();
4226 } else if (jsonObjectData.contains("code") && !jsonObjectData["code"].is_null() && jsonObjectData["code"].is_number_integer()) {
4227 pDataStructure->code = std::to_string(jsonObjectData["code"].get<int32_t>());
4228 }
4229
4230 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild") && !jsonObjectData["guild"].is_null()) {
4231 pDataStructure->guild = jsonObjectData["guild"];
4232 }
4233
4234 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel") && !jsonObjectData["channel"].is_null()) {
4235 pDataStructure->channel = jsonObjectData["channel"];
4236 }
4237
4238 if (jsonObjectData.contains("inviter") && !jsonObjectData["inviter"].is_null()) {
4239 pDataStructure->inviter = jsonObjectData["inviter"];
4240 }
4241
4242 if (jsonObjectData.contains("target_type") && !jsonObjectData["target_type"].is_null()) {
4243 pDataStructure->targetType = jsonObjectData["target_type"].get<int32_t>();
4244 }
4245
4246 if (jsonObjectData.contains("target_user") && !jsonObjectData["target_user"].is_null()) {
4247 pDataStructure->targetUser = jsonObjectData["target_user"];
4248 }
4249
4250 if (jsonObjectData.contains("target_application") && !jsonObjectData["target_application"].is_null()) {
4251 pDataStructure->targetApplication = jsonObjectData["target_application"];
4252 }
4253
4254 if (jsonObjectData.contains("approximate_presence_count") && !jsonObjectData["approximate_presence_count"].is_null()) {
4255 pDataStructure->approximatePresenceCount = jsonObjectData["approximate_presence_count"].get<int32_t>();
4256 }
4257
4258 if (jsonObjectData.contains("approximate_member_count") && !jsonObjectData["approximate_member_count"].is_null()) {
4259 pDataStructure->approximateMemberCount = jsonObjectData["approximate_member_count"].get<int32_t>();
4260 }
4261
4262 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
4263 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
4264 }
4265
4266 if (jsonObjectData.contains("expires_at") && !jsonObjectData["expires_at"].is_null()) {
4267 pDataStructure->expiresAt = jsonObjectData["expires_at"].get<std::string>();
4268 }
4269
4270 if (jsonObjectData.contains("stage_instance") && !jsonObjectData["stage_instance"].is_null()) {
4271 pDataStructure->stageInstance = jsonObjectData["stage_instance"];
4272 }
4273
4274 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_scheduled_event") && !jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_event"].is_null()) {
4275 pDataStructure->guildScheduledEvent = jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_event"];
4276 }
4277
4278 if (jsonObjectData.contains("uses") && !jsonObjectData["uses"].is_null()) {
4279 pDataStructure->uses = jsonObjectData["uses"].get<int32_t>();
4280 }
4281
4282 if (jsonObjectData.contains("max_uses") && !jsonObjectData["max_uses"].is_null()) {
4283 pDataStructure->maxUses = jsonObjectData["max_uses"].get<int32_t>();
4284 }
4285
4286 if (jsonObjectData.contains("max_age") && !jsonObjectData["max_age"].is_null()) {
4287 pDataStructure->maxAge = jsonObjectData["max_age"].get<int32_t>();
4288 }
4289
4290 if (jsonObjectData.contains("temporary") && !jsonObjectData["temporary"].is_null()) {
4291 pDataStructure->temporary = jsonObjectData["temporary"].get<bool>();
4292 }
4293
4294 if (jsonObjectData.contains("created_at") && !jsonObjectData["created_at"].is_null()) {
4295 pDataStructure->createdAt = jsonObjectData["created_at"].get<std::string>();
4296 }
4297 }
4298 };
4299

4301 public:

4332 /// Represents a Guild Template. \brief Represents a Guild Template.
4333 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildTemplateData : public DataParser<GuildTemplateData> {
4334 GuildData serializedSourceGuild{};///< The Guild snapshot this template contains.
4335 std::string sourceGuildId{};///< The ID of the Guild this template is based on.
4336 std::string description{};///< The description for the template.
4337 uint32_t usageCount{ 0 };///< Number of times this template has been used.
4338 std::string creatorId{};///< The ID of the User who created the template.
4339 std::string createdAt{};///< When this template was created.
4340 std::string updatedAt{};///< When this template was last synced to the source Guild.
4341 bool isDirty{ false };///< Whether the template has unsynced changes.
4342 std::string code{};///< The template code(unique ID).
4343 std::string name{};///< Template name.
4344 UserData creator{};///< The User who created the template.
4345
4346 GuildTemplateData() = default;
4347
4348 GuildTemplateData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4349 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4350 return *this;
4351 }
4352
4353 GuildTemplateData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4354 *this = jsonObjectData;
4355 }
4356
4357 virtual ~GuildTemplateData() = default;
4358
4359 protected:
4360 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildTemplateData* pDataStructure) {
4361 if (jsonObjectData.contains("serialized_source_guild") && !jsonObjectData["serialized_source_guild"].is_null()) {
4362 pDataStructure->serializedSourceGuild = jsonObjectData["serialized_source_guild"];
4363 }
4364
4365 if (jsonObjectData.contains("creator") && !jsonObjectData["creator"].is_null()) {
4366 pDataStructure->creator = jsonObjectData["creator"];
4367 }
4368
4369 if (jsonObjectData.contains("source_guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["source_guild_id"].is_null()) {
4370 pDataStructure->sourceGuildId = jsonObjectData["source_guild_id"].get<std::string>();
4371 }
4372
4373 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
4374 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
4375 }
4376
4377 if (jsonObjectData.contains("usage_count") && !jsonObjectData["usage_count"].is_null()) {
4378 pDataStructure->usageCount = jsonObjectData["usage_count"].get<uint32_t>();
4379 }
4380
4381 if (jsonObjectData.contains("creator_id") && !jsonObjectData["creator_id"].is_null()) {
4382 pDataStructure->creatorId = jsonObjectData["creator_id"].get<std::string>();
4383 }
4384
4385 if (jsonObjectData.contains("created_at") && !jsonObjectData["created_at"].is_null()) {
4386 pDataStructure->createdAt = jsonObjectData["created_at"].get<std::string>();
4387 }
4388
4389 if (jsonObjectData.contains("updated_at") && !jsonObjectData["updated_at"].is_null()) {
4390 pDataStructure->updatedAt = jsonObjectData["updated_at"].get<std::string>();
4391 }
4392
4393 if (jsonObjectData.contains("is_dirty") && !jsonObjectData["is_dirty"].is_null()) {
4394 pDataStructure->isDirty = jsonObjectData["is_dirty"].get<bool>();
4395 }
4396
4397 if (jsonObjectData.contains("code") && !jsonObjectData["code"].is_null()) {
4398 pDataStructure->code = jsonObjectData["code"].get<std::string>();
4399 }
4400
4401 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
4402 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
4403 }
4404 }
4405 };
4406

4439 /// Invite target types. \brief Invite target types.
4440 enum class InviteTargetTypes : int8_t {
4441 Stream = 1,///< Stream.
4442 Embedded_Application = 2///< Embedded application.
4443 };
4444
4445 /// WebHook types. \brief WebHook types.
4446 enum class WebHookType : int8_t {
4447 Incoming = 1,///< Incoming.
4448 Channel_Follower = 2,///< Channel follower.
4449 Application = 3///< Application.
4450 };
4451
4452 /// WebHook data. \brief WebHook data.
4453 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll WebHookData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<WebHookData> {
4454 public:
4455 ChannelData sourceChannel{};///< Channel for which th WebHook was issued.
4456 Snowflake applicationId{};///< Application id.
4457 GuildData sourceGuild{};///< Source Guild id.
4458 WebHookType type{ 0 };///< Type of WebHook.
4459 std::string avatar{};///< Avatar of the WebHook.
4460 Snowflake channelId{};///< Channel id for which the WebHook was issued.
4461 std::string token{};///< Token of the WebHook.
4462 Snowflake guildId{};///< Guild id for which the WebHook was issued.
4463 std::string name{};///< Name of the WebHook.
4464 std::string url{};///< Url of the WebHook.
4465 UserData user{};///< User which create the WebHook.
4466
4467 WebHookData() = default;
4468
4469 WebHookData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4470 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4471 return *this;
4472 }
4473
4474 WebHookData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4475 *this = jsonObjectData;
4476 }
4477
4478 virtual ~WebHookData() = default;
4479
4480 protected:
4481 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, WebHookData* pDataStructure) {
4482 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
4483 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
4484 }
4485
4486 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
4487 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<WebHookType>();
4488 }
4489
4490 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
4491 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
4492 }
4493
4494 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
4495 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
4496 }
4497
4498 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
4499 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
4500 }
4501
4502 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
4503 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
4504 }
4505
4506 if (jsonObjectData.contains("avatar") && !jsonObjectData["avatar"].is_null()) {
4507 pDataStructure->avatar = jsonObjectData["avatar"].get<std::string>();
4508 }
4509
4510 if (jsonObjectData.contains("token") && !jsonObjectData["token"].is_null()) {
4511 pDataStructure->token = jsonObjectData["token"].get<std::string>();
4512 }
4513
4514 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application_id") && !jsonObjectData["application_id"].is_null()) {
4515 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["application_id"].get<std::string>());
4516 }
4517
4518 if (jsonObjectData.contains("source_guild") && !jsonObjectData["source_guild"].is_null()) {
4519 pDataStructure->sourceGuild = jsonObjectData["source_guild"];
4520 }
4521
4522 if (jsonObjectData.contains("source_channel") && !jsonObjectData["source_channel"].is_null()) {
4523 pDataStructure->sourceChannel = jsonObjectData["source_channel"];
4524 }
4525
4526 if (jsonObjectData.contains("url") && !jsonObjectData["url"].is_null()) {
4527 pDataStructure->url = jsonObjectData["url"].get<std::string>();
4528 }
4529 }
4530 };
4531

4533 public:

4535

4560 /// Audit log data. \brief Audit log data.
4561 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AuditLogData : public DataParser<AuditLogData> {
4562 public:
4563 std::vector<GuildScheduledEventData> guildScheduledEvents{};///< Array of guild scheduled event objects.
4564 std::vector<AutoModerationRuleData> autoModerationRules{};///< List of auto moderation rules referenced in the audit log.
4565 std::vector<AuditLogEntryData> auditLogEntries{};///< Array of audit log entry objects.
4566 std::vector<IntegrationData> integrations{};///< Array of partial integration objects.
4567 std::vector<WebHookData> webhooks{};///< Array of webhook objects.
4568 std::vector<ChannelData> threads{};///< Array of thread-specific channel objects.
4569 std::vector<UserData> users{};///< Array of user objects.
4570 auto getAuditLogData(const Snowflake& userIdOfChanger, AuditLogEvent auditLogType) {
4571 for (auto& value: this->auditLogEntries) {
4572 if (value.id == userIdOfChanger && value.actionType == auditLogType) {
4573 return value;
4574 }
4575 }
4576 return AuditLogEntryData();
4577 }
4578 auto getAuditLogData(AuditLogEvent auditLogType, const Snowflake& userIdOfTarget) {
4579 for (auto& value: this->auditLogEntries) {
4580 if (value.targetId == userIdOfTarget && value.actionType == auditLogType) {
4581 return value;
4582 }
4583 }
4584 return AuditLogEntryData();
4585 }
4586
4587 AuditLogData() = default;
4588
4589 AuditLogData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4590 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4591 return *this;
4592 }
4593
4594 AuditLogData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4595 *this = jsonObjectData;
4596 }
4597
4598 virtual ~AuditLogData() = default;
4599
4600 protected:
4601 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AuditLogData* pDataStructure) {
4602 if (jsonObjectData.contains("webhooks") && !jsonObjectData["webhooks"].is_null()) {
4603 pDataStructure->webhooks.clear();
4604 pDataStructure->webhooks.reserve(jsonObjectData["webhooks"].size());
4605 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["webhooks"]) {
4606 WebHookData newData{ value };
4607 pDataStructure->webhooks.push_back(newData);
4608 }
4609 pDataStructure->webhooks.shrink_to_fit();
4610 }
4611
4612 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_scheduled_events") && !jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_events"].is_null()) {
4613 pDataStructure->webhooks.clear();
4614 pDataStructure->webhooks.reserve(jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_events"].size());
4615 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["guild_scheduled_events"]) {
4616 GuildScheduledEventData newData{ value };
4617 pDataStructure->guildScheduledEvents.push_back(newData);
4618 }
4619 pDataStructure->webhooks.shrink_to_fit();
4620 }
4621
4622 if (jsonObjectData.contains("auto_moderation_rules") && !jsonObjectData["auto_moderation_rules"].is_null()) {
4623 pDataStructure->users.clear();
4624 pDataStructure->users.reserve(jsonObjectData["auto_moderation_rules"].size());
4625 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["auto_moderation_rules"]) {
4626 AutoModerationRuleData newData{ value };
4627 pDataStructure->autoModerationRules.push_back(newData);
4628 }
4629 pDataStructure->autoModerationRules.shrink_to_fit();
4630 }
4631
4632 if (jsonObjectData.contains("users") && !jsonObjectData["users"].is_null()) {
4633 pDataStructure->users.clear();
4634 pDataStructure->users.reserve(jsonObjectData["users"].size());
4635 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["users"]) {
4636 UserData newData{ value };
4637 pDataStructure->users.push_back(newData);
4638 }
4639 pDataStructure->users.shrink_to_fit();
4640 }
4641
4642 if (jsonObjectData.contains("audit_log_entries") && !jsonObjectData["audit_log_entries"].is_null()) {
4643 pDataStructure->auditLogEntries.clear();
4644 pDataStructure->auditLogEntries.reserve(jsonObjectData["audit_log_entries"].size());
4645 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["audit_log_entries"]) {
4646 AuditLogEntryData newData{ value };
4647 pDataStructure->auditLogEntries.push_back(newData);
4648 }
4649 pDataStructure->auditLogEntries.shrink_to_fit();
4650 }
4651
4652 if (jsonObjectData.contains("integrations") && !jsonObjectData["integrations"].is_null()) {
4653 pDataStructure->integrations.clear();
4654 pDataStructure->integrations.reserve(jsonObjectData["integrations"].size());
4655 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["integrations"]) {
4656 IntegrationData newData{ value };
4657 pDataStructure->integrations.push_back(newData);
4658 }
4659 pDataStructure->integrations.shrink_to_fit();
4660 }
4661
4662 if (jsonObjectData.contains("threads") && !jsonObjectData["threads"].is_null()) {
4663 pDataStructure->threads.clear();
4664 pDataStructure->threads.reserve(jsonObjectData["threads"].size());
4665 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["threads"]) {
4666 ChannelData newData{ value };
4667 pDataStructure->threads.push_back(newData);
4668 }
4669 pDataStructure->threads.shrink_to_fit();
4670 }
4671 }
4672 };
4673
4674 /// For removing a reaction. \brief For removing a reaction.
4675 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ReactionRemoveData : public DataParser<ReactionRemoveData> {
4676 Snowflake channelId{};
4677 Snowflake messageId{};
4678 Snowflake guildId{};
4679 Snowflake userId{};
4680 EmojiData emoji{};
4681
4682 ReactionRemoveData() = default;
4683
4684 ReactionRemoveData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4685 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4686 return *this;
4687 }
4688
4689 ReactionRemoveData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4690 *this = jsonObjectData;
4691 }
4692
4693 virtual ~ReactionRemoveData() = default;
4694
4695 protected:
4696 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ReactionRemoveData* pDataStructure) {
4697 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user_id") && !jsonObjectData["user_id"].is_null()) {
4698 pDataStructure->userId = stoull(jsonObjectData["user_id"].get<std::string>());
4699 }
4700
4701 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
4702 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
4703 }
4704
4705 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message_id") && !jsonObjectData["message_id"].is_null()) {
4706 pDataStructure->messageId = stoull(jsonObjectData["message_id"].get<std::string>());
4707 }
4708
4709 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
4710 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
4711 }
4712
4713 if (jsonObjectData.contains("emoji") && !jsonObjectData["emoji"].is_null()) {
4714 pDataStructure->emoji = jsonObjectData["emoji"];
4715 }
4716 }
4717 };
4718
4719 /// For storing Interaction-related values. \brief For storing Interaction-related values.
4720 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InteractionPackageData {

4723 Snowflake interactionId{};

4729 Snowflake messageId{};
