4732 /// Data structure representing an ApplicationCommand's option choice. \brief Data structure representing an ApplicationCommand's option choice.
4733 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData : public DataParser<ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData> {
4734 public:
4735 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> nameLocalizations{};///< Dictionary with keys in available locales Localization dictionary for the name field.
4736 nlohmann::json value{};///< The value of the option.
4737 std::string name{};///< The name of the current choice.
4738
4739 ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData() = default;
4740
4741 ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4742 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4743 return *this;
4744 }
4745
4746 ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4747 *this = jsonObjectData;
4748 }
4749
4750 virtual ~ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData() = default;
4751
4752 protected:
4753 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData* pDataStructure) {
4754 if (jsonObjectData.contains("value") && !jsonObjectData["value"].is_null() && jsonObjectData["value"].is_string()) {
4755 if (jsonObjectData["value"].is_string()) {
4756 pDataStructure->value = jsonObjectData["value"].get<std::string>();
4757 } else if (jsonObjectData["value"].is_number_float()) {
4758 pDataStructure->value = jsonObjectData["value"].get<float>();
4759 } else if (jsonObjectData["value"].is_number()) {
4760 pDataStructure->value = jsonObjectData["value"].get<int32_t>();
4761 }
4762 }
4763
4764 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
4765 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
4766 }
4767
4768 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name_localizations") && !jsonObjectData["name_localizations"].is_null()) {
4769 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations.clear();
4770 auto newMap = jsonObjectData["name_localizations"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>>();
4771 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
4772 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations[key] = newValue;
4773 }
4774 }
4775 }
4776 };
4777
4778 /// Data structure representing an ApplicationCommand's option. \brief Data structure representing an ApplicationCommand's option.
4779 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationCommandOptionData : public DataParser<ApplicationCommandOptionData> {
4780 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> descriptionLocalizations{};///< Dictionary for the description localizations field.
4781 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> nameLocalizations{};///< Dictionary for the name localizations field.
4782 std::vector<ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData> choices{};///< A std::vector of possible choices for the current ApplicationCommand option.
4783 std::vector<ApplicationCommandOptionData> options{};///< A std::vector of possible options for the current ApplicationCommand option.
4784 std::vector<ChannelType> channelTypes{};///< Set when the ApplicationCommand option type is set to Channel.
4785 ApplicationCommandOptionType type{};///< The type of command option.
4786 bool autocomplete{ false };///< If autocomplete interactions are enabled for this STRING, INTEGER, or NUMBER type option.
4787 std::string description{};///< A description of the current ApplicationCommand option.
4788 bool required{ false };///< If the parameter is required or optional-- default false.
4789 int32_t minValue{ 0 };///< If the option is an INTEGER or NUMBER type, the minimum value permitted.
4790 int32_t maxValue{ 0 };///< If the option is an INTEGER or NUMBER type, the maximum value permitted.
4791 std::string name{};///< Name of the current ApplicationCommand option.
4792
4793 ApplicationCommandOptionData() = default;
4794
4795 operator nlohmann::json() {
4796 nlohmann::json newOption{};
4797 if (this->type == DiscordCoreAPI::ApplicationCommandOptionType::Channel) {
4798 newOption["channel_types"] = this->channelTypes;
4799 }
4800 if (this->type != DiscordCoreAPI::ApplicationCommandOptionType::Sub_Command && this->type != DiscordCoreAPI::ApplicationCommandOptionType::Sub_Command_Group) {
4801 newOption["required"] = this->required;
4802 }
4803 newOption["description_localizations"] = this->descriptionLocalizations;
4804 newOption["name_localizations"] = this->nameLocalizations;
4805 newOption["description"] = this->description;
4806 newOption["min_value"] = this->minValue;
4807 newOption["max_value"] = this->maxValue;
4808 newOption["required"] = this->required;
4809 newOption["name"] = this->name;
4810 newOption["type"] = this->type;
4811 newOption["options"] = nlohmann::json{};
4812 newOption["choices"] = nlohmann::json{};
4813 if (this->choices.size() > 0) {
4814 for (int32_t x = 0; x < this->choices.size(); x++) {
4815 nlohmann::json jsonValue{};
4816 jsonValue["name_localizations"] = this->choices[x].nameLocalizations;
4817 jsonValue["value"] = this->choices[x].value;
4818 jsonValue["name"] = this->choices[x].name;
4819 newOption["choices"].push_back(jsonValue);
4820 }
4821 }
4822 if (newOption["choices"].size() == 0) {
4823 newOption["autocomplete"] = this->autocomplete;
4824 }
4825 if (this->options.size() > 0) {
4826 for (auto& value: options) {
4827 nlohmann::json theData = value;
4828 }
4829 }
4830 return newOption;
4831 }
4832
4833 ApplicationCommandOptionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4834 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4835 return *this;
4836 }
4837
4838 ApplicationCommandOptionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4839 *this = jsonObjectData;
4840 }
4841
4842 virtual ~ApplicationCommandOptionData() = default;
4843
4844 protected:
4845 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationCommandOptionData* pDataStructure) {
4846 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
4847 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
4848 }
4849
4850 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name_localizations") && !jsonObjectData["name_localizations"].is_null()) {
4851 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations.clear();
4852 auto newMap = jsonObjectData["name_localizations"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>>();
4853 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
4854 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations[key] = newValue;
4855 }
4856 }
4857
4858 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description_localizations") && !jsonObjectData["description_localizations"].is_null()) {
4859 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations.clear();
4860 auto newMap = jsonObjectData["description_localizations"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>>();
4861 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
4862 pDataStructure->descriptionLocalizations[key] = newValue;
4863 }
4864 }
4865
4866 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
4867 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
4868 }
4869
4870 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_types") && !jsonObjectData["channel_types"].is_null()) {
4871 pDataStructure->channelTypes.clear();
4872 pDataStructure->channelTypes.reserve(jsonObjectData["channel_types"].size());
4873 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["channel_types"]) {
4874 pDataStructure->channelTypes.push_back(value);
4875 }
4876 pDataStructure->channelTypes.shrink_to_fit();
4877 }
4878
4879 if (jsonObjectData.contains("min_value") && !jsonObjectData["min_value"].is_null()) {
4880 pDataStructure->minValue = jsonObjectData["min_value"].get<int32_t>();
4881 }
4882
4883 if (jsonObjectData.contains("max_value") && !jsonObjectData["max_value"].is_null()) {
4884 pDataStructure->maxValue = jsonObjectData["max_value"].get<int32_t>();
4885 }
4886
4887 if (jsonObjectData.contains("required") && !jsonObjectData["required"].is_null()) {
4888 pDataStructure->required = jsonObjectData["required"].get<bool>();
4889 }
4890
4891 if (jsonObjectData.contains("autocomplete") && !jsonObjectData["autocomplete"].is_null()) {
4892 pDataStructure->autocomplete = jsonObjectData["autocomplete"].get<bool>();
4893 }
4894
4895 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
4896 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ApplicationCommandOptionType>();
4897 }
4898
4899 if (pDataStructure->type == ApplicationCommandOptionType::Sub_Command_Group || pDataStructure->type == ApplicationCommandOptionType::Sub_Command) {
4900 if (jsonObjectData.contains("options") && !jsonObjectData["options"].is_null()) {
4901 pDataStructure->options.reserve(jsonObjectData["options"].size());
4902 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["options"]) {
4903 ApplicationCommandOptionData newData{ value };
4904 pDataStructure->options.push_back(newData);
4905 }
4906 pDataStructure->channelTypes.shrink_to_fit();
4907 }
4908 } else {
4909 if (jsonObjectData.contains("choices") && !jsonObjectData["choices"].is_null()) {
4910 pDataStructure->choices.clear();
4911 pDataStructure->choices.reserve(jsonObjectData["choices"].size());
4912 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["choices"]) {
4913 ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData newData{ value };
4914 pDataStructure->choices.push_back(newData);
4915 }
4916 pDataStructure->choices.shrink_to_fit();
4917 }
4918 }
4919 }
4920 };
4921
4922 /// Representing "TypingStart" data. \brief Representing "TypingStart" data.

4937 TypingStartData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {

4940

4942
4943 protected:

4945 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {

4948
4949 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
4950 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
4951 }
4952

4954 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
4955 }
4956

4960
4961 if (jsonObjectData.contains("timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["timestamp"].is_null()) {
4962 pDataStructure->timestamp = jsonObjectData["timestamp"].get<int32_t>();
4963 }
4964 }

4966
4967 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll YouTubeFormat {
4968 std::string signatureCipher{};
4969 std::string audioSampleRate{};
4970 int32_t averageBitrate{ 0 };
4971 int64_t contentLength{ 0 };
4972 std::string audioQuality{};
4973 std::string downloadUrl{};
4974 std::string signature{};
4975 std::string mimeType{};
4976 std::string quality{};
4977 std::string codecs{};
4978 std::string aitags{};
4979 int32_t bitrate{ 0 };
4980 int32_t height{ 0 };
4981 int32_t width{ 0 };
4982 int32_t itag{ 0 };
4983 int32_t fps{ 0 };
4984 };
4985
4986 /// YouTube format data. \brief YouTube format data.
4987 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll YouTubeFormatVector : public DataParser<YouTubeFormatVector> {
4988 std::vector<YouTubeFormat> theFormats{};
4989
4990 YouTubeFormatVector() = default;
4991
4992 YouTubeFormatVector& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4993 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
4994 return *this;
4995 }
4996
4997 YouTubeFormatVector(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
4998 *this = jsonObjectData;
4999 }
5000
5001 virtual ~YouTubeFormatVector() = default;
5002
5003 protected:
5004 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, YouTubeFormatVector* pDataStructure) {
5005 if (!jsonObjectData.is_null()) {
5006 if (jsonObjectData.contains("streamingData") && !jsonObjectData["streamingData"].is_null() && jsonObjectData["streamingData"].contains("formats") &&
5007 !jsonObjectData["streamingData"]["formats"].is_null()) {
5008 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["streamingData"]["formats"]) {
5009 YouTubeFormat newData{};
5010
5011 if (value.contains("audioQuality") && !value["audioQuality"].is_null()) {
5012 newData.audioQuality = value["audioQuality"].get<std::string>();
5013 }
5014
5015 if (value.contains("averageBitrate") && !value["averageBitrate"].is_null()) {
5016 newData.averageBitrate = value["averageBitrate"].get<int32_t>();
5017 }
5018
5019 if (value.contains("audioSampleRate") && !value["audioSampleRate"].is_null()) {
5020 newData.audioSampleRate = value["audioSampleRate"].get<std::string>();
5021 }
5022
5023 if (value.contains("bitrate") && !value["bitrate"].is_null()) {
5024 newData.bitrate = value["bitrate"].get<int32_t>();
5025 }
5026
5027 if (value.contains("contentLength") && !value["contentLength"].is_null()) {
5028 newData.contentLength = stoll(value["contentLength"].get<std::string>());
5029 }
5030
5031 if (value.contains("fps") && !value["fps"].is_null()) {
5032 newData.fps = value["fps"].get<int32_t>();
5033 }
5034
5035 if (value.contains("height") && !value["height"].is_null()) {
5036 newData.height = value["height"].get<int32_t>();
5037 }
5038
5039 if (value.contains("width") && !value["width"].is_null()) {
5040 newData.height = value["width"].get<int32_t>();
5041 }
5042
5043 if (value.contains("aitags") && !value["aitags"].is_null()) {
5044 newData.aitags = value["aitags"].get<std::string>();
5045 }
5046
5047 if (value.contains("itag") && !value["itag"].is_null()) {
5048 newData.itag = value["itag"].get<int32_t>();
5049 }
5050
5051 if (value.contains("url") && !value["url"].is_null()) {
5052 newData.downloadUrl = value["url"].get<std::string>();
5053 }
5054
5055 if (value.contains("mimeType") && !value["mimeType"].is_null()) {
5056 newData.mimeType = value["mimeType"].get<std::string>();
5057 }
5058
5059 if (value.contains("quality") && !value["quality"].is_null()) {
5060 newData.quality = value["quality"].get<std::string>();
5061 }
5062
5063 if (value.contains("signatureCipher") && !value["signatureCipher"].is_null()) {
5064 newData.signatureCipher = value["signatureCipher"].get<std::string>();
5065 } else if (value.contains("cipher") && !value["cipher"].is_null()) {
5066 newData.signatureCipher = value["cipher"].get<std::string>();
5067 }
5068
5069 if (newData.signatureCipher.find("&sp") != std::string::npos) {
5070 newData.signature = newData.signatureCipher.substr(0, newData.signatureCipher.find("&sp"));
5071 }
5072
5073 if (newData.signatureCipher.find("url") != std::string::npos) {
5074 newData.downloadUrl = newData.signatureCipher.substr(newData.signatureCipher.find("url") + 4);
5075 } else if (value.contains("url") && !value["url"].is_null()) {
5076 newData.downloadUrl = value["url"];
5077 }
5078
5079 pDataStructure->theFormats.push_back(newData);
5080 }
5081 }
5082
5083 if (jsonObjectData.contains("streamingData") && !jsonObjectData["streamingData"].is_null() && jsonObjectData["streamingData"].contains("adaptiveFormats") &&
5084 !jsonObjectData["streamingData"]["adaptiveFormats"].is_null()) {
5085 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["streamingData"]["adaptiveFormats"]) {
5086 YouTubeFormat newData{};
5087
5088 if (value.contains("audioQuality") && !value["audioQuality"].is_null()) {
5089 newData.audioQuality = value["audioQuality"].get<std::string>();
5090 }
5091
5092 if (value.contains("averageBitrate") && !value["averageBitrate"].is_null()) {
5093 newData.averageBitrate = value["averageBitrate"].get<int32_t>();
5094 }
5095
5096 if (value.contains("audioSampleRate") && !value["audioSampleRate"].is_null()) {
5097 newData.audioSampleRate = value["audioSampleRate"].get<std::string>();
5098 }
5099
5100 if (value.contains("bitrate") && !value["bitrate"].is_null()) {
5101 newData.bitrate = value["bitrate"].get<int32_t>();
5102 }
5103
5104 if (value.contains("contentLength") && !value["contentLength"].is_null()) {
5105 newData.contentLength = stoll(value["contentLength"].get<std::string>());
5106 }
5107
5108 if (value.contains("fps") && !value["fps"].is_null()) {
5109 newData.fps = value["fps"].get<int32_t>();
5110 }
5111
5112 if (value.contains("height") && !value["height"].is_null()) {
5113 newData.height = value["height"].get<int32_t>();
5114 }
5115
5116 if (value.contains("width") && !value["width"].is_null()) {
5117 newData.height = value["width"].get<int32_t>();
5118 }
5119
5120 if (value.contains("aitags") && !value["aitags"].is_null()) {
5121 newData.aitags = value["aitags"].get<std::string>();
5122 }
5123
5124 if (value.contains("itag") && !value["itag"].is_null()) {
5125 newData.itag = value["itag"].get<int32_t>();
5126 }
5127
5128 if (value.contains("mimeType") && !value["mimeType"].is_null()) {
5129 newData.mimeType = value["mimeType"].get<std::string>();
5130 }
5131
5132 if (value.contains("quality") && !value["quality"].is_null()) {
5133 newData.quality = value["quality"].get<std::string>();
5134 }
5135
5136 if (value.contains("signatureCipher") && !value["signatureCipher"].is_null()) {
5137 newData.signatureCipher = value["signatureCipher"].get<std::string>();
5138 } else if (value.contains("cipher") && !value["cipher"].is_null()) {
5139 newData.signatureCipher = value["cipher"].get<std::string>();
5140 }
5141
5142 if (newData.signatureCipher.find("&sp") != std::string::npos) {
5143 newData.signature = newData.signatureCipher.substr(0, newData.signatureCipher.find("&sp"));
5144 }
5145
5146 if (newData.signatureCipher.find("url") != std::string::npos) {
5147 newData.downloadUrl = newData.signatureCipher.substr(newData.signatureCipher.find("url") + 4);
5148 } else if (value.contains("url") && !value["url"].is_null()) {
5149 newData.downloadUrl = value["url"];
5150 }
5151 pDataStructure->theFormats.push_back(newData);
5152 }
5153 }
5154 }
5155 }
5156 };
5157
5158 /// Application command types. \brief Application command types.
5159 enum class ApplicationCommandType : int8_t {
5160 Chat_Input = 1,///< Chat input.
5161 User = 2,///< User.
5162 Message = 3///< Message.
5163 };

5215 /// Component types. \brief Component types.

5217 ActionRow = 1,///< A container for other components.

5219 SelectMenu = 3,///< A select menu for picking from choices.
5220 TextInput = 4///< A text input object
5221 };

5223 /// Component Interaction data. \brief Component Interaction data.
5224 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ComponentInteractionData : public DataParser<ComponentInteractionData> {
5225 std::vector<std::string> values{};///< The values of the components.
5226 ComponentType componentType{};///< The type of component.
5227 std::string customId{};///< The custom id of the Interaction entity.
5228
5229 ComponentInteractionData() = default;
5230
5231 ComponentInteractionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5232 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5233 return *this;
5234 }
5235
5236 ComponentInteractionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5237 *this = jsonObjectData;
5238 }
5239
5240 virtual ~ComponentInteractionData() = default;
5241
5242 protected:
5243 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ComponentInteractionData* pDataStructure) {
5244 if (jsonObjectData.contains("values") && !jsonObjectData["values"].is_null()) {
5245 pDataStructure->values.clear();
5246 pDataStructure->values.reserve(jsonObjectData["values"].size());
5247 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["values"]) {
5248 pDataStructure->values.push_back(value);
5249 }
5250 pDataStructure->values.shrink_to_fit();
5251 }
5252
5253 if (jsonObjectData.contains("custom_id") && !jsonObjectData["custom_id"].is_null()) {
5254 pDataStructure->customId = jsonObjectData["custom_id"].get<std::string>();
5255 }
5256
5257 if (jsonObjectData.contains("component_type") && !jsonObjectData["component_type"].is_null()) {
5258 pDataStructure->componentType = jsonObjectData["component_type"].get<ComponentType>();
5259 }
5260 }
5261 };

5263 /// Modal interaction data, for inputs from text modals. \brief Modal interaction data, for inputs from text modals.
5264 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ModalInteractionData : public DataParser<ModalInteractionData> {
5265 std::string customIdSmall{};///< The custom id of a particular modal input.
5266 std::string customId{};///< The custom id of the Interaction entity.
5267 std::string value{};///< The input value of the modal.
5268
5269 ModalInteractionData() = default;
5270
5271 ModalInteractionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5272 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5273 return *this;
5274 }
5275
5276 ModalInteractionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5277 *this = jsonObjectData;
5278 }
5279
5280 virtual ~ModalInteractionData() = default;
5281
5282 protected:
5283 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ModalInteractionData* pDataStructure) {
5284 if (jsonObjectData.contains("components") && !jsonObjectData["components"].is_null()) {
5285 pDataStructure->value = jsonObjectData["components"][0]["components"][0]["value"].get<std::string>();
5286 }
5287
5288 if (jsonObjectData.contains("custom_id") && !jsonObjectData["custom_id"].is_null()) {
5289 pDataStructure->customId = jsonObjectData["custom_id"].get<std::string>();
5290 }
5291
5292 if (jsonObjectData.contains("components") && !jsonObjectData["components"].is_null()) {
5293 pDataStructure->customIdSmall = jsonObjectData["components"][0]["components"][0]["custom_id"].get<std::string>();
5294 }
5295 }
5296 };
5297
5298 /// Allowable mentions for a Message. \brief Allowable mentions for a Message.
5299 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AllowedMentionsData : public DataParser<AllowedMentionsData> {
5300 public:
5301 std::vector<std::string> parse{};///< A std::vector of allowed mention types to parse from the content.
5302 std::vector<std::string> roles{};///< Array of role_ids to mention (Max size of 100)
5303 std::vector<std::string> users{};///< Array of user_ids to mention (Max size of 100)
5304 bool repliedUser{ false };///< For replies, whether to mention the author of the Message being replied to (default false).
5305
5306 AllowedMentionsData() = default;
5307
5308 operator nlohmann::json() {
5309 nlohmann::json newValue{};
5310 newValue["replied_user"] = this->repliedUser;
5311 newValue["parse"] = this->parse;
5312 newValue["roles"] = this->roles;
5313 newValue["users"] = this->users;
5314 return newValue;
5315 }
5316
5317 AllowedMentionsData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5318 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5319 return *this;
5320 }
5321
5322 AllowedMentionsData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5323 *this = jsonObjectData;
5324 }
5325
5326 virtual ~AllowedMentionsData() = default;
5327
5328 protected:
5329 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, AllowedMentionsData* pDataStructure) {
5330 if (jsonObjectData.contains("parse") && !jsonObjectData["parse"].is_null()) {
5331 pDataStructure->parse.clear();
5332 pDataStructure->parse.reserve(jsonObjectData["parse"].size());
5333 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["parse"]) {
5334 pDataStructure->parse.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
5335 }
5336 pDataStructure->parse.shrink_to_fit();
5337 }
5338
5339 if (jsonObjectData.contains("roles") && !jsonObjectData["roles"].is_null()) {
5340 pDataStructure->roles.clear();
5341 pDataStructure->roles.reserve(jsonObjectData["roles"].size());
5342 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["roles"]) {
5343 pDataStructure->roles.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
5344 }
5345 pDataStructure->roles.shrink_to_fit();
5346 }
5347
5348 if (jsonObjectData.contains("users") && !jsonObjectData["users"].is_null()) {
5349 pDataStructure->users.clear();
5350 pDataStructure->users.reserve(jsonObjectData["users"].size());
5351 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["users"]) {
5352 pDataStructure->users.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
5353 }
5354 pDataStructure->users.shrink_to_fit();
5355 }
5356
5357 if (jsonObjectData.contains("replied_user") && !jsonObjectData["replied_user"].is_null()) {
5358 pDataStructure->repliedUser = jsonObjectData["replied_user"].get<bool>();
5359 }
5360 }
5361 };
5362
5363 /// Interaction types. \brief Interaction types.
5364 enum class InteractionType : int8_t {
5365 Ping = 1,///< Ping.
5366 Application_Command = 2,///< Application command.
5367 Message_Component = 3,///< Message component.
5368 Application_Command_Autocomplete = 4,///< Application command autocomplete.
5369 Modal_Submit = 5///< Modal submission.
5370 };
5371
5372 /// Represents a single selection from a select-menu. \brief Represents a single selection from a select-menu.
5373 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll SelectOptionData : public DataParser<SelectOptionData> {
5374 public:
5375 std::string description{};///< Description of the select-menu-option.
5376 bool _default{ false };///< Is it the default option?
5377 std::string label{};///< A visible label for the select-menu-option.
5378 std::string value{};///< A value for identifying the option.
5379 EmojiData emoji{};///< An optional emoji to put on it.
5380
5381 SelectOptionData() = default;
5382
5383 SelectOptionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5384 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5385 return *this;
5386 }
5387
5388 SelectOptionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5389 *this = jsonObjectData;
5390 }
5391
5392 virtual ~SelectOptionData() = default;
5393
5394 protected:
5395 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, SelectOptionData* pDataStructure) {
5396 if (jsonObjectData.contains("label") && !jsonObjectData["label"].is_null()) {
5397 pDataStructure->label = jsonObjectData["label"].get<std::string>();
5398 }
5399
5400 if (jsonObjectData.contains("value") && !jsonObjectData["value"].is_null()) {
5401 pDataStructure->value = jsonObjectData["value"].get<std::string>();
5402 }
5403
5404 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
5405 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
5406 }
5407
5408 if (jsonObjectData.contains("emoji") && !jsonObjectData["emoji"].is_null()) {
5409 pDataStructure->emoji = jsonObjectData["emoji"];
5410 }
5411
5412 if (jsonObjectData.contains("default") && !jsonObjectData["default"].is_null()) {
5413 pDataStructure->_default = jsonObjectData["default"].get<bool>();
5414 }
5415 }
5416 };
5417
5418 /// Button styles. \brief Button styles.
5419 enum class ButtonStyle : int8_t {
5420 Primary = 1,///< Primary.
5421 Success = 3,///< Success.
5422 Secondary = 2,///< Secondary.
5423 Danger = 4,///< Danger.
5424 Link = 5///< Link.
5425 };
5426
5427 /// Represents a single Message-component. \brief Represents a single Message-component.
5428 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ComponentData {
5429 std::vector<SelectOptionData> options{};///< Aray of select options the choices in the select, max 25.
5430 std::string placeholder{};///< Custom placeholder text if nothing is selected, max 100 characters.
5431 std::string customId{};///< A developer-defined identifier for the component, max 100 characters.
5432 int32_t minValues{ 0 };///< The minimum number of items that must be chosen; default 1, min 0, max 25.
5433 int32_t maxValues{ 0 };///< The maximum number of items that can be chosen; default 1, max 25.
5434 bool disabled{ false };///< Whether the component is disabled, default false.
5435 int32_t minLength{ 0 };///< The minimum input length for a text input.
5436 int32_t maxLength{ 0 };///< The maximum input length for a text input.
5437 bool required{ false };///< Whether this component is required to be filled.
5438 ComponentType type{};///< Integer component type.
5439 std::string label{};///< The label for this component.
5440 std::string value{};///< A pre-filled value for this component.
5441 std::string title{};///< Url, for url types.
5442 int32_t style{};///< One of ButtonStyle, or TextInputStyle.
5443 std::string url{};///< Url, for url types.
5444 EmojiData emoji{};///< Emoji name, id, and animated.
5445 };
5446
5447 /// Action row data of Message components. \brief Action row data of Message components.
5448 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ActionRowData : public DataParser<ActionRowData> {
5449 public:
5450 std::vector<ComponentData> components{};///< Array of components to make up the action-row.
5451
5452 ActionRowData() = default;
5453
5454 ActionRowData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5455 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5456 return *this;
5457 }
5458
5459 operator nlohmann::json() {
5460 nlohmann::json components{};
5461 for (auto& valueNew: this->components) {
5462 if (valueNew.type == ComponentType::Button) {
5463 nlohmann::json component{};
5464 component["emoji"]["animated"] = valueNew.emoji.animated;
5465 StringWrapper theString = valueNew.emoji.name;
5466 component["emoji"]["name"] = static_cast<std::string>(theString);
5467 if (valueNew.emoji.id != 0) {
5468 component["emoji"]["id"] = valueNew.emoji.id;
5469 }
5470 component["custom_id"] = valueNew.customId;
5471 component["disabled"] = valueNew.disabled;
5472 component["label"] = valueNew.label;
5473 component["style"] = valueNew.style;
5474 component["type"] = valueNew.type;
5475 component["url"] = valueNew.url;
5476 components.push_back(component);
5477 } else if (valueNew.type == ComponentType::SelectMenu) {
5478 nlohmann::json optionsArray{};
5479 for (auto& value01: valueNew.options) {
5480 nlohmann::json option{};
5481 if (value01.emoji.name != "") {
5482 option["emoji"]["name"] = static_cast<std::string>(value01.emoji.name);
5483 option["emoji"]["animated"] = value01.emoji.animated;
5484 }
5485 if (value01.emoji.id != 0) {
5486 option["emoji"]["id"] = value01.emoji.id;
5487 }
5488 option["description"] = value01.description;
5489 option["default"] = value01._default;
5490 option["label"] = value01.label;
5491 option["value"] = value01.value;
5492 optionsArray.push_back(option);
5493 };
5494 nlohmann::json component{};
5495 component["placeholder"] = valueNew.placeholder;
5496 component["max_values"] = valueNew.maxValues;
5497 component["min_values"] = valueNew.minValues;
5498 component["custom_id"] = valueNew.customId;
5499 component["disabled"] = valueNew.disabled;
5500 component["options"] = optionsArray;
5501 component["type"] = valueNew.type;
5502 components.push_back(component);
5503
5504 } else if (valueNew.type == ComponentType::TextInput) {
5505 nlohmann::json component{};
5506 component["placeholder"] = valueNew.placeholder;
5507 component["min_length"] = valueNew.minLength;
5508 component["max_length"] = valueNew.maxLength;
5509 component["custom_id"] = valueNew.customId;
5510 component["required"] = valueNew.required;
5511 component["style"] = valueNew.style;
5512 component["label"] = valueNew.label;
5513 component["value"] = valueNew.value;
5514 component["type"] = valueNew.type;
5515 components.push_back(component);
5516 }
5517 }
5518 nlohmann::json theData{};
5519 theData["type"] = 1;
5520 theData["components"] = components;
5521 return theData;
5522 }
5523
5524 ActionRowData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5525 *this = jsonObjectData;
5526 }
5527
5528 virtual ~ActionRowData() = default;
5529
5530 protected:
5531 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ActionRowData* pDataStructure) {
5532 if (jsonObjectData.contains("components") && !jsonObjectData["components"].is_null()) {
5533 pDataStructure->components.clear();
5534 pDataStructure->components.reserve(jsonObjectData["components"].size());
5535 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["components"]) {
5536 ComponentData newData{};
5537 if (value.contains("type") && !value["type"].is_null()) {
5538 newData.type = value["type"].get<ComponentType>();
5539 }
5540
5541 if (value.contains("custom_id") && !value["custom_id"].is_null()) {
5542 newData.customId = value["custom_id"].get<std::string>();
5543 }
5544
5545 if (value.contains("placeholder") && !value["placeholder"].is_null()) {
5546 newData.placeholder = value["placeholder"].get<std::string>();
5547 }
5548
5549 if (value.contains("disabled") && !value["disabled"].is_null()) {
5550 newData.disabled = value["disabled"].get<bool>();
5551 }
5552
5553 if (value.contains("style") && !value["style"].is_null()) {
5554 newData.style = value["style"].get<int32_t>();
5555 }
5556
5557 if (value.contains("label") && !value["label"].is_null()) {
5558 newData.label = value["label"].get<std::string>();
5559 }
5560
5561 if (value.contains("min_length") && !value["min_length"].is_null()) {
5562 newData.minLength = value["min_length"].get<int32_t>();
5563 }
5564
5565 if (value.contains("max_length") && !value["max_length"].is_null()) {
5566 newData.maxLength = value["max_length"].get<int32_t>();
5567 }
5568
5569 if (value.contains("value") && !value["value"].is_null()) {
5570 newData.value = value["value"].get<std::string>();
5571 }
5572
5573 if (value.contains("required") && !value["required"].is_null()) {
5574 newData.required = value["required"].get<bool>();
5575 }
5576
5577 if (value.contains("emoji") && !value["emoji"].is_null()) {
5578 newData.emoji = value["emoji"];
5579 }
5580
5581 if (value.contains("url") && !value["url"].is_null()) {
5582 newData.url = value["url"].get<std::string>();
5583 }
5584
5585 if (value.contains("options") && !value["options"].is_null()) {
5586 newData.options.reserve(value["options"].size());
5587 for (auto& value02: value["options"]) {
5588 SelectOptionData newerData{ value };
5589 newData.options.push_back(newerData);
5590 }
5591 newData.options.shrink_to_fit();
5592 }
5593
5594 if (value.contains("max_values") && !value["max_values"].is_null()) {
5595 newData.maxValues = value["max_values"].get<int32_t>();
5596 }
5597
5598 if (value.contains("min_values") && !value["min_values"].is_null()) {
5599 newData.minValues = value["min_values"].get<int32_t>();
5600 }
5601
5602 pDataStructure->components.push_back(newData);
5603 }
5604 }
5605 pDataStructure->components.shrink_to_fit();
5606 }
5607 };
5608
5609 /// Interaction callback types. \brief Interaction callback types.
5610 enum class InteractionCallbackType : int8_t {
5611 Pong = 1,///< ACK a Ping.
5612 Channel_Message_With_Source = 4,///< Respond to an interaction with a message.
5613 Deferred_Channel_Message_With_Source = 5,///< ACK an interaction and edit a response later, the user sees a loading state.
5614 Deferred_Update_Message = 6,///< For components, ACK an interaction and edit the original message later; the user does not see a loading state.
5615 Update_Message = 7,///< For components, edit the message the component was attached to.
5616 Application_Command_Autocomplete_Result = 8,///< Respond to an autocomplete interaction with suggested choices.
5617 Modal = 9///< Respond to an interaction with a popup modal.
5618 };
5619
5620 /// Interaction ApplicationCommand callback data. \brief Interaction ApplicationCommand callback data.
5621 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InteractionCallbackData {
5622 std::vector<ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData> choices{};///< Autocomplete choices(max of 25 choices).
5623 std::vector<AttachmentData> attachments{};///< Array of partial attachment objects attachment objects with filename and description.
5624 std::vector<ActionRowData> components{};///< Message components.
5625 AllowedMentionsData allowedMentions{};///< Allowed mentions data.
5626 std::vector<EmbedData> embeds{};///< Message embeds.
5627 std::vector<File> files{};///< Files for uploading.
5628 std::string customId{};///< A developer-defined identifier for the component, max 100 characters.
5629 std::string content{};///< Message content.
5630 std::string title{};///< The title of the popup modal.
5631 int32_t flags{ 0 };///< Flags.
5632 bool tts{ false };///< Is it TTS?
5633 };
5634
5635 /// Data structure representing an ApplicationCommand. \brief Data structure representing an ApplicationCommand.
5636 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationCommandData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ApplicationCommandData> {
5637 public:
5638 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> descriptionLocalizations{};///< Dictionary with keys in available locales Localization dictionary for name field.
5639 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> nameLocalizations{};///< Dictionary with keys in available locales Localization dictionary for name field.
5640 std::vector<ApplicationCommandOptionData> options{};///< A std::vector of possible options for the current ApplicationCommand.
5641 std::string defaultMemberPermissions{};///< Set of permissions represented as a bit set all
5642 ApplicationCommandType type{};///< The type of ApplicationCommand.
5643 bool dmPermission{ false };///< Indicates whether the command is available in DMs with the app, only for globally - scoped commands.
5644 std::string description{};///< A description of the current ApplicationCommand.
5645 Snowflake applicationId{};///< The current application id.
5646 std::string version{};///< An autoincremented version.
5647 std::string name{};///< Name of the current ApplicationCommand.
5648 Snowflake guildId{};///< (Where applicable) a Guild id for which guild to assign this ApplicationCommand to.
5649
5650 ApplicationCommandData() = default;
5651
5652 ApplicationCommandData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5653 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5654 return *this;
5655 }
5656
5657 ApplicationCommandData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5658 *this = jsonObjectData;
5659 }
5660
5661 virtual ~ApplicationCommandData() = default;
5662
5663 protected:
5664 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationCommandData* pDataStructure) {
5665 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
5666 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
5667 }
5668
5669 if (jsonObjectData.contains("default_member_permissions") && !jsonObjectData["default_member_permissions"].is_null()) {
5670 pDataStructure->defaultMemberPermissions = jsonObjectData["default_member_permissions"].get<std::string>();
5671 }
5672
5673 if (jsonObjectData.contains("dm_permission") && !jsonObjectData["dm_permission"].is_null()) {
5674 pDataStructure->dmPermission = jsonObjectData["dm_permission"].get<bool>();
5675 }
5676
5677 if (jsonObjectData.contains("version") && !jsonObjectData["version"].is_null()) {
5678 pDataStructure->version = jsonObjectData["version"].get<std::string>();
5679 }
5680
5681 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
5682 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ApplicationCommandType>();
5683 }
5684
5685 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name_localizations") && !jsonObjectData["name_localizations"].is_null()) {
5686 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations.clear();
5687 auto newMap = jsonObjectData["name_localizations"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>>();
5688 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
5689 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations[key] = newValue;
5690 }
5691 }
5692
5693 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description_localizations") && !jsonObjectData["description_localizations"].is_null()) {
5694 pDataStructure->nameLocalizations.clear();
5695 auto newMap = jsonObjectData["description_localizations"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>>();
5696 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
5697 pDataStructure->descriptionLocalizations[key] = newValue;
5698 }
5699 }
5700
5701 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application_id") && !jsonObjectData["application_id"].is_null()) {
5702 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["application_id"].get<std::string>());
5703 }
5704
5705 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
5706 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
5707 }
5708
5709 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
5710 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
5711 }
5712
5713 if (jsonObjectData.contains("version") && !jsonObjectData["version"].is_null()) {
5714 pDataStructure->version = jsonObjectData["version"].get<std::string>();
5715 }
5716
5717 if (jsonObjectData.contains("options") && !jsonObjectData["options"].is_null()) {
5718 pDataStructure->options.reserve(jsonObjectData["options"].size());
5719 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["options"]) {
5720 ApplicationCommandOptionData newData{ value };
5721 pDataStructure->options.push_back(newData);
5722 }
5723 pDataStructure->options.shrink_to_fit();
5724 }
5725 }
5726 };
5727
5728 /// Channel mention data. \brief Channel mention data.
5729 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ChannelMentionData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ChannelMentionData> {
5730 public:
5731 Snowflake guildId{};///< The id of the Guild where it took place.
5732 std::string name{};///< The name of the Channel that was mentioned.
5733 ChannelType type{};///< The type of Channel that was mentioned.
5734
5735 ChannelMentionData() = default;
5736
5737 ChannelMentionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5738 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5739 return *this;
5740 }
5741
5742 ChannelMentionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5743 *this = jsonObjectData;
5744 }
5745
5746 virtual ~ChannelMentionData() = default;
5747
5748 protected:
5749 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ChannelMentionData* pDataStructure) {
5750 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
5751 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
5752 }
5753
5754 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
5755 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
5756 }
5757
5758 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
5759 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ChannelType>();
5760 }
5761
5762 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
5763 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
5764 }
5765 }
5766 };
5767
5768 /// Data for when some Channel pins are updated. \brief Data for when some Channel pins are updated.
5769 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ChannelPinsUpdateEventData : public DataParser<ChannelPinsUpdateEventData> {
5770 TimeStamp lastPinTimestamp{ "" };///< The time of the last pinned Message.
5771 Snowflake channelId{};///< The id of the Channel within which the Message was pinned.
5772 Snowflake guildId{};///< The id of the Guild within which the Message was pinned.
5773
5774 ChannelPinsUpdateEventData() = default;
5775
5776 ChannelPinsUpdateEventData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5777 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5778 return *this;
5779 }
5780
5781 ChannelPinsUpdateEventData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5782 *this = jsonObjectData;
5783 }
5784
5785 virtual ~ChannelPinsUpdateEventData() = default;
5786
5787 protected:
5788 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ChannelPinsUpdateEventData* pDataStructre) {
5789 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
5790 pDataStructre->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
5791 }
5792
5793 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
5794 pDataStructre->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
5795 }
5796
5797 if (jsonObjectData.contains("last_pin_timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["last_pin_timestamp"].is_null()) {
5798 pDataStructre->lastPinTimestamp = jsonObjectData["last_pin_timestamp"].get<std::string>();
5799 }
5800 }
5801 };
5802
5803 /// Data for when threads are synced. \brief Data for when threads are synced.
5804 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ThreadListSyncData : public DataParser<ThreadListSyncData> {
5805 std::vector<ThreadMemberData> members{};///< Array of members that are a part of the Thread.
5806 std::vector<std::string> channelIds{};///< The parent Channel ids whose threads are being synced. If omitted, then threads were synced for entire Guild.
5807 std::vector<ChannelData> threads{};///< All active threads in the given channels that the current User can access.
5808 Snowflake guildId{};///< The id of the Guild for which the threads are being synced.
5809
5810 ThreadListSyncData() = default;
5811
5812 ThreadListSyncData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5813 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5814 return *this;
5815 }
5816
5817 ThreadListSyncData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5818 *this = jsonObjectData;
5819 }
5820
5821 virtual ~ThreadListSyncData() = default;
5822
5823 protected:
5824 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ThreadListSyncData* pDataStructure) {
5825 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
5826 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
5827 }
5828
5829 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_ids") && !jsonObjectData["channel_ids"].is_null()) {
5830 pDataStructure->channelIds.clear();
5831 pDataStructure->channelIds.reserve(jsonObjectData["channel_ids"].size());
5832 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["channel_ids"]) {
5833 pDataStructure->channelIds.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
5834 }
5835 pDataStructure->channelIds.shrink_to_fit();
5836 }
5837
5838 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members") && !jsonObjectData["members"].is_null()) {
5839 pDataStructure->members.clear();
5840 pDataStructure->members.reserve(jsonObjectData["members"].size());
5841 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["members"]) {
5842 ThreadMemberData newData{ value };
5843 pDataStructure->members.push_back(newData);
5844 }
5845 pDataStructure->members.shrink_to_fit();
5846 }
5847
5848 if (jsonObjectData.contains("threads") && !jsonObjectData["threads"].is_null()) {
5849 pDataStructure->threads.clear();
5850 pDataStructure->threads.reserve(jsonObjectData["threads"].size());
5851 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["threads"]) {
5852 ChannelData newData{ value };
5853 pDataStructure->threads.push_back(newData);
5854 }
5855 pDataStructure->threads.shrink_to_fit();
5856 }
5857 }
5858 };
5859
5860 /// Represents a Thread-members-update. \brief Represents a Thread-members-update.
5861 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ThreadMembersUpdateData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ThreadMembersUpdateData> {
5862 public:
5863 std::vector<ThreadMemberData> addedMembers{};///< New members added to the Thread.
5864 std::vector<std::string> removedMemberIds{};///< Members who have been removed.
5865 int32_t memberCount{ 0 };///< Number of Guild-members in the Thread.
5866 Snowflake guildId{};///< Guild id of the Thread.
5867
5868 ThreadMembersUpdateData() = default;
5869
5870 ThreadMembersUpdateData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5871 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5872 return *this;
5873 }
5874
5875 ThreadMembersUpdateData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5876 *this = jsonObjectData;
5877 }
5878
5879 virtual ~ThreadMembersUpdateData() = default;
5880
5881 protected:
5882 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ThreadMembersUpdateData* pDataStructure) {
5883 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
5884 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
5885 }
5886
5887 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
5888 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
5889 }
5890
5891 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member_count") && !jsonObjectData["member_count"].is_null()) {
5892 pDataStructure->memberCount = jsonObjectData["member_count"].get<int32_t>();
5893 }
5894
5895 if (jsonObjectData.contains("added_members") && !jsonObjectData["added_members"].is_null()) {
5896 pDataStructure->addedMembers.clear();
5897 pDataStructure->addedMembers.reserve(jsonObjectData["added_members"].size());
5898 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["added_members"]) {
5899 ThreadMemberData newData{ value };
5900 pDataStructure->addedMembers.push_back(newData);
5901 }
5902 pDataStructure->addedMembers.shrink_to_fit();
5903 }
5904
5905 if (jsonObjectData.contains("removed_member_ids") && !jsonObjectData["removed_member_ids"].is_null()) {
5906 pDataStructure->removedMemberIds.clear();
5907 pDataStructure->removedMemberIds.reserve(jsonObjectData["removed_member_ids"].size());
5908 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["removed_member_ids"]) {
5909 pDataStructure->removedMemberIds.push_back(value);
5910 }
5911 pDataStructure->removedMemberIds.shrink_to_fit();
5912 }
5913 }
5914 };
5915
5916 /// Message Interaction data. \brief Message Interaction data.
5917 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MessageInteractionData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<MessageInteractionData> {
5918 public:
5919 GuildMemberData member{};
5920 InteractionType type{};
5921 std::string name{};
5922 UserData user{};
5923
5924 MessageInteractionData() = default;
5925
5926 MessageInteractionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5927 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
5928 return *this;
5929 }
5930
5931 MessageInteractionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
5932 *this = jsonObjectData;
5933 }
5934
5935 virtual ~MessageInteractionData() = default;
5936
5937 protected:
5938 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, MessageInteractionData* pDataStructure) {
5939 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
5940 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
5941 }
5942
5943 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
5944 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<InteractionType>();
5945 }
5946

5949 }
5950
5951 if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
5952 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
5953 }
5954
5955 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
5956 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
5957 }
5958 }
5959 };
5960
5961 /// Message types. \brief Message types.
5962 enum class MessageType : int8_t {
5963 Default = 0,///< Default.
5964 Recipient_Add = 1,///< Recipient add.
5965 Recipient_Remove = 2,///< Recipient remove.
5966 Call = 3,///< Call.
5967 Channel_Name_Change = 4,///< Channel name change.
5968 Channel_Icon_Change = 5,///< Channel icon change.
5969 Channel_Pinned_Message = 6,///< Channel pinned Message.
5970 Guild_Member_Join = 7,///< Guild memeber join.
5971 User_Premium_Guild_Subscription = 8,///< User premium Guild subscription.
5972 User_Premium_Guild_Subscription_Tier_1 = 9,///< User premium Guild subscription tier 1.
5973 User_Premium_Guild_Subscription_Tier_2 = 10,///< User premium Guild subscription tier 2.
5974 User_Premium_Guild_Subscription_Tier_3 = 11,///< User premium Guild subscription tier 3.
5975 Channel_Follow_Add = 12,///< Channel follow add.
5976 Guild_Discovery_Disqualified = 14,///< Guild discovery disqualified.
5977 Guild_Discovery_Requalified = 15,///< Guild discovery requalified.
5978 Guild_Discovery_Grace_Period_Initial_Warning = 16,///< Guild discovery grade period initial warning.
5979 Guild_Discovery_Grace_Period_Final_Warning = 17,///< Guild discovery grade period final warning.
5980 Thread_Created = 18,///< Thread created.
5981 Reply = 19,///< Reply.
5982 Chat_Input_Command = 20,///< Chat input command.
5983 Thread_Starter_Message = 21,///< Thread starter Message.
5984 Guild_Invite_Reminder = 22,///< Guild invite reminder.
5985 Context_Menu_Command = 23///< Context menu command.
5986 };
5987
5988 /// Message flags. \brief Message flags.
5989 enum class MessageFlags : uint8_t {
5990 Crossposted = 1 << 0,///< Crossposted.
5991 Is_Crosspost = 1 << 1,///< Is crosspost.
5992 Suppress_Embeds = 1 << 2,///< Supress embeds.
5993 Source_Message_Deleted = 1 << 3,///< Source Message deleted.
5994 Urgent = 1 << 4,///< Urgent.
5995 Has_Thread = 1 << 5,///< Has Thread.
5996 Ephemeral = 1 << 6,///< Ephemeral.
5997 Loading = 1 << 7///< Loading.
5998 };
5999
6000 /// Sticker item types. \brief Sticker item types.
6001 enum class StickerItemType : int8_t {
6002 Png = 1,///< Png.
6003 Apng = 2,///< Apng.
6004 Lottie = 3///< Lottie.
6005 };
6006
6007 /// Represents a forum thread message. \brief Represents a forum thread message.
6008 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ForumThreadMessageData {
6009 std::vector<AttachmentData> attachments{};///< Array of partial attachment objects attachment objects with filename.
6010 std::vector<ActionRowData> components{};///< Array of message component objects the components to include with the message.
6011 AllowedMentionsData allowedMentions{};///< Allowed mention object allowed mentions for the message.
6012 std::vector<std::string> stickerIds{};///< Array of snowflakes IDs of up to 3 stickers in the server to send in the message.
6013 std::vector<EmbedData> embeds{};///< Array of embed objects embedded rich content (up to 6000 characters).
6014 std::vector<File> files{};///< File contents the contents of the file being sent one of content, file, embed(s), sticker_ids.
6015 std::string content{};///< The message contents (up to 2000 characters).
6016 int32_t flags{ 0 };///< Flags to be set for the message.
6017 };
6018
6019 /// Message Sticker item data. \brief Message Sticker item data.
6020 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll StickerItemData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<StickerItemData> {
6021 public:
6022 StickerItemType formatType{};///< Message Sticker item type.
6023 std::string name{};///< The name of the Sticker.
6024
6025 StickerItemData() = default;
6026
6027 StickerItemData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6028 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6029 return *this;
6030 }
6031
6032 StickerItemData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6033 *this = jsonObjectData;
6034 }
6035
6036 virtual ~StickerItemData() = default;
6037
6038 protected:
6039 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, StickerItemData* pDataStructure) {
6040 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6041 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
6042 }
6043
6044 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
6045 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
6046 }
6047
6048 if (jsonObjectData.contains("format_type") && !jsonObjectData["format_type"].is_null()) {
6049 pDataStructure->formatType = jsonObjectData["format_type"].get<StickerItemType>();
6050 }
6051 }
6052 };
6053
6054 /// The core of a Message's data structure. \brief The core of a Message's data structure.
6055 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MessageDataOld : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<MessageDataOld> {
6056 public:
6057 std::vector<ChannelMentionData> mentionChannels{};///< array of Channel mention data.
6058 std::vector<StickerItemData> stickerItems{};///< Array of Message Sticker item data.
6059 std::vector<AttachmentData> attachments{};///< Array of attachment data.
6060 MessageReferenceData messageReference{};///< Message reference data.
6061 std::vector<std::string> mentionRoles{};///< Vector of "mention roles" ids.
6062 std::vector<ActionRowData> components{};///< Array of action row data.
6063 std::vector<ReactionData> reactions{};//< Array of reaction data.
6064 MessageInteractionData interaction{};///< Message Interaction data.
6065 std::vector<StickerData> stickers{};///< Array of Message Sticker data.
6066 std::vector<UserData> mentions{};///< Array of User data, for individual's that were mentioned.
6067 std::vector<EmbedData> embeds{};///< Array of Message embeds.
6068 TimeStamp editedTimestamp{ "" };///< The time at which it was edited.
6069 MessageActivityData activity{};///< Message activity data.
6070 bool mentionEveryone{ false };///< Does the Message mention everyone?
6071 ApplicationData application{};///< Application data.
6072 TimeStamp timestamp{ "" };///< The timestamp of when the Message was created.
6073 Snowflake applicationId{};///< Application id.
6074 GuildMemberData member{};///< The author's Guild member data.
6075 std::string content{};///< The Message's content.
6076 Snowflake channelId{};///< The Channel it was sent in.
6077 Snowflake webHookId{};///< WebHook id of the Message, if applicable.
6078 bool pinned{ false };///< Is it pinned?
6079 ChannelData thread{};///< The Thread that the Message was sent in, if applicable.
6080 std::string nonce{};///< Nonce.
6081 int32_t flags{ 0 };///< Flags.
6082 Snowflake guildId{};///< The id of the Guild the Message was sent in.
6083 MessageType type{};///< Message type.
6084 UserData author{};///< The author's User data.
6085 bool tts{ false };///< Is it a text-to-speech Message?
6086
6087 MessageDataOld() = default;
6088
6089 MessageDataOld& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6090 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6091 return *this;
6092 }
6093
6094 MessageDataOld(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6095 *this = jsonObjectData;
6096 }
6097
6098 virtual ~MessageDataOld() = default;
6099
6100 protected:
6101 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, MessageDataOld* pDataStructure) {
6102 if (jsonObjectData.contains("content") && !jsonObjectData["content"].is_null()) {
6103 pDataStructure->content = jsonObjectData["content"].get<std::string>();
6104 }
6105
6106 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6107 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
6108 }
6109
6110 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
6111 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
6112 }
6113
6114 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
6115 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
6116 }
6117
6118 if (jsonObjectData.contains("author") && !jsonObjectData["author"].is_null()) {
6119 pDataStructure->author = jsonObjectData["author"];
6120 }
6121
6122 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
6123 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
6124 }
6125
6126 if (jsonObjectData.contains("timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["timestamp"].is_null()) {
6127 pDataStructure->timestamp = jsonObjectData["timestamp"].get<std::string>();
6128 }
6129
6130 if (jsonObjectData.contains("edited_timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["edited_timestamp"].is_null()) {
6131 pDataStructure->editedTimestamp = jsonObjectData["edited_timestamp"].get<std::string>();
6132
6133
6134 if (jsonObjectData.contains("tts") && !jsonObjectData["tts"].is_null()) {
6135 pDataStructure->tts = jsonObjectData["tts"].get<bool>();
6136 }
6137
6138 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mention_everyone") && !jsonObjectData["mention_everyone"].is_null()) {
6139 pDataStructure->mentionEveryone = jsonObjectData["mention_everyone"].get<bool>();
6140 }
6141
6142 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mentions") && !jsonObjectData["mentions"].is_null()) {
6143 pDataStructure->mentions.clear();
6144 pDataStructure->mentions.reserve(jsonObjectData["mentions"].size());
6145 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["mentions"]) {
6146 UserData newData{ value };
6147 pDataStructure->mentions.push_back(newData);
6148 }
6149 pDataStructure->mentions.shrink_to_fit();
6150 }
6151
6152 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mention_roles") && !jsonObjectData["mention_roles"].is_null()) {
6153 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.clear();
6154 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.reserve(jsonObjectData["mention_roles"].size());
6155 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["mention_roles"]) {
6156 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
6157 }
6158 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.shrink_to_fit();
6159 }
6160
6161 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mention_channels") && !jsonObjectData["mention_channels"].is_null()) {
6162 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.clear();
6163 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.reserve(jsonObjectData["mention_channels"].size());
6164 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["mention_channels"]) {
6165 ChannelMentionData newData{ value };
6166 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.push_back(newData);
6167 }
6168 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.shrink_to_fit();
6169 }
6170
6171 if (jsonObjectData.contains("attachments") && !jsonObjectData["attachments"].is_null()) {
6172 pDataStructure->attachments.clear();
6173 pDataStructure->attachments.reserve(jsonObjectData["attachments"].size());
6174 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["attachments"]) {
6175 AttachmentData newData{ value };
6176 pDataStructure->attachments.push_back(newData);
6177 }
6178 pDataStructure->attachments.shrink_to_fit();
6179 }
6180
6181 if (jsonObjectData.contains("embeds") && !jsonObjectData["embeds"].is_null()) {
6182 pDataStructure->embeds.clear();
6183 pDataStructure->embeds.reserve(jsonObjectData["embeds"].size());
6184 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["embeds"]) {
6185 EmbedData newData{ value };
6186 pDataStructure->embeds.push_back(newData);
6187 }
6188 pDataStructure->embeds.shrink_to_fit();
6189 }
6190
6191 if (jsonObjectData.contains("reactions") && !jsonObjectData["reactions"].is_null()) {
6192 pDataStructure->reactions.clear();
6193 pDataStructure->reactions.reserve(jsonObjectData["reactions"].size());
6194 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["reactions"]) {
6195 ReactionData newData{ value };
6196 pDataStructure->reactions.push_back(newData);
6197 }
6198 pDataStructure->reactions.shrink_to_fit();
6199 }
6200
6201 if (jsonObjectData.contains("nonce") && !jsonObjectData["nonce"].is_null()) {
6202 pDataStructure->nonce = jsonObjectData["nonce"].get<std::string>();
6203 }
6204
6205 if (jsonObjectData.contains("pinned") && !jsonObjectData["pinned"].is_null()) {
6206 pDataStructure->pinned = jsonObjectData["pinned"].get<bool>();
6207 }
6208
6209 if (jsonObjectData.contains("webhook_id") && !jsonObjectData["webhook_id"].is_null()) {
6210 pDataStructure->webHookId = stoull(jsonObjectData["webhook_id"].get<std::string>());
6211 }
6212
6213 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
6214 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<MessageType>();
6215 }
6216
6217 if (jsonObjectData.contains("activity") && !jsonObjectData["activity"].is_null()) {
6218 pDataStructure->activity = jsonObjectData["activity"];
6219 }
6220
6221 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application") && !jsonObjectData["application"].is_null()) {
6222 pDataStructure->application = jsonObjectData["application"];
6223 }
6224
6225 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application_id") && !jsonObjectData["application_id"].is_null()) {
6226 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["application_id"].get<std::string>());
6227 }
6228
6229 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message_reference") && !jsonObjectData["message_reference"].is_null()) {
6230 pDataStructure->messageReference = jsonObjectData["message_reference"];
6231 }
6232
6233 if (jsonObjectData.contains("flags") && !jsonObjectData["flags"].is_null()) {
6234 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["flags"].get<int32_t>();
6235 }
6236
6237 if (jsonObjectData.contains("sticker_items") && !jsonObjectData["sticker_items"].is_null()) {
6238 pDataStructure->stickerItems.clear();
6239 pDataStructure->stickerItems.reserve(jsonObjectData["sticker_items"].size());
6240 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["sticker_items"]) {
6241 StickerItemData newData{ value };
6242 pDataStructure->stickerItems.push_back(newData);
6243 }
6244 pDataStructure->stickerItems.shrink_to_fit();
6245 }
6246
6247 if (jsonObjectData.contains("stickers") && !jsonObjectData["stickers"].is_null()) {
6248 pDataStructure->stickers.clear();
6249 pDataStructure->stickers.reserve(jsonObjectData["stickers"].size());
6250 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["stickers"]) {
6251 StickerData newData{ value };
6252 pDataStructure->stickers.push_back(newData);
6253 }
6254 pDataStructure->stickers.shrink_to_fit();
6255 }
6256
6257 if (jsonObjectData.contains("interaction") && !jsonObjectData["interaction"].is_null()) {
6258 pDataStructure->interaction = jsonObjectData["interaction"];
6259 }
6260
6261 if (jsonObjectData.contains("components") && !jsonObjectData["components"].is_null()) {
6262 pDataStructure->components.clear();
6263 pDataStructure->components.reserve(jsonObjectData["components"].size());
6264 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["components"]) {
6265 ActionRowData newData{ value };
6266 pDataStructure->components.push_back(newData);
6267 }
6268 pDataStructure->components.shrink_to_fit();
6269 }
6270
6271 if (jsonObjectData.contains("thread") && !jsonObjectData["thread"].is_null()) {
6272 pDataStructure->thread = jsonObjectData["thread"];
6273 }
6274 }
6275 }
6276 };
6277
6278 /// Data structure representing a single Message. \brief Data structure representing a single Message.
6279 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MessageData : public MessageDataOld, public DataParser<MessageData> {
6280 public:
6281 std::unique_ptr<MessageDataOld> referencedMessage{ std::make_unique<MessageDataOld>() };///< The referenced Message, to reply to.
6282
6283 MessageData& operator=(const MessageData& other) {
6284 if (this != &other) {
6285 *this->referencedMessage = *other.referencedMessage;
6286 this->messageReference = other.messageReference;
6287 this->mentionEveryone = other.mentionEveryone;
6288 this->mentionChannels = other.mentionChannels;
6289 this->editedTimestamp = other.editedTimestamp;
6290 this->applicationId = other.applicationId;
6291 this->stickerItems = other.stickerItems;
6292 this->mentionRoles = other.mentionRoles;
6293 this->application = other.application;
6294 this->interaction = other.interaction;
6295 this->attachments = other.attachments;
6296 this->components = other.components;
6297 this->timestamp = other.timestamp;
6298 this->channelId = other.channelId;
6299 this->webHookId = other.webHookId;
6300 this->reactions = other.reactions;
6301 this->activity = other.activity;
6302 this->mentions = other.mentions;
6303 this->stickers = other.stickers;
6304 this->content = other.content;
6305 this->guildId = other.guildId;
6306 this->member = other.member;
6307 this->thread = other.thread;
6308 this->pinned = other.pinned;
6309 this->author = other.author;
6310 this->embeds = other.embeds;
6311 this->nonce = other.nonce;
6312 this->flags = other.flags;
6313 this->type = other.type;
6314 this->tts = other.tts;
6315 this->id = other.id;
6316 }
6317 return *this;
6318 }
6319
6320 MessageData(const MessageData& other) {
6321 *this = other;
6322 }
6323
6324 MessageData() = default;
6325
6326 MessageData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6327 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6328 return *this;
6329 }
6330
6331 MessageData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6332 *this = jsonObjectData;
6333 }
6334
6335 virtual ~MessageData() = default;
6336
6337 protected:
6338 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, MessageData* pDataStructure) {
6339 if (jsonObjectData.contains("content") && !jsonObjectData["content"].is_null()) {
6340 pDataStructure->content = jsonObjectData["content"].get<std::string>();
6341 }
6342
6343 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6344 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
6345 }
6346
6347 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
6348 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
6349 }
6350
6351 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
6352 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
6353 }
6354
6355 if (jsonObjectData.contains("author") && !jsonObjectData["author"].is_null()) {
6356 pDataStructure->author = jsonObjectData["author"];
6357 }
6358
6359 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
6360 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
6361 }
6362
6363 if (jsonObjectData.contains("timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["timestamp"].is_null()) {
6364 pDataStructure->timestamp = jsonObjectData["timestamp"].get<std::string>();
6365 }
6366
6367 if (jsonObjectData.contains("edited_timestamp") && !jsonObjectData["edited_timestamp"].is_null()) {
6368 pDataStructure->editedTimestamp = jsonObjectData["edited_timestamp"].get<std::string>();
6369 }
6370
6371 if (jsonObjectData.contains("tts") && !jsonObjectData["tts"].is_null()) {
6372 pDataStructure->tts = jsonObjectData["tts"].get<bool>();
6373 }
6374
6375 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mention_everyone") && !jsonObjectData["mention_everyone"].is_null()) {
6376 pDataStructure->mentionEveryone = jsonObjectData["mention_everyone"].get<bool>();
6377 }
6378
6379 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mentions") && !jsonObjectData["mentions"].is_null()) {
6380 pDataStructure->mentions.clear();
6381 pDataStructure->mentions.reserve(jsonObjectData["mentions"].size());
6382 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["mentions"]) {
6383 UserData newData{ value };
6384 pDataStructure->mentions.push_back(newData);
6385 }
6386 pDataStructure->mentions.shrink_to_fit();
6387 }
6388
6389 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mention_roles") && !jsonObjectData["mention_roles"].is_null()) {
6390 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.clear();
6391 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.reserve(jsonObjectData["mention_roles"].size());
6392 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["mention_roles"]) {
6393 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.push_back(value.get<std::string>());
6394 }
6395 pDataStructure->mentionRoles.shrink_to_fit();
6396 }
6397
6398 if (jsonObjectData.contains("mention_channels") && !jsonObjectData["mention_channels"].is_null()) {
6399 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.clear();
6400 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.reserve(jsonObjectData["mention_channels"].size());
6401 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["mention_channels"]) {
6402 ChannelMentionData newData{ value };
6403 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.push_back(newData);
6404 }
6405 pDataStructure->mentionChannels.shrink_to_fit();
6406 }
6407
6408 if (jsonObjectData.contains("attachments") && !jsonObjectData["attachments"].is_null()) {
6409 pDataStructure->attachments.clear();
6410 pDataStructure->attachments.reserve(jsonObjectData["attachments"].size());
6411 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["attachments"]) {
6412 AttachmentData newData{ value };
6413 pDataStructure->attachments.push_back(newData);
6414 }
6415 pDataStructure->attachments.shrink_to_fit();
6416 }
6417
6418 if (jsonObjectData.contains("embeds") && !jsonObjectData["embeds"].is_null()) {
6419 pDataStructure->embeds.clear();
6420 pDataStructure->embeds.reserve(jsonObjectData["embeds"].size());
6421 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["embeds"]) {
6422 EmbedData newData{ value };
6423 pDataStructure->embeds.push_back(newData);
6424 }
6425 pDataStructure->embeds.shrink_to_fit();
6426 }
6427
6428 if (jsonObjectData.contains("reactions") && !jsonObjectData["reactions"].is_null()) {
6429 pDataStructure->reactions.clear();
6430 pDataStructure->reactions.reserve(jsonObjectData["reactions"].size());
6431 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["reactions"]) {
6432 ReactionData newData{ value };
6433 pDataStructure->reactions.push_back(newData);
6434 }
6435 pDataStructure->reactions.shrink_to_fit();
6436 }
6437
6438 if (jsonObjectData.contains("nonce") && !jsonObjectData["nonce"].is_null()) {
6439 pDataStructure->nonce = jsonObjectData["nonce"].get<std::string>();
6440 }
6441
6442 if (jsonObjectData.contains("pinned") && !jsonObjectData["pinned"].is_null()) {
6443 pDataStructure->pinned = jsonObjectData["pinned"].get<bool>();
6444 }
6445
6446 if (jsonObjectData.contains("webhook_id") && !jsonObjectData["webhook_id"].is_null()) {
6447 pDataStructure->webHookId = stoull(jsonObjectData["webhook_id"].get<std::string>());
6448 }
6449
6450 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
6451 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<MessageType>();
6452 }
6453
6454 if (jsonObjectData.contains("activity") && !jsonObjectData["activity"].is_null()) {
6455 pDataStructure->activity = jsonObjectData["activity"];
6456 }
6457
6458 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application") && !jsonObjectData["application"].is_null()) {
6459 pDataStructure->application = jsonObjectData["application"];
6460 }
6461
6462 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application_id") && !jsonObjectData["application_id"].is_null()) {
6463 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["application_id"].get<std::string>());
6464 }
6465
6466 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message_reference") && !jsonObjectData["message_reference"].is_null()) {
6467 pDataStructure->messageReference = jsonObjectData["message_reference"];
6468 }
6469
6470 if (jsonObjectData.contains("flags") && !jsonObjectData["flags"].is_null()) {
6471 pDataStructure->flags = jsonObjectData["flags"].get<int32_t>();
6472 }
6473
6474 if (jsonObjectData.contains("sticker_items") && !jsonObjectData["sticker_items"].is_null()) {
6475 pDataStructure->stickerItems.clear();
6476 pDataStructure->stickerItems.reserve(jsonObjectData["sticker_items"].size());
6477 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["sticker_items"]) {
6478 StickerItemData newData{ value };
6479 pDataStructure->stickerItems.push_back(newData);
6480 }
6481 pDataStructure->stickerItems.shrink_to_fit();
6482 }
6483
6484 if (jsonObjectData.contains("stickers") && !jsonObjectData["stickers"].is_null()) {
6485 pDataStructure->stickers.clear();
6486 pDataStructure->stickers.reserve(jsonObjectData["stickers"].size());
6487 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["stickers"]) {
6488 StickerData newData{ value };
6489 pDataStructure->stickers.push_back(newData);
6490 }
6491 pDataStructure->stickers.shrink_to_fit();
6492 }
6493
6494 if (jsonObjectData.contains("interaction") && !jsonObjectData["interaction"].is_null()) {
6495 pDataStructure->interaction = jsonObjectData["interaction"];
6496 }
6497
6498 if (jsonObjectData.contains("components") && !jsonObjectData["components"].is_null()) {
6499 pDataStructure->components.clear();
6500 pDataStructure->components.reserve(jsonObjectData["components"].size());
6501 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["components"]) {
6502 ActionRowData newData{ value };
6503 pDataStructure->components.push_back(newData);
6504 }
6505 pDataStructure->components.shrink_to_fit();
6506 }
6507
6508 if (jsonObjectData.contains("thread") && !jsonObjectData["thread"].is_null()) {
6509 pDataStructure->thread = jsonObjectData["thread"];
6510 }
6511 }
6512 };

6514 /// Resolved data. \brief Resolved data.
6515 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ResolvedData {
6516 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, AttachmentData> attachments{};///< Map of Snowflakes to attachment objects the ids and attachment objects.
6517 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, GuildMemberData> members{};///< Map full of GuildMemeberData.
6518 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, MessageData> messages{};///< Map full of messageData->
6519 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, ChannelData> channels{};///< Map full of ChannelData.
6520 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, UserData> users{};///< Map full of UserData.
6521 std::unordered_map<Snowflake, RoleData> roles{};///< Map full of RoleData.
6522 };
6523
6524 /// Represents a Sticker pack. \brief Represents a Sticker pack.
6525 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll StickerPackData : public DataParser<StickerPackData> {
6526 std::vector<StickerData> stickers{};///< Array of Sticker objects the stickers in the pack.
6527 std::string coverStickerId{};///< Id of a Sticker in the pack which is shown as the pack's icon.
6528 std::string bannerAssetId{};///< Id of the Sticker pack's banner image.
6529 std::string description{};///< Description of the Sticker pack.
6530 std::string skuId{};///< Id of the pack's SKU.
6531 std::string name{};///< Name of the Sticker pack.
6532 std::string Id{};///< Id of the Sticker pack.
6533
6534 StickerPackData() = default;
6535
6536 StickerPackData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6537 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6538 return *this;
6539 }
6540
6541 StickerPackData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6542 *this = jsonObjectData;
6543 }
6544
6545 virtual ~StickerPackData() = default;
6546
6547 protected:
6548 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, StickerPackData* pDataStructure) {
6549 if (jsonObjectData.contains("stickers") && !jsonObjectData["stickers"].is_null()) {
6550 pDataStructure->stickers.clear();
6551 pDataStructure->stickers.reserve(jsonObjectData["stickers"].size());
6552 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["stickers"]) {
6553 StickerData newData{ value };
6554 pDataStructure->stickers.push_back(newData);
6555 }
6556 pDataStructure->stickers.shrink_to_fit();
6557 }
6558
6559 if (jsonObjectData.contains("cover_sticker_id") && !jsonObjectData["cover_sticker_id"].is_null()) {
6560 pDataStructure->coverStickerId = jsonObjectData["cover_sticker_id"].get<std::string>();
6561 }
6562
6563 if (jsonObjectData.contains("banner_asset_id") && !jsonObjectData["banner_asset_id"].is_null()) {
6564 pDataStructure->bannerAssetId = jsonObjectData["banner_asset_id"].get<std::string>();
6565 }
6566
6567 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
6568 pDataStructure->description = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
6569 }
6570
6571 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
6572 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
6573 }
6574
6575 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6576 pDataStructure->Id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
6577 }
6578
6579 if (jsonObjectData.contains("sku_id") && !jsonObjectData["sku_id"].is_null()) {
6580 pDataStructure->skuId = jsonObjectData["sku_id"].get<std::string>();
6581 }
6582 }
6583 };
6584
6585 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll StickerPackDataVector : public DataParser<StickerPackDataVector> {
6586 public:

6610 DiscordCoreAPI::StickerPackData newData{ value };

6612 }
6613 pDataStructure->theStickerPackDatas.shrink_to_fit();
6614 }
