6617 /// Connection visibility types. \brief Connection visibility types.
6618 enum class ConnectionVisibilityTypes : int8_t {
6619 None = 0,///< None.
6620 Everyone = 1///< Everyone.
6621 };
6622
6623 /// Represents a single User Connection. \brief Represents a single User Connection.
6624 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ConnectionData : public DataParser<ConnectionData> {
6625 std::vector<IntegrationData> integrations{};///< An array of partial server integrations.
6626 ConnectionVisibilityTypes visibility{};///< Visibility of this connection.
6627 bool showActivity{ false };///< Whether activities related to this connection will be shown in presence updates.
6628 bool friendSync{ false };///< Whether friend sync is enabled for this connection.
6629 bool verified{ false };///< Whether the connection is verified.
6630 bool revoked{ false };///< Whether the connection is revoked.
6631 std::string name{};///< The userName of the connection account.
6632 std::string type{};///< The service of the connection(twitch, youtube).
6633 Snowflake id{};///< Id of the connection account.
6634
6635 ConnectionData() = default;
6636
6637 ConnectionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6638 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6639 return *this;
6640 }
6641
6642 ConnectionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6643 *this = jsonObjectData;
6644 }
6645
6646 virtual ~ConnectionData() = default;
6647
6648 protected:
6649 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ConnectionData* pDataStructure) {
6650 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
6651 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
6652 }
6653
6654 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6655 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
6656 }
6657
6658 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
6659 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<std::string>();
6660 }
6661
6662 if (jsonObjectData.contains("show_activity") && !jsonObjectData["show_activity"].is_null()) {
6663 pDataStructure->showActivity = jsonObjectData["show_activity"].get<bool>();
6664 }
6665
6666 if (jsonObjectData.contains("friend_sync") && !jsonObjectData["friend_sync"].is_null()) {
6667 pDataStructure->friendSync = jsonObjectData["friend_sync"].get<bool>();
6668 }
6669
6670 if (jsonObjectData.contains("revoked") && !jsonObjectData["revoked"].is_null()) {
6671 pDataStructure->revoked = jsonObjectData["revoked"].get<bool>();
6672 }
6673
6674 if (jsonObjectData.contains("verified") && !jsonObjectData["verified"].is_null()) {
6675 pDataStructure->verified = jsonObjectData["verified"].get<bool>();
6676 }
6677
6678 if (jsonObjectData.contains("visibility") && !jsonObjectData["visibility"].is_null()) {
6679 pDataStructure->visibility = jsonObjectData["visibility"].get<ConnectionVisibilityTypes>();
6680 }
6681
6682 if (jsonObjectData.contains("integrations") && !jsonObjectData["integrations"].is_null()) {
6683 pDataStructure->integrations.clear();
6684 pDataStructure->integrations.reserve(jsonObjectData["integrations"].size());
6685 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["integrations"]) {
6686 IntegrationData newData{ value };
6687 pDataStructure->integrations.push_back(newData);
6688 }
6689 pDataStructure->integrations.shrink_to_fit();
6690 }
6691 }
6692 };
6693
6694 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ConnectionDataVector : public DataParser<ConnectionDataVector> {
6695 public:
6696 ConnectionDataVector() = default;

6698 operator std::vector<ConnectionData>() {

6700 }

6717 pDataStructure->theConnectionDatas.reserve(jsonObjectData.size());
6718 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData) {
6719 DiscordCoreAPI::ConnectionData newData{ value };
6720 pDataStructure->theConnectionDatas.push_back(newData);
6721 }
6722 pDataStructure->theConnectionDatas.shrink_to_fit();
6723 }

6726 /// ApplicationCommand Interaction data option. \brief ApplicationCommand Interaction data option.
6727 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption : public DataParser<ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption> {
6728 std::vector<ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption> options{};///< ApplicationCommand Interaction data options.
6729 ApplicationCommandOptionType type{};///< The type of ApplicationCommand options.
6730 std::string valueString{};///< The value if it's a std::string.
6731 bool valueBool{ false };///< the value if it's a bool.
6732 int32_t valueInt{ 0 };///< The value if it's an int32_t.
6733 bool focused{ false };///< True if this option is the currently focused option for autocomplete.
6734 std::string name{};///< The name of the current option.
6735
6736 ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption() = default;
6737
6738 ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6739 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6740 return *this;
6741 }
6742
6743 ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6744 *this = jsonObjectData;
6745 }
6746
6747 virtual ~ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption() = default;
6748
6749 protected:
6750 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption* pDataStructure) {
6751 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
6752 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
6753 }
6754
6755 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
6756 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ApplicationCommandOptionType>();
6757 }
6758
6759 if (jsonObjectData.contains("focused") && !jsonObjectData["focused"].is_null()) {
6760 pDataStructure->focused = jsonObjectData["focused"].get<bool>();
6761 }
6762
6763 if (jsonObjectData.contains("value") && !jsonObjectData["value"].is_null()) {
6764 if (jsonObjectData["value"].is_boolean()) {
6765 pDataStructure->valueBool = jsonObjectData["value"].get<bool>();
6766 }
6767 if (jsonObjectData["value"].is_string()) {
6768 pDataStructure->valueString = jsonObjectData["value"].get<std::string>();
6769 }
6770 if (jsonObjectData["value"].is_number()) {
6771 pDataStructure->valueInt = jsonObjectData["value"].get<int32_t>();
6772 }
6773 }
6774
6775 if (jsonObjectData.contains("options") && !jsonObjectData["options"].is_null()) {
6776 pDataStructure->options.reserve(jsonObjectData["options"].size());
6777 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["options"]) {
6778 ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption newData{ value };
6779 pDataStructure->options.push_back(newData);
6780 }
6781 pDataStructure->options.shrink_to_fit();
6782 }
6783 }
6784 };
6785
6786 /// ApplicationCommand Interaction data. \brief ApplicationCommand Interaction data.
6787 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll ApplicationCommandInteractionData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<ApplicationCommandInteractionData> {
6788 public:
6789 std::vector<ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption> options{};///< ApplicationCommand Interaction data options.
6790 ApplicationCommandType type{};///< The type of ApplicationCommand.
6791 ResolvedData resolved{};///< Resolved data.
6792 Snowflake guildId{};///< The guild that the command took place in.
6793 std::string name{};///< The name of the command.
6794
6795 ApplicationCommandInteractionData() = default;
6796
6797 ApplicationCommandInteractionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6798 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6799 return *this;
6800 }
6801
6802 ApplicationCommandInteractionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6803 *this = jsonObjectData;
6804 }
6805
6806 virtual ~ApplicationCommandInteractionData() = default;
6807
6808 protected:
6809 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, ApplicationCommandInteractionData* pDataStructure) {
6810 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
6811 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<ApplicationCommandType>();
6812 }
6813
6814 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
6815 pDataStructure->name = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
6816 }
6817
6818 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
6819 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
6820 }
6821
6822 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6823 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
6824 }
6825
6826 if (jsonObjectData.contains("options") && !jsonObjectData["options"].is_null()) {
6827 pDataStructure->options.reserve(jsonObjectData["options"].size());
6828 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["options"]) {
6829 ApplicationCommandInteractionDataOption newData{ value };
6830 pDataStructure->options.push_back(newData);
6831 }
6832 pDataStructure->options.shrink_to_fit();
6833 }
6834
6835 if (jsonObjectData.contains("resolved") && !jsonObjectData["resolved"].is_null()) {
6836 auto& value = jsonObjectData["resolved"];
6837
6838 if (value.contains("attachments") && !value["attachments"].is_null()) {
6839 pDataStructure->resolved.attachments.clear();
6840 auto newMap = value["attachments"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, nlohmann::json>>();
6841 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
6842 AttachmentData newData{ newValue };
6843 pDataStructure->resolved.attachments[stoull(key)] = newData;
6844 }
6845 }
6846
6847 if (value.contains("users") && !value["users"].is_null()) {
6848 pDataStructure->resolved.users.clear();
6849 auto newMap = value["users"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, nlohmann::json>>();
6850 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
6851 UserData newData{ value };
6852 pDataStructure->resolved.users[stoull(key)] = newData;
6853 }
6854 }
6855 if (value.contains("channels") && !value["channels"].is_null()) {
6856 pDataStructure->resolved.channels.clear();
6857 auto newMap = value["channels"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, nlohmann::json>>();
6858 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
6859 ChannelData newData{ newValue };
6860 pDataStructure->resolved.channels[stoull(key)] = newData;
6861 }
6862 }
6863 if (value.contains("roles") && !value["roles"].is_null()) {
6864 pDataStructure->resolved.roles.clear();
6865 auto newMap = value["roles"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, nlohmann::json>>();
6866 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
6867 RoleData newData{ newValue };
6868 pDataStructure->resolved.roles[stoull(key)] = newData;
6869 }
6870 }
6871 if (value.contains("members") && !value["members"].is_null()) {
6872 pDataStructure->resolved.members.clear();
6873 auto newMap = value["members"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, nlohmann::json>>();
6874 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
6875 GuildMemberData newData{ newValue };
6876 pDataStructure->resolved.members[stoull(key)] = newData;
6877 }
6878 }
6879 if (value.contains("messages") && !value["messages"].is_null()) {
6880 pDataStructure->resolved.messages.clear();
6881 auto newMap = value["messages"].get<std::unordered_map<std::string, nlohmann::json>>();
6882 for (auto& [key, newValue]: newMap) {
6883 MessageData newData{ newValue };
6884 pDataStructure->resolved.messages[stoull(key)] = newData;
6885 }
6886 }
6887 }
6888 }
6889 };
6890
6891 /// Interaction data data. \brief Interaction data data.
6892 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InteractionDataData : public DataParser<InteractionDataData> {
6893 ApplicationCommandInteractionData applicationCommandData{};///< ApplicationCommand Interaction data.
6894 MessageCommandInteractionData messageInteractionData{};///< Message command Interaction data.
6895 UserCommandInteractionData userInteractionData{};///< User command Interaction data.
6896 ComponentInteractionData componentData{};///< Component Interaction data.
6897 ModalInteractionData modalData{};///< Modal Interaction data.
6898
6899 InteractionDataData() = default;
6900
6901 InteractionDataData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6902 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6903 return *this;
6904 }
6905
6906 InteractionDataData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6907 *this = jsonObjectData;
6908 }
6909
6910 virtual ~InteractionDataData() = default;
6911
6912 protected:
6913 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, InteractionDataData* pDataStructure) {
6914 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
6915 pDataStructure->applicationCommandData = jsonObjectData;
6916 }
6917
6918 if (jsonObjectData.contains("target_id") && !jsonObjectData["target_id"].is_null()) {
6919 pDataStructure->messageInteractionData = jsonObjectData;
6920 pDataStructure->userInteractionData = jsonObjectData;
6921 }
6922
6923 if (jsonObjectData.contains("component_type") && !jsonObjectData["component_type"].is_null()) {
6924 pDataStructure->componentData = jsonObjectData;
6925 }
6926
6927 if (jsonObjectData.contains("components") && !jsonObjectData["components"].is_null()) {
6928 pDataStructure->modalData = jsonObjectData;
6929 }
6930 }
6931 };
6932
6933 /// Interaction data. \brief Interaction data.
6934 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InteractionData : public DiscordEntity, public DataParser<InteractionData> {
6935 public:
6936 InteractionDataData data{};///< The Interaction's data.
6937 std::string guildLocale{};///< The guild's preferred locale, if invoked in a guild.
6938 Snowflake applicationId{};///< The application's id.
6939 nlohmann::json rawData{};///< The Interaction's raw data.
6940 GuildMemberData member{};///< The data of the Guild member who sent the Interaction, if applicable.
6941 InteractionType type{};///< The type of Interaction.
6942 MessageData message{};///< The Message that the Interaction came through on, if applicable.
6943 Snowflake channelId{};///< The Channel the Interaction was sent in.
6944 int32_t version{ 0 };///< The Interaction version.
6945 std::string locale{};///< The selected language of the invoking user.
6946 std::string token{};///< The Interaction token.
6947 Snowflake guildId{};///< The Guild id of the Guild it was sent in.
6948 UserData user{};///< The User data of the sender of the Interaction.
6949
6950 InteractionData() = default;
6951
6952 InteractionData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6953 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
6954 return *this;
6955 }
6956
6957 InteractionData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
6958 *this = jsonObjectData;
6959 }
6960
6961 virtual ~InteractionData() = default;
6962
6963 protected:
6964 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, InteractionData* pDataStructure) {
6965 if (jsonObjectData.contains("data") && !jsonObjectData["data"].is_null()) {
6966 pDataStructure->data = jsonObjectData["data"];
6967 pDataStructure->rawData = jsonObjectData["data"];
6968 }
6969
6970 if (jsonObjectData.contains("type") && !jsonObjectData["type"].is_null()) {
6971 pDataStructure->type = jsonObjectData["type"].get<InteractionType>();
6972 }
6973
6974 if (jsonObjectData.contains("token") && !jsonObjectData["token"].is_null()) {
6975 pDataStructure->token = jsonObjectData["token"].get<std::string>();
6976 }
6977
6978 if (jsonObjectData.contains("member") && !jsonObjectData["member"].is_null()) {
6979 pDataStructure->member = jsonObjectData["member"];
6980 pDataStructure->user.avatar = pDataStructure->member.userAvatar;
6981 pDataStructure->user.id = pDataStructure->member.id;
6982 pDataStructure->user.userName = pDataStructure->member.userName;
6983 } else if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
6984 pDataStructure->user = jsonObjectData["user"];
6985 }
6986
6987 if (jsonObjectData.contains("channel_id") && !jsonObjectData["channel_id"].is_null()) {
6988 pDataStructure->channelId = stoull(jsonObjectData["channel_id"].get<std::string>());
6989 }
6990
6991 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
6992 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
6993 }
6994
6995 if (jsonObjectData.contains("locale") && !jsonObjectData["locale"].is_null()) {
6996 pDataStructure->locale = jsonObjectData["locale"].get<std::string>();
6997 }
6998
6999 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_locale") && !jsonObjectData["guild_locale"].is_null()) {
7000 pDataStructure->guildLocale = jsonObjectData["guild_locale"].get<std::string>();
7001 }
7002
7003 if (jsonObjectData.contains("message") && !jsonObjectData["message"].is_null()) {
7004 pDataStructure->message = jsonObjectData["message"];
7005 }
7006
7007 if (jsonObjectData.contains("version") && !jsonObjectData["version"].is_null()) {
7008 pDataStructure->version = jsonObjectData["version"].get<int32_t>();
7009 }
7010
7011 if (jsonObjectData.contains("id") && !jsonObjectData["id"].is_null()) {
7012 pDataStructure->id = stoull(jsonObjectData["id"].get<std::string>());
7013 }
7014
7015 if (jsonObjectData.contains("application_id") && !jsonObjectData["application_id"].is_null()) {
7016 pDataStructure->applicationId = stoull(jsonObjectData["application_id"].get<std::string>());
7017 }
7018 }
7019 };
7020
7021 /// Data from the SessionStart info. \brief Data from the SessionStart info.
7022 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll SessionStartData : public DataParser<SessionStartData> {
7023 uint32_t maxConcurrency{ 0 };///< The number of identify requests allowed per 5 seconds.
7024 uint32_t resetAfter{ 0 };///< The number of std::chrono::milliseconds after which the limit resets.
7025 uint32_t remaining{ 0 };///< The remaining number of session starts the current User is allowed.
7026 uint32_t total{ 0 };///< The total number of session starts the current User is allowed.
7027
7028 SessionStartData() = default;
7029
7030 SessionStartData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7031 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7032 return *this;
7033 }
7034
7035 SessionStartData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7036 *this = jsonObjectData;
7037 }
7038
7039 virtual ~SessionStartData() = default;
7040
7041 protected:
7042 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, SessionStartData* pDataStructure) {
7043 if (jsonObjectData.contains("max_concurrency") && !jsonObjectData["max_concurrency"].is_null()) {
7044 pDataStructure->maxConcurrency = jsonObjectData["max_concurrency"].get<uint32_t>();
7045 }
7046
7047 if (jsonObjectData.contains("remaining") && !jsonObjectData["remaining"].is_null()) {
7048 pDataStructure->remaining = jsonObjectData["remaining"].get<uint32_t>();
7049 }
7050
7051 if (jsonObjectData.contains("reset_after") && !jsonObjectData["reset_after"].is_null()) {
7052 pDataStructure->resetAfter = jsonObjectData["reset_after"].get<uint32_t>();
7053 }
7054
7055 if (jsonObjectData.contains("total") && !jsonObjectData["total"].is_null()) {
7056 pDataStructure->total = jsonObjectData["total"].get<uint32_t>();
7057 }
7058 }
7059 };
7060
7061 /// Data from the GetGatewatBot endpoint. \brief Data from the GetGatewatBot endpoint.
7062 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GatewayBotData : public DataParser<GatewayBotData> {
7063 SessionStartData sessionStartLimit{};///< Information on the current session start limit.
7064 uint32_t shards{ 0 };///< The recommended number of shards to use when connecting.
7065 std::string url{};///< The WSS Url that can be used for connecting to the gateway.
7066
7067 GatewayBotData() = default;
7068
7069 GatewayBotData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7070 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7071 return *this;
7072 }
7073
7074 GatewayBotData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7075 *this = jsonObjectData;
7076 }
7077
7078 virtual ~GatewayBotData() = default;
7079
7080 protected:
7081 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GatewayBotData* pDataStructure) {
7082 if (jsonObjectData.contains("session_start_limit") && !jsonObjectData["session_start_limit"].is_null()) {
7083 pDataStructure->sessionStartLimit = jsonObjectData["session_start_limit"];
7084 }
7085
7086 if (jsonObjectData.contains("shards") && !jsonObjectData["shards"].is_null()) {
7087 pDataStructure->shards = jsonObjectData["shards"].get<uint32_t>();
7088 }
7089
7090 if (jsonObjectData.contains("url") && !jsonObjectData["url"].is_null()) {
7091 pDataStructure->url = jsonObjectData["url"].get<std::string>();
7092 }
7093 }
7094 };
7095
7096 /// Text input style for modals. \brief Text input style for modals.
7097 enum class TextInputStyle : int8_t {
7098 Short = 1,///< A single-line input.
7099 Paragraph = 2///< A multi-line input.
7100 };
7101
7102 /// Data representing a Guild Emoji Update event. \brief Data representing a Guild Emoji Update event.
7103 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildEmojisUpdateEventData : public DataParser<GuildEmojisUpdateEventData> {
7104 std::vector<EmojiData> emojis{};
7105 Snowflake guildId{};
7106
7107 GuildEmojisUpdateEventData() = default;
7108
7109 GuildEmojisUpdateEventData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7110 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7111 return *this;
7112 }
7113
7114 GuildEmojisUpdateEventData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7115 *this = jsonObjectData;
7116 }
7117
7118 virtual ~GuildEmojisUpdateEventData() = default;
7119
7120 protected:
7121 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildEmojisUpdateEventData* pDataStructure) {
7122 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
7123 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
7124 }
7125
7126 if (jsonObjectData.contains("emojis") && !jsonObjectData["emojis"].is_null()) {
7127 pDataStructure->emojis.clear();
7128 pDataStructure->emojis.reserve(jsonObjectData["emojis"].size());
7129 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["emojis"]) {
7130 EmojiData newData{ value };
7131 pDataStructure->emojis.push_back(newData);
7132 }
7133 pDataStructure->emojis.shrink_to_fit();
7134 }
7135 }
7136 };
7137
7138 /// Data representing a Guild Sticker Update event. \brief Data representing a Guild Stickers Update event.
7139 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildStickersUpdateEventData : public DataParser<GuildStickersUpdateEventData> {

7144
7145 GuildStickersUpdateEventData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7146 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7147 return *this;
7148 }
7149
7150 GuildStickersUpdateEventData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7151 *this = jsonObjectData;
7152 }
7153
7154 virtual ~GuildStickersUpdateEventData() = default;
7155
7156 protected:
7157 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildStickersUpdateEventData* pDataStructure) {
7158 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
7159 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
7160 }
7161
7162 if (jsonObjectData.contains("stickers") && !jsonObjectData["stickers"].is_null()) {
7163 pDataStructure->stickers.clear();
7164 pDataStructure->stickers.reserve(jsonObjectData["stickers"].size());
7165 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["stickers"]) {
7166 StickerData newData{ value };
7167 pDataStructure->stickers.push_back(newData);
7168 }
7169 pDataStructure->stickers.shrink_to_fit();
7170 }
7171 }
7172 };
7173
7174 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildMembersChunkEventData : public DataParser<GuildMembersChunkEventData> {
7175 std::vector<PresenceUpdateData> presences{};
7176 std::vector<GuildMemberData> members{};
7177 std::vector<std::string> notFound{};
7178 int32_t chunkIndex{ 0 };
7179 int32_t chunkCount{ 0 };
7180 std::string nonce{};
7181 Snowflake guildId{};
7182
7183 GuildMembersChunkEventData() = default;
7184
7185 GuildMembersChunkEventData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7186 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7187 return *this;
7188 }
7189
7190 GuildMembersChunkEventData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7191 *this = jsonObjectData;
7192 }
7193
7194 virtual ~GuildMembersChunkEventData() = default;
7195
7196 protected:
7197 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, GuildMembersChunkEventData* pDataStructure) {
7198 if (jsonObjectData.contains("guild_id") && !jsonObjectData["guild_id"].is_null()) {
7199 pDataStructure->guildId = stoull(jsonObjectData["guild_id"].get<std::string>());
7200 }
7201
7202 if (jsonObjectData.contains("nonce") && !jsonObjectData["nonce"].is_null()) {
7203 pDataStructure->nonce = jsonObjectData["nonce"].get<std::string>();
7204 }
7205
7206 if (jsonObjectData.contains("chunk_index") && !jsonObjectData["chunk_index"].is_null()) {
7207 pDataStructure->chunkIndex = jsonObjectData["chunk_index"].get<int32_t>();
7208 }
7209
7210 if (jsonObjectData.contains("chunk_count") && !jsonObjectData["chunk_count"].is_null()) {
7211 pDataStructure->chunkCount = jsonObjectData["chunk_count"].get<int32_t>();
7212 }
7213
7214 if (jsonObjectData.contains("presences") && !jsonObjectData["presences"].is_null()) {
7215 pDataStructure->presences.clear();
7216 pDataStructure->presences.reserve(jsonObjectData["presences"].size());
7217 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["presences"]) {
7218 PresenceUpdateData newData{ value };
7219 pDataStructure->presences.push_back(newData);
7220 }
7221 pDataStructure->presences.shrink_to_fit();
7222 }
7223
7224 if (jsonObjectData.contains("not_found") && !jsonObjectData["not_found"].is_null()) {
7225 pDataStructure->notFound.clear();
7226 pDataStructure->notFound.reserve(jsonObjectData["not_found"].size());
7227 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["not_found"]) {
7228 pDataStructure->notFound.push_back(value);
7229 }
7230 pDataStructure->notFound.shrink_to_fit();
7231 }
7232
7233 if (jsonObjectData.contains("members") && !jsonObjectData["members"].is_null()) {
7234 pDataStructure->members.clear();
7235 pDataStructure->members.reserve(jsonObjectData["members"].size());
7236 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["members"]) {
7237 GuildMemberData newData{ value };
7238 pDataStructure->members.push_back(newData);
7239 }
7240 pDataStructure->members.shrink_to_fit();
7241 }
7242 }
7243 };
7244
7245 /// Data representing an input-event, which is any Message or Interaction that is coming into the bot as an input. \brief Data representing an input-event, which is any Message or Interaction that is coming into the bot as an input.
7246 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InputEventData {
7247 public:
7248 friend class DiscordCoreInternal::BaseSocketAgent;
7249 friend OnInteractionCreationData;
7250 friend RespondToInputEventData;
7251 friend BaseFunctionArguments;
7252 friend DiscordCoreClient;
7253 friend EventHandler;
7254 friend CommandData;
7255 friend InputEvents;
7256
7257 InputEventResponseType responseType{};///< The type of response that this input value represents.
7258
7259 InputEventData& operator=(const InputEventData& other);
7260
7261 InputEventData(const InputEventData& other);
7262
7263 InputEventData& operator=(InputEventData& other);
7264
7265 InputEventData(InputEventData& other);
7266
7267 InputEventData& operator=(InteractionData& other);
7268
7269 InputEventData(InteractionData& interactionData);
7270
7271 InputEventData() = default;
7272
7273 /// Returns the userName of the last User to trigger this input-event. \brief Returns the userName of the last User to trigger this input-event.
7274 /// \returns std::string A std::string containing the User name.
7275 std::string getUserName();
7276
7277 /// Gets the avatar Url of the last User to trigger this input-event. \brief Gets the avatar Url of the last User to trigger this input-event.
7278 /// \returns std::string A std::string containing the avatar Url.
7279 std::string getAvatarUrl();
7280
7281 /// Returns the Message embeds that are on the Message, if applicable. \brief Returns the Message embeds that are on the Message, if applicable.
7282 /// \returns std::vector A std::vector containing the EmbedData.
7283 std::vector<EmbedData> getEmbeds();
7284
7285 /// Returns the Message components that are on the Message, if applicable. \brief Returns the Message components that are on the Message, if applicable.
7286 /// \returns std::vector A std::vector containing ActionRowData.
7287 std::vector<ActionRowData> getComponents();
7288
7289 /// Returns the User id of the last requester of this input-event. \brief Returns the User id of the last requester of this input-event.
7290 /// \returns Snowflake A Snowflake containing the author's id.
7291 Snowflake getAuthorId();
7292
7293 /// Returns the Interaction id, if appplicable, of this input-event. \brief Returns the Interaction id, if appplicable, of this input-event.
7294 /// \returns Snowflake A Snowflake containing the Interaction id.
7295 Snowflake getInteractionId();
7296
7297 /// Returns the application id. \brief Returns the application id.
7298 /// \returns Snowflake A Snowflake containing the application id.
7299 Snowflake getApplicationId();
7300
7301 /// Returns the Channel id of this input-event. \brief Returns the Channel id of this input-event.
7302 /// \returns Snowflake A Snowflake containing the Channel id.
7303 Snowflake getChannelId();
7304
7305 /// Returns the Interaction token, if applicable, of this input-event. \brief Returns the Interaction token, if applicable, of this input-event.
7306 /// \returns std::string A std::string containing the Interaction token.
7307 std::string getInteractionToken();
7308
7309 /// Returns the Guild id, of this input-event. \brief Returns the Guild id, of this input-event.
7310 /// \returns Snowflake A Snowflake containing the Guild id.
7311 Snowflake getGuildId();
7312
7313 /// Returns the Message id, if applicable, of this input-event. \brief Returns the Message id, if applicable, of this input-event.
7314 /// \returns Snowflake A Snowflake containing the Message id.
7315 Snowflake getMessageId();
7316
7317 /// Returns the Interaction data, if applicable, of this input-event. \brief Returns the InteractionData, if applicable, of this input-event.
7318 /// \returns InteractionData An InteractionData structure.
7319 InteractionData getInteractionData();
7320
7321 /// Returns the Message data, if applicable, of this input-event. \brief Returns the Message data, if applicable, of this input-event.
7322 /// \returns MessageData A MessageData structure.
7323 MessageData getMessageData();
7324
7325 virtual ~InputEventData() = default;
7326
7327 protected:
7328 std::unique_ptr<InteractionData> interactionData{ std::make_unique<InteractionData>() };
7329 };
7330
7331 /// \brief Data for responding to an input-event.
7332 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll RespondToInputEventData {
7333 public:
7334 friend CreateEphemeralInteractionResponseData;
7335 friend CreateDeferredInteractionResponseData;
7336 friend CreateEphemeralFollowUpMessageData;
7337 friend struct InteractionResponseData;
7338 friend DeleteInteractionResponseData;
7339 friend CreateInteractionResponseData;
7340 friend EditInteractionResponseData;
7341 friend DeleteFollowUpMessageData;
7342 friend CreateFollowUpMessageData;
7343 friend EditFollowUpMessageData;
7344 friend CreateMessageData;
7345 friend EditMessageData;
7346 friend InputEvents;
7347 friend SendDMData;
7348
7349 RespondToInputEventData& operator=(InteractionData& dataPackage);
7350
7351 RespondToInputEventData(InteractionData& dataPackage);
7352
7353 RespondToInputEventData& operator=(InputEventData& dataPackage);
7354
7355 RespondToInputEventData(InputEventData& dataPackage);
7356
7357 /// Adds a button to the response Message. \brief Adds a button to the response Message.
7358 /// \param disabled Whether the button is active or not.
7359 /// \param customIdNew A custom id to give for identifying the button.
7360 /// \param buttonLabel A visible label for the button.
7361 /// \param buttonStyle The style of the button.
7362 /// \param emojiName An emoji name, if desired.
7363 /// \param emojiId An emoji id, if desired.
7364 /// \param url A url, if applicable.
7365 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7366 RespondToInputEventData& addButton(bool disabled, const std::string& customIdNew, const std::string& buttonLabel, ButtonStyle buttonStyle,
7367 const std::string& emojiName = "", Snowflake emojiId = 0, const std::string& url = "");
7368
7369 /// Adds a select-menu to the response Message. \brief Adds a select-menu to the response Message.
7370 /// \param disabled Whether the select-menu is active or not.
7371 /// \param customIdNew A custom id to give for identifying the select-menu.
7372 /// \param options A std::vector of select-menu-options to offer.
7373 /// \param placeholder Custom placeholder text if nothing is selected, max 100 characters.
7374 /// \param maxValues Maximum number of selections that are possible.
7375 /// \param minValues Minimum required number of selections that are required.
7376 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7377 RespondToInputEventData& addSelectMenu(bool disabled, const std::string& customIdNew, std::vector<SelectOptionData> options, const std::string& placeholder,
7378 int32_t maxValues, int32_t minValues);
7379
7380 /// Adds a modal to the response Message. \brief Adds a modal to the response Message.
7381 /// \param topTitleNew A title for the modal.
7382 /// \param topCustomIdNew A custom id to give for the modal.
7383 /// \param titleNew A title for the modal's individual input.
7384 /// \param customIdNew A custom id to give for the modal's individual input.
7385 /// \param required Is it a required response?
7386 /// \param minLength Minimum length.
7387 /// \param maxLength Maximum length.
7388 /// \param inputStyle The input style.
7389 /// \param label A label for the modal.
7390 /// \param placeholder A placeholder for the modal.
7391 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7392 RespondToInputEventData& addModal(const std::string& topTitleNew, const std::string& topCustomIdNew, const std::string& titleNew, const std::string& customIdNew,
7393 bool required, int32_t minLength, int32_t maxLength, TextInputStyle inputStyle, const std::string& label = "", const std::string& placeholder = "");
7394
7395 /// Adds a file to the current collection of files for this message response. \brief Adds a file to the current collection of files for this message response.
7396 /// \param theFile The file to be added.
7397 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7398 RespondToInputEventData& addFile(File theFile);
7399
7400 /// For setting the allowable mentions in a response. \brief For setting the allowable mentions in a response.
7401 /// \param dataPackage An AllowedMentionsData structure.
7402 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7403 RespondToInputEventData& addAllowedMentions(AllowedMentionsData dataPackage);
7404
7405 /// For setting the type of response to make. \brief For setting the type of response to make.
7406 /// \param typeNew An InputEventResponseType.
7407 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7408 RespondToInputEventData& setResponseType(InputEventResponseType typeNew);
7409
7410 /// For setting the components in a response. \brief For setting the components in a response.
7411 /// \param dataPackage An ActionRowData structure.
7412 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7413 RespondToInputEventData& addComponentRow(ActionRowData dataPackage);
7414
7415 /// For setting the embeds in a response. \brief For setting the embeds in a response.
7416 /// \param dataPackage An EmbedData structure.
7417 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7418 RespondToInputEventData& addMessageEmbed(EmbedData dataPackage);
7419
7420 /// For setting the Message content in a response. \brief For setting the Message content in a response.
7421 /// \param dataPackage A std::string, containing the content.
7422 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7423 RespondToInputEventData& addContent(const std::string& dataPackage);
7424
7425 /// For setting the tts status of a response. \brief For setting the tts status of a response.
7426 /// \param enabledTTs A bool.
7427 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7428 RespondToInputEventData& setTTSStatus(bool enabledTTs);
7429
7430 /// For setting the choices of an autocomplete response. \brief For setting the choices of an autocomplete response.
7431 /// \param theValue An nlohmann::json value that is either a float, int32_t or a std::string.
7432 /// \param theName A std::string for the name of the choice.
7433 /// \param theNameLocalizations A std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> for the name localizations.
7434 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7435 RespondToInputEventData& setAutoCompleteChoice(nlohmann::json theValue, const std::string& theName,
7436 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> theNameLocalizations = std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>{});
7437
7438 /// For setting the direct-Message User target of a response. \brief For setting the direct-Message User target of a response.
7439 /// \param targetUserIdNew A std::string, containing the target User's id.
7440 /// \returns RespondToInputEventData& A reference to this data structure.
7441 RespondToInputEventData& setTargetUserID(const Snowflake& targetUserIdNew);
7442
7443 protected:
7444 std::vector<ApplicationCommandOptionChoiceData> choices{};
7445 std::vector<ActionRowData> components{};
7446 AllowedMentionsData allowedMentions{};
7447 std::vector<EmbedData> embeds{};
7448 std::string interactionToken{};
7449 InputEventResponseType type{};///< The type of response to make.
7450 InteractionType eventType{};
7451 std::vector<File> files{};
7452 Snowflake interactionId{};
7453 Snowflake applicationId{};
7454 Snowflake targetUserId{};
7455 std::string customId{};
7456 std::string content{};
7457 Snowflake channelId{};
7458 Snowflake messageId{};
7459 std::string title{};
7460 int32_t flags{ 0 };
7461 bool tts{ false };
7462 };
7463
7464 /// Message response base, for responding to messages. \brief Message response base, for responding to messages.
7465 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MessageResponseBase {
7466 public:
7467 /// Adds a button to the response Message. \brief Adds a button to the response Message.
7468 /// \param disabled Whether the button is active or not.
7469 /// \param customIdNew A custom id to give for identifying the button.
7470 /// \param buttonLabel A visible label for the button.
7471 /// \param buttonStyle The style of the button.
7472 /// \param emojiName An emoji name, if desired.
7473 /// \param emojiId An emoji id, if desired.
7474 /// \param url A url, if applicable.
7475 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7476 MessageResponseBase& addButton(bool disabled, const std::string& customIdNew, const std::string& buttonLabel, ButtonStyle buttonStyle, const std::string& emojiName = "",
7477 Snowflake emojiId = 0, const std::string& url = "");
7478
7479 /// Adds a select-menu to the response Message. \brief Adds a select-menu to the response Message.
7480 /// \param disabled Whether the select-menu is active or not.
7481 /// \param customIdNew A custom id to give for identifying the select-menu.
7482 /// \param options A std::vector of select-menu-options to offer.
7483 /// \param placeholder Custom placeholder text if nothing is selected, max 100 characters.
7484 /// \param maxValues Maximum number of selections that are possible.
7485 /// \param minValues Minimum required number of selections that are required.
7486 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7487 MessageResponseBase& addSelectMenu(bool disabled, const std::string& customIdNew, std::vector<SelectOptionData> options, const std::string& placeholder, int32_t maxValues,
7488 int32_t minValues);
7489
7490 /// Adds a modal to the response Message. \brief Adds a modal to the response Message.
7491 /// \param topTitleNew A title for the modal.
7492 /// \param topCustomIdNew A custom id to give for the modal.
7493 /// \param titleNew A title for the modal's individual input.
7494 /// \param customIdNew A custom id to give for the modal's individual input.
7495 /// \param required Is it a required response?
7496 /// \param minLength Minimum length.
7497 /// \param maxLength Maximum length.
7498 /// \param inputStyle The input style.
7499 /// \param label A label for the modal.
7500 /// \param placeholder A placeholder for the modal.
7501 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7502 MessageResponseBase& addModal(const std::string& topTitleNew, const std::string& topCustomIdNew, const std::string& titleNew, const std::string& customIdNew, bool required,
7503 int32_t minLength, int32_t maxLength, TextInputStyle inputStyle, const std::string& label = "", const std::string& placeholder = "");
7504
7505 /// Adds a file to the current collection of files for this message response. \brief Adds a file to the current collection of files for this message response.
7506 /// \param theFile The file to be added.
7507 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7508 MessageResponseBase& addFile(File theFile);
7509
7510 /// For setting the allowable mentions in a response. \brief For setting the allowable mentions in a response.
7511 /// \param dataPackage An AllowedMentionsData structure.
7512 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7513 MessageResponseBase& addAllowedMentions(AllowedMentionsData dataPackage);
7514
7515 /// For setting the components in a response. \brief For setting the components in a response.
7516 /// \param dataPackage An ActionRowData structure.
7517 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7518 MessageResponseBase& addComponentRow(ActionRowData dataPackage);
7519
7520 /// For setting the embeds in a response. \brief For setting the embeds in a response.
7521 /// \param dataPackage An EmbedData structure.
7522 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7523 MessageResponseBase& addMessageEmbed(EmbedData dataPackage);
7524
7525 /// For setting the Message content in a response. \brief For setting the Message content in a response.
7526 /// \param dataPackage A std::string, containing the content.
7527 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7528 MessageResponseBase& addContent(const std::string& dataPackage);
7529
7530 /// For setting the tts status of a response. \brief For setting the tts status of a response.
7531 /// \param enabledTTs A bool.
7532 /// \returns MessageResponseBase& A reference to this data structure.
7533 MessageResponseBase& setTTSStatus(bool enabledTTs);
7534
7535 protected:
7536 std::vector<ActionRowData> components{};
7537 AllowedMentionsData allowedMentions{};
7538 std::vector<EmbedData> embeds{};
7539 std::vector<File> files{};
7540 std::string customId{};
7541 std::string content{};
7542 std::string title{};
7543 int32_t flags{ 0 };
7544 bool tts{ false };
7545 };
7546
7547 /// Interaction response data. \brief Interaction response data.
7548 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll InteractionResponseData {
7549 InteractionResponseData& operator=(const RespondToInputEventData& other) {
7550 this->data.allowedMentions = other.allowedMentions;
7551 this->data.components = other.components;
7552 this->data.customId = other.customId;
7553 this->data.choices = other.choices;
7554 this->data.content = other.content;
7555 this->data.embeds = other.embeds;
7556 this->data.title = other.title;
7557 this->data.files = other.files;
7558 this->data.flags = other.flags;
7559 this->data.tts = other.tts;
7560 return *this;
7561 }
7562 InteractionResponseData(const RespondToInputEventData& other) {
7563 *this = other;
7564 }
7565 InteractionResponseData() = default;
7566
7567 operator std::string() {
7568 nlohmann::json data{};
7569 for (auto& value: this->data.attachments) {
7570 data["data"]["attachments"].push_back(DiscordCoreAPI::AttachmentData{ value });
7571 }
7572 if (this->data.components.size() == 0) {
7573 data["data"]["components"] = nlohmann::json::array();
7574 } else {
7575 for (auto& value: this->data.components) {
7576 data["data"]["components"].push_back(value);
7577 }
7578 }
7579 data["data"]["allowed_mentions"] = DiscordCoreAPI::AllowedMentionsData{ this->data.allowedMentions };
7580 if (this->data.choices.size() > 0) {
7581 nlohmann::json::array_t theArray{};
7582 for (auto& value: this->data.choices) {
7583 nlohmann::json theValue{};
7584 theValue["name"] = value.name;
7585 theValue["name_localizations"] = value.nameLocalizations;
7586 theValue["value"] = value.value;
7587 theArray.push_back(theValue);
7588 }
7589 data["data"]["choices"] = theArray;
7590 }
7591 if (this->data.embeds.size() == 0) {
7592 data["data"]["embeds"] = nlohmann::json::array();
7593 } else {
7594 for (auto& value: this->data.embeds) {
7595 data["data"]["embeds"].push_back(DiscordCoreAPI::EmbedData{ value });
7596 }
7597 }
7598 if (this->data.customId != "") {
7599 data["data"]["custom_id"] = this->data.customId;
7600 }
7601 if (this->data.content != "") {
7602 data["data"]["content"] = this->data.content;
7603 }
7604 if (this->data.title != "") {
7605 data["data"]["title"] = this->data.title;
7606 }
7607 data["data"]["flags"] = this->data.flags;
7608 data["data"]["tts"] = this->data.tts;
7609 data["type"] = this->type;
7610 return data.dump();
7611 }
7612
7613 InteractionCallbackData data{};///< Interaction ApplicationCommand callback data.
7614 InteractionCallbackType type{};///< Interaction callback type.
7615 };
7616
7617 /// Command data, for functions executed by the CommandController. \brief Command data, for functions executed by the CommandController.
7618 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll CommandData : public DataParser<CommandData> {
7619 friend struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll BaseFunctionArguments;
7620
7621 std::vector<std::string> optionsArgs{};
7622 std::string subCommandGroupName{};
7623 std::string subCommandName{};
7624 std::string commandName{};
7625
7626 CommandData() = default;
7627
7628 CommandData(InputEventData inputEventData);
7629
7630 CommandData& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7631 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7632 return *this;
7633 }
7634
7635 CommandData(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7636 *this = jsonObjectData;
7637 }
7638
7639 virtual ~CommandData() = default;
7640
7641 protected:
7642 InputEventData eventData{};
7643
7644 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, CommandData* pDataStructure) {
7645 if (jsonObjectData.contains("options") && !jsonObjectData["options"].is_null()) {
7646 pDataStructure->optionsArgs.reserve(jsonObjectData["options"].size());
7647 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["options"]) {
7648 if (value.contains("type") && value["type"] == 1) {
7649 if (value.contains("name")) {
7650 pDataStructure->subCommandName = value["name"];
7651 }
7652 } else if (value.contains("type") && value["type"] == 2) {
7653 if (value.contains("name")) {
7654 pDataStructure->subCommandGroupName = value["name"];
7655 }
7656 }
7657 if (value.contains("options")) {
7658 parseObject(value, pDataStructure);
7659 }
7660 if (value.contains("value") && !value["value"].is_null()) {
7661 auto& newValueNew = value["value"];
7662 if (newValueNew.is_string()) {
7663 pDataStructure->optionsArgs.push_back(newValueNew);
7664 } else if (newValueNew.is_number()) {
7665 pDataStructure->optionsArgs.push_back(std::to_string(newValueNew.get<int64_t>()));
7666 } else if (newValueNew.is_boolean()) {
7667 pDataStructure->optionsArgs.push_back(std::to_string(newValueNew.get<bool>()));
7668 }
7669 }
7670 }
7671 pDataStructure->optionsArgs.shrink_to_fit();
7672 }
7673
7674 if (jsonObjectData.contains("name") && !jsonObjectData["name"].is_null()) {
7675 pDataStructure->commandName = jsonObjectData["name"].get<std::string>();
7676 }
7677 }
7678 };
7679
7680 /// Guild application command permissions data. \brief Guild application command permissions data.
7681 class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll GuildApplicationCommandPermissionData : public DiscordEntity {
7682 public:
7683 std::vector<ApplicationCommandPermissionData> permissions{};
7684 Snowflake applicationId{};
7685 Snowflake guildId{};
7686
7687 virtual ~GuildApplicationCommandPermissionData() = default;
7688 };

7690 /**@}*/
7691
7692 /// Song types. \brief Song types.
7693 enum class SongType : int8_t {
7694 YouTube = 0,///< YouTube.
7695 SoundCloud = 1///< SoundCloud.
7696 };
7697
7698 /// Represents a download Url. \brief Represents a download Url.
7699 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll DownloadUrl {
7700 int32_t contentSize{ 0 };
7701 std::string urlPath{};
7702 };
7703
7704 /**
7705 * \addtogroup voice_connection
7706 * @{
7707 */
7708
7709 /// Represents a single frame of raw audio data. \brief Represents a single frame of raw audio data.
7710 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll RawFrameData {
7711 std::vector<uint8_t> data{};///< The audio data.
7712 int32_t sampleCount{ -1 };///< The number of samples per this frame.
7713 };
7714
7715 /// Represents a single frame of encoded audio data. \brief Represents a single frame of encoded audio data.
7716 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll EncodedFrameData {
7717 std::vector<uint8_t> data{};///< The audio data.
7718 int32_t sampleCount{ -1 };///< The number of samples per this frame.
7719 };
7720
7721 /// Audio frame types. \brief Audio frame types.
7722 enum class AudioFrameType : int8_t {
7723 Unset = 0,///< Unset.
7724 Encoded = 1,///< Encoded.
7725 RawPCM = 2,///< Raw PCM.
7726 Skip = 3///< Skip.
7727 };
7728
7729 /// Represents a single frame of audio data. \brief Represents a single frame of audio data.
7730 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll AudioFrameData {
7731 AudioFrameType type{ AudioFrameType::Unset };///< The type of audio frame.
7732 EncodedFrameData encodedFrameData{};///< To be filled if it's already encoded.
7733 Snowflake guildMemberId{};///< The Id of the GuildMember from which it was sent.
7734 RawFrameData rawFrameData{};///< To be filled if it's raw audio data.
7735 void clearData();
7736 };
7737
7738 /// A song from the various platforms. \brief A song from the various platforms.
7739 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll Song : public DataParser<Song> {
7740 friend class DiscordCoreInternal::SoundCloudRequestBuilder;
7741 friend class DiscordCoreInternal::YouTubeRequestBuilder;
7742 friend class DiscordCoreInternal::SoundCloudAPI;
7743 friend class DiscordCoreInternal::YouTubeAPI;
7744 friend SongAPI;
7745
7746 std::vector<DownloadUrl> finalDownloadUrls{};
7747 SongType type{ SongType::SoundCloud };///< The type of song.
7748 std::string secondDownloadUrl{};
7749 std::string firstDownloadUrl{};
7750 std::string html5PlayerFile{};
7751 std::string addedByUserName{};///< The User name of the individual who added this Song to the playlist.
7752 std::string thumbnailUrl{};///< The Url of the thumbnail image of this Song.
7753 int32_t contentLength{ 0 };
7754 std::string html5Player{};
7755 std::string description{};///< A description of the Song.
7756 Snowflake addedByUserId{};///< The User id of the individual who added this Song to the playlist.
7757 std::string songTitle{};///< The title of the Song.
7758 std::string duration{};///< The duration of the Song.
7759 std::string viewUrl{};///< The url for listening to this Song through a browser.
7760 std::string songId{};
7761
7762 Song() = default;
7763
7764 Song& operator=(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7765 this->parseObject(jsonObjectData, this);
7766 return *this;
7767 }
7768
7769 Song(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData) {
7770 *this = jsonObjectData;
7771 }
7772
7773 virtual ~Song() = default;
7774
7775 protected:
7776 std::string trackAuthorization{};
7777 bool doWeGetSaved{ false };
7778 YouTubeFormat format{};
7779
7780 void parseObject(const nlohmann::json& jsonObjectData, Song* pDataStructure) {
7781 if (jsonObjectData.contains("lengthText") && !jsonObjectData["lengthText"].is_null()) {
7782 pDataStructure->duration = jsonObjectData["lengthText"]["accessibility"]["accessibilityData"]["label"].get<std::string>();
7783 }
7784
7785 if (jsonObjectData.contains("detailedMetadataSnippets") && !jsonObjectData["detailedMetadataSnippets"].is_null()) {
7786 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["detailedMetadataSnippets"][0]["snippetText"]["runs"]) {
7787 std::string newString = value["text"].get<std::string>();
7788 if (newString.size() > 256) {
7789 newString = newString.substr(0, 256);
7790 }
7791 pDataStructure->description = utf8MakeValid(newString);
7792 }
7793 }
7794
7795 if (jsonObjectData.contains("thumbnail") && !jsonObjectData["thumbnail"].is_null()) {
7796 pDataStructure->thumbnailUrl = jsonObjectData["thumbnail"]["thumbnails"][0]["url"].get<std::string>();
7797 }
7798
7799 if (jsonObjectData.contains("title") && !jsonObjectData["title"].is_null()) {
7800 if (jsonObjectData["title"].contains("runs")) {
7801 std::string newString = jsonObjectData["title"]["runs"][0]["text"].get<std::string>();
7802 if (newString.size() > 256) {
7803 newString = newString.substr(0, 256);
7804 }
7805 pDataStructure->songTitle = utf8MakeValid(newString);
7806 ;
7807 } else if (jsonObjectData["title"].contains("simpleText")) {
7808 std::string newString = jsonObjectData["title"]["simpleText"].get<std::string>();
7809 if (newString.size() > 256) {
7810 newString = newString.substr(0, 256);
7811 }
7812 pDataStructure->songTitle = utf8MakeValid(newString);
7813 }
7814 }
7815 if (jsonObjectData.contains("videoId") && !jsonObjectData["videoId"].is_null()) {
7816 pDataStructure->songId = jsonObjectData["videoId"].get<std::string>();
7817 }
7818
7819 if (jsonObjectData.contains("track_authorization") && !jsonObjectData["track_authorization"].is_null()) {
7820 pDataStructure->trackAuthorization = jsonObjectData["track_authorization"].get<std::string>();
7821 }
7822
7823 if (jsonObjectData.contains("media") && !jsonObjectData["media"].is_null()) {
7824 bool isItFound{ false };
7825 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["media"]["transcodings"]) {
7826 if (value["preset"] == "opus_0_0") {
7827 isItFound = true;
7828 pDataStructure->firstDownloadUrl = value["url"].get<std::string>();
7829 pDataStructure->songId = value["url"].get<std::string>();
7830 pDataStructure->doWeGetSaved = true;
7831 }
7832 }
7833 bool isItFound2{ false };
7834 if (!isItFound) {
7835 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["media"]["transcodings"]) {
7836 if (value["preset"] == "mp3_0_0") {
7837 pDataStructure->firstDownloadUrl = value["url"].get<std::string>();
7838 pDataStructure->songId = value["url"].get<std::string>();
7839 isItFound2 = true;
7840 }
7841 }
7842 }
7843 if (!isItFound2 && !isItFound) {
7844 for (auto& value: jsonObjectData["media"]["transcodings"]) {
7845 pDataStructure->firstDownloadUrl = value["url"].get<std::string>();
7846 pDataStructure->songId = value["url"].get<std::string>();
7847 }
7848 }
7849 }
7850
7851 if (jsonObjectData.contains("title") && !jsonObjectData["title"].is_null() && !jsonObjectData["title"].is_object()) {
7852 std::string newString = jsonObjectData["title"].get<std::string>();
7853 if (newString.size() > 256) {
7854 newString = newString.substr(0, 256);
7855 }
7856 pDataStructure->songTitle = utf8MakeValid(newString);
7857 }
7858
7859 if (jsonObjectData.contains("description") && !jsonObjectData["description"].is_null()) {
7860 std::string newString = jsonObjectData["description"].get<std::string>();
7861 if (newString.size() > 256) {
7862 newString = newString.substr(0, 256);
7863 }
7864 pDataStructure->description = utf8MakeValid(newString);
7865 pDataStructure->description += "...";
7866 }
7867
7868 if (jsonObjectData.contains("artwork_url") && !jsonObjectData["artwork_url"].is_null()) {
7869 pDataStructure->thumbnailUrl = jsonObjectData["artwork_url"].get<std::string>();
7870 } else if (jsonObjectData.contains("user") && !jsonObjectData["user"].is_null()) {
7871 if (jsonObjectData["user"].contains("avatar_url") && !jsonObjectData["user"]["avatar_url"].is_null()) {
7872 pDataStructure->thumbnailUrl = jsonObjectData["user"]["avatar_url"].get<std::string>();
7873 }
7874 }
7875
7876 if (jsonObjectData.contains("duration") && !jsonObjectData["duration"].is_null()) {
7877 pDataStructure->duration = TimeStamp::convertMsToDurationString(jsonObjectData["duration"].get<int32_t>());
7878 }
7879
7880 if (jsonObjectData.contains("permalink_url") && !jsonObjectData["permalink_url"].is_null()) {
7881 pDataStructure->viewUrl = jsonObjectData["permalink_url"].get<std::string>();
7882 }
7883 }
7884 };
7885
7886 /// Song completion event data. \brief Song completion event data.
7887 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll SongCompletionEventData {
7888 GuildMemberData guildMember{};///< The sending GuildMember.
7889 bool wasItAFail{ false };///< Is this a replay? (Did a track recently fail to play?)
7890 Song previousSong{};///< The previously played Song.
7891 GuildData guild{};///< The sending Guild.
7892 };
7893
7894 /// Playlist of songs and other variables. \brief Playlist of songs and other variables.
7895 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll Playlist {
7896 bool isLoopSongEnabled{ false };///< Is looping of Songs currently enabled?
7897 bool isLoopAllEnabled{ false };///< Is looping of the entire Playlist currently enabled?
7898 std::vector<Song> songQueue{};///< The list of Songs that are stored to be played.
7899 Song currentSong{};///< The current Song that is playing.
7900 };
7901
7902 /**@}*/
7903
7904 /**
7905 * \addtogroup utilities
7906 * @{
7907 */
7908
7909 /// Base arguments for the command classes. \brief Base arguments for the command classes.
7910 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll BaseFunctionArguments {
7911 DiscordCoreClient* discordCoreClient{ nullptr };///< A pointer to the instance of DiscordCoreClient.
7912 InputEventData eventData{};///< InputEventData representing the input event that triggered the command.
7913 CommandData commandData{};///< The input command's data.
7914
7915 BaseFunctionArguments() = default;
7916
7917 BaseFunctionArguments(CommandData commandData, DiscordCoreClient* discordCoreClientNew) {
7918 this->discordCoreClient = discordCoreClientNew;
7919 this->eventData = commandData.eventData;
7920 this->commandData = commandData;
7921 }
7922
7923 virtual ~BaseFunctionArguments() = default;
7924 };
7925
7926 /// Base class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll for the command classes. \brief Base class DiscordCoreAPI_Dll for the command classes.
7927 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll BaseFunction {
7928 std::string helpDescription{};///< Description of the command for the Help command.
7929 BaseFunctionArguments args{};///< The function arguments.
7930 std::string commandName{};///< Name of the command for calling purposes.
7931 EmbedData helpEmbed{};///< A Message embed for displaying the command via the Help command.
7932
7933 BaseFunction() = default;
7934
7935 /// The base function for the command's execute function. \brief The base function for the command's execute function.
7936 /// \param args A reference to an instance of BaseFunctionArguments.
7937 virtual void execute(BaseFunctionArguments& args) = 0;
7938 virtual std::unique_ptr<BaseFunction> create() = 0;
7939 virtual ~BaseFunction() = default;
7940 };
7941
7942 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MoveThroughMessagePagesData {
7943 InputEventData inputEventData{};
7944 uint32_t currentPageIndex{};
7945 std::string buttonId{};
7946 };
7947
7948 DiscordCoreAPI_Dll MoveThroughMessagePagesData moveThroughMessagePages(const std::string& userID, InputEventData originalEvent, uint32_t currentPageIndex,
7949 const std::vector<EmbedData>& messageEmbeds, bool deleteAfter, uint32_t waitForMaxMs, bool returnResult = false);
7950
7951 /**@}*/
7952
7953};// namespace DiscordCoreAPI

7959 enum class HttpsWorkloadClass : int8_t { Get = 0, Put = 1, Post = 2, Patch = 3, Delete = 4 };

7962
7963 enum class HttpsWorkloadType : uint8_t {
7964 Unset = 0,
7965 Get_Global_Application_Commands = 1,
7966 Post_Global_Application_Command = 2,
7967 Get_Global_Application_Command = 3,
7968 Patch_Global_Application_Command = 4,
7969 Delete_Global_Application_Command = 5,
7970 Bulk_Put_Global_Application_Commands = 6,
7971 Get_Guild_Application_Commands = 7,
7972 Post_Guild_Application_Command = 8,
7973 Get_Guild_Application_Command = 9,
7974 Patch_Guild_Application_Command = 10,
7975 Delete_Guild_Application_Command = 11,
7976 Bulk_Put_Guild_Application_Commands = 12,
7977 Get_Guild_Application_Commands_Permissions = 13,
7978 Get_Guild_Application_Command_Permissions = 14,
7979 Put_Guild_Application_Command_Permissions = 15,
7980 Batch_Put_Guild_Application_Command_Permissions = 16,
7981 Post_Interaction_Response = 17,
7982 Get_Interaction_Response = 18,
7983 Patch_Interaction_Response = 19,
7984 Delete_Interaction_Response = 20,
7985 Post_Followup_Message = 21,
7986 Get_Followup_Message = 22,
7987 Patch_Followup_Message = 23,
7988 Delete_Followup_Message = 24,
7989 Get_Guild_Audit_Logs = 25,
7990 Get_Channel = 26,
7991 Patch_Channel = 27,
7992 Delete_Channel = 28,
7993 Get_Messages = 29,
7994 Get_Message = 30,
7995 Post_Message = 31,
7996 Crosspost_Message = 32,
7997 Put_Reaction = 33,
7998 Delete_Own_Reaction = 34,
7999 Delete_User_Reaction = 35,
8000 Get_Reactions = 36,
8001 Delete_All_Reactions = 37,
8002 Delete_Reactions_By_Emoji = 38,
8003 Patch_Message = 39,
8004 Delete_Message = 40,
8005 Delete_Message_Old = 41,
8006 Bulk_Delete_Messages = 42,
8007 Put_Channel_Permission_Overwrites = 43,
8008 Get_Channel_Invites = 44,
8009 Post_Channel_Invite = 45,
8010 Delete_Channel_Permission_Overwrites = 46,
8011 Post_Follow_News_Channel = 47,
8012 Post_Trigger_Typing_Indicator = 48,
8013 Get_Pinned_Messages = 49,
8014 Put_Pin_Message = 50,
8015 Delete_Pin_Message = 51,
8016 Put_Recipient_To_Group_Dm = 52,
8017 Delete_Recipient_From_Group_Dm = 53,
8018 Post_Thread_With_Message = 54,
8019 Post_Thread_Without_Message = 55,
8020 Put_Self_In_Thread = 56,
8021 Put_Thread_Member = 57,
8022 Delete_Self_From_Thread = 58,
8023 Delete_Thread_Member = 59,
8024 Get_Thread_Member = 60,
8025 Get_Thread_Members = 61,
8026 Get_Active_Threads = 62,
8027 Get_Public_Archived_Threads = 63,
8028 Get_Private_Archived_Threads = 64,
8029 Get_Joined_Private_Archived_Threads = 65,
8030 Get_Emoji_List = 66,
8031 Get_Guild_Emoji = 67,
8032 Post_Guild_Emoji = 68,
8033 Patch_Guild_Emoji = 69,
8034 Delete_Guild_Emoji = 70,
8035 Post_Guild = 71,
8036 Get_Guild = 72,
8037 Get_Guild_Preview = 73,
8038 Patch_Guild = 74,
8039 Delete_Guild = 75,
8040 Get_Guild_Channels = 76,
8041 Post_Guild_Channel = 77,
8042 Patch_Guild_Channel_Positions = 78,
8043 Get_Guild_Active_Threads = 79,
8044 Get_Guild_Member = 80,
8045 Get_Guild_Members = 81,
8046 Get_Search_Guild_Members = 82,
8047 Put_Guild_Member = 83,
8048 Patch_Guild_Member = 84,
8049 Patch_Current_Guild_Member = 85,
8050 Put_Guild_Member_Role = 86,
8051 Delete_Guild_Member_Role = 87,

8136
8137 struct DiscordCoreAPI_Dll HttpsWorkloadData {
8138 static std::unordered_map<HttpsWorkloadType, std::atomic_int64_t> workloadIdsExternal;
8139 static std::unordered_map<HttpsWorkloadType, std::atomic_int64_t> workloadIdsInternal;
8140 static std::mutex accessMutex;
8141
8142 std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> headersToInsert{};
8143 PayloadType payloadType{ PayloadType::Application_Json };
8144 std::atomic_int64_t thisWorkerId{ 0 };
8145 HttpsWorkloadClass workloadClass{};
8146 HttpsWorkloadType workloadType{};
8147 std::string relativePath{};
8148 std::string callStack{};
8149 std::string content{};
8150 std::string baseUrl{};
8151
8152 HttpsWorkloadData& operator=(const HttpsWorkloadData& other) {
8153 if (this != &other) {
8154 this->thisWorkerId.store(this->thisWorkerId.load());
8155 this->headersToInsert = other.headersToInsert;
8156 this->workloadClass = other.workloadClass;
8157 this->workloadType = other.workloadType;
8158 this->relativePath = other.relativePath;
8159 this->payloadType = other.payloadType;
8160 this->callStack = other.callStack;
8161 this->baseUrl = other.baseUrl;
8162 this->content = other.content;
8163 }
8164 return *this;
8165 }
8166
8167 HttpsWorkloadData(const HttpsWorkloadData& other) {
8168 *this = other;
8169 }
8170
8171 HttpsWorkloadData& operator=(HttpsWorkloadData& other) {
8172 if (this != &other) {
8173 this->thisWorkerId.store(this->thisWorkerId.load());
8174 this->headersToInsert = other.headersToInsert;
8175 this->workloadClass = other.workloadClass;
8176 this->workloadType = other.workloadType;
8177 this->relativePath = other.relativePath;
8178 this->payloadType = other.payloadType;
8179 this->callStack = other.callStack;
8180 this->baseUrl = other.baseUrl;
8181 this->content = other.content;
8182 }
8183 return *this;
8184 }
8185
8186 HttpsWorkloadData(HttpsWorkloadData& other) {
8187 *this = other;
8188 }
8189
8190 HttpsWorkloadData() = default;
8191
8192 static int64_t getAndIncrementWorkloadId(HttpsWorkloadType workloadType) {
8193 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> theLock{ HttpsWorkloadData::accessMutex };
8194 int64_t theValue = HttpsWorkloadData::workloadIdsExternal[workloadType].load();
8195 HttpsWorkloadData::workloadIdsExternal[workloadType].store(theValue + 1);
8196 return theValue;
8197 }
8198 };
8199
8200};// namespace DiscordCoreInternal
